We help industry protect with a range of products for:
Servo Controlled Voltage Stabilisers upto 3500 kVA
Isolation Transformers upto 500 kVA
Active Harmonic Filters

We are the leading Servo Stabiliser manufacturer in India with over 350,000 installations across the country.

Conserve
We help industry conserve energy and resources with:
Energy Management System – Cloud based and Server based
Resource Management System – for Air, Water, Diesel, Steam.
We have more than 300 EMS installations across the country.

KRYKARD Care
We offer Service Support for KRYKARD and Non-KRYKARD Power Conditioners across the country. KRYKARD-CARE offers excellent service experience to customers with Web-based call logging and Electronic Field Service Reports. With 30+ service centres and 100+ service professionals, KRYKARD CARE provides timely service with great commitment to customers.

Name: Marelli Motori
Description:
Marelli Motori is a leading manufacturer of electric motors and generators. 

Founded in northern Italy in 1891, the company enjoys worldwide brand recognition in the marine, oil & gas, power generation, co-generation, hydro, and other industrial sectors. 
Marelli Motori is a leading manufacturer of electric motors and generators. 

Founded in northern Italy in 1891, the company enjoys worldwide brand recognition in the marine, oil & gas, power generation, co-generation, hydro, and other industrial sectors. 

Marelli Motori employs around 550 people and operates an extensive manufacturing facility in Italy with own subsidiaries in the United States, Germany, South Africa and Malaysia and has an extended sales, distribution, and service network across four continents, supplying its technologically advanced products in more than 120 countries.

In 2019, Marelli Motori was acquired by Langley Holdings plc, the British engineering and industrial group.

Name: Potter Electric Signal Co.
Description:
Established in 1898, Potter Electric Signal Company is a St. Louis, Missouri based manufacturer of sprinkler monitoring devices, fire alarm systems, & corrosion solution products.

Potter is able to quickly respond and react to our customers’ needs and provide the individual attention and service that each of our customers deserve. Potter’s reputation for quality and service has been the catalyst towards its focus for the design, development and manufacture of the highest quality and most reliable life safety products available today. Also, our commitment to continuous improvement is ever present. From the technology behind our products to the interfaces our customers use, we are always challenging ourselves to design, manufacture, and support the best of the best. We believe we have to be the best because when it comes to protection, why would anyone install anything else? 

Combined with our other businesses through Potter Global Technologies, we are able to offer a comprehensive selection of fire alarms, fire sprinkler monitoring, critical communication and notification systems, and power solutions to customers around the globe.  

Learn more at www.potterglobaltech.com

Name: Blue Solutions
Description:
Blue Solutions — Pioneering Solid-State Battery Technology

Blue Solutions is the global leader in solid-state battery technology, with over 30 years of R&D and 14 years of commercial production. We're the only company in the world delivering proven, industrial-scale solid-state batteries today—not tomorrow.

Proven Performance
• 600M+ vehicle kilometers powered worldwide
• 5,000+ electric buses and vehicles deployed
• 3M+ solid-state battery cells produced
• 48,000 sqm manufacturing in France & Canada
• 450+ employees across two continents

GEN4: Next-Generation Technology platform delivers:
 -Higher energy density for extended range
 -Intrinsic safety (solid electrolyte, no thermal runaway)
 -Extreme temperature performance (-40°C to +80°C)
 -Cobalt-free, nickel-free chemistry
 -15+ year lifecycle with 90% lithium recovery

 Applications
Automotive | Aircraft (drones, eVTOLs) | Consumer electronics

 Industry Recognition
• Ranked #1 for industrial investments in France (2024)
• IATF 16949, ISO 9001, ISO 14001 certified
• Active member of European Battery Alliance
• Strategic partnerships with global OEMs

 Sustainability Commitment
Ethical sourcing | Closed-loop recycling that recover up to 90% of lithium and other critical materials from end-of-life batteries | Long product life | ISO 14001 certified operations

Our Mission: Establish Blue Solutions as the global standard in solid-state batteries through innovation, collaboration, and environmental stewardship.

 WHY PARTNER WITH BLUE SOLUTIONS?
More Than a Battery Supplier- A Strategic Partner. When you work with us, you gain more than a product. You gain a partner with:
- Proven industrial maturity — 14 years of commercial production, 3 million+ cells delivered
- Real-world validation — 600 million+ vehicle kilometers in demanding applications
- Automotive-grade quality — IATF 16949, ISO 9001, ISO 14001 certified
- Technology leadership

 contact@blue-solutions.com

Name: Condumex
Description:
Grupo Condumex, empresa de Grupo Carso, es uno de los conglomerados industriales más importantes de México.

Desde 1954, año en que iniciamos operaciones, somos el principal fabricante de conductores eléctricos del país. Desde entonces hemos consolidado nuestra presencia nacional e internacional, y actualmente contamos con representación en más de 40 naciones. Las actividades de nuestras empresas se enfocan en 6 sectores de negocios: Autopartes, Cables, Electrónica, Energía y Proyectos Integrales, Instalaciones

Name: Panasonic Electric Works Türkiye
Description:
Panasonic Electric Works Türkiye, İstanbul’da yer alan endüstriyel tesislerinde faaliyet göstermekte olup, konfor, güvenlik ve enerji verimliliği sağlayan yenilikçi ürün ve çözümlerini dünya pazarlarına ulaştırmayı ve İnsan odaklı yaklaşımlarla daha iyi ve konforlu bir ‘yaşam’ sunmayı hedeflemektedir. 2014 yılında gerçekleştirdiği yatırımla birlikte, sektörünün lider ve Super Brand statüsüne sahip markası VİKO’yu da bünyesinde bulunduran Panasonic Electric Works Türkiye, 60’dan fazla ülkeye gerçekleştirdiği ihracat ile markalarını dünya pazarlarında başarıyla temsil etmekte ve Türkiye’deki sektör liderliğini sürdürmektedir.
Teknolojik dönüşümün gerektirdiği tüm entegrasyonların hayata geçirildiği endüstriyel tesislere sahip bulunan Panasonic Electric Works Türkiye, kullanıcıların yaşam alanlarının kalitesinin artırılmasına yönelik ürünler ve çözümler üretmek ve yenilikçi ürünleri pazara sunmak için Ar-Ge, inovasyon ve tasarım çalışmalarını başarıyla yürütmektedir. 
Panasonic Electric Works Türkiye’nin ürün gamı içerisinde; Elektrik Anahtar ve Prizleri, Grup Prizler, Aksesuarlar, Alçak Gerilim Şalt Ürünleri, Sigorta Kutuları, Elektronik Elektrik Sayaçları, Otomatik Sayaç Okuma Sistemleri, Akıllı Ev ve Bina Otomasyon Sistemleri, LED Aydınlatma Ürünleri, Profesyonel El Aletleri, Güneş Enerjisi Panelleri, Güvenlik Kamera Sistemleri ve Yangın Algılama Sistemleri yer almaktadır. 
Sürdürülebilirliği kurumsal yaklaşımları içerisinde ele alan ve geleceğe değer katan sosyal sorumluluk projeleri yürüten Panasonic Electric Works Türkiye, ayrıca kalite, güvenlik ve çevresel sorumluluklarına önem veren yaklaşımlarının sonucu olarak ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OHSAS 18001 ve ISO 27001 Bilgi Güvenliği Sistemlerine sahip bulunmaktadır.

Name: ALPS ALPINE
Description:
Alps Alpine, a leading manufacturer of electronic components and automotive infotainment systems, has brought the world numerous “First 1” and “Number 1” products since its founding in 1948. The Alps Alpine Group currently operates 110 bases in 26 countries and regions, supplying roughly 40,000 different products and solutions to around 2,000 companies worldwide. 

In January 2019, Alps Electric Co., Ltd. and Alpine Electronics, Inc. integrated their businesses to embark on a new era as Alps Alpine Co., Ltd. Serving a diverse range of markets encompassing an automotive industry currently undergoing major transformation, the mobile and consumer electronics domains, through to energy, healthcare and industry markets, Alps Alpine will combine and build on core device technology established over many years in three areas – human-machine interfaces, SENSORING and connectivity – along with system design and software development capabilities to innovate value that brings comfort to and enriches the lives of people everywhere.

Name: Olympus Life Science
Description:
As a subsidiary of Olympus Corporation, Olympus Life Science’s core product lineup comprises clinical, educational, and research microscopes, digital imaging systems, and analytical instruments. Our products are all designed with an unwavering commitment to furthering scientific research; and enhancing the safety, security, quality, and productivity of those we serve. 

For more information, visit Olympus-LifeScience.com.

Name: Haier Egypt
Description:
Established in 1984, Haier Group is a world-leading provider of a better life and digital transformation solutions.
With users at the center of all we do, we have deployed 10 R&D centers, 71 research institutes, 33 industrial parks, 133 manufacturing centers and more than 230,000 sales networks worldwide. We are the world's only IoT ecosystem brand that has been ranked on the list of BrandZ Top 100 Most Valuable Global Brands for four years straight and topped Global Major Appliances Brand Rankings by Euromonitor International for 14 consecutive years. In 2022, our global revenue reached USD 50.3 billion, and our brand value reached USD 68.1 billion.
We own four listed companies. Our subsidiary Haier Smart Home is among the list of Fortune Global 500 and Fortune World’s Most Admired Companies. We own seven global high-end brands, namely Haier, Casarte, Leader, GE Appliances, Fisher & Paykel, AQUA, and Candy; and the world's first smart home scenario brand - THREE WINGED BIRD. In addition, we have built the world's leading Industrial Internet platform COSMOPlat and the great healthcare brand Yingkang Healthcare. Our entrepreneurship acceleration platform HCH has successfully incubated 7 unicorn companies, 102 gazelle companies, and 120 specialized and sophisticated enterprises.
As a representative of the real economy, we have been constantly focusing on the
industry and developing businesses in smart home and living, and Industrial Internet sectors; and have been building high-end, scenario and ecosystem brands. Through technological innovation, we aim to customize a personalized smart living experience for global users, help corporate clients with digital transformation, and promote high-quality and sustainable economic and social development.

Name: SVI Public Company Limited
Description:
SVI is a leading EMS service provider and a highly esteemed Public Limited Company founded in 1985. Our company has since been providing total Electronics and Manufacturing solutions in Thailand with additional regional and global operations across South East Asia, Europe and USA. Presently, SVI is recognized as a market leader in these global markets.

Our operations cover specialized EMS manufacturing and solution oriented services; including but not limited to, Industrial Electronics, Micro-Electronics for telecommunications components, specialized electronic assemblies and medical technologies industries.

Within these specialist EMS areas, SVI’s highly experienced EMS teams leave no stone unturned in our client’s EMS analysis so we can meet their every need. As a result, our EMS experts are able to continuously deliver the most competitive operational costs offering true value to all our client’ operations.

In order to adequately serve these EMS markets cost effectively and logistically, SVI’s primary operations are strategically located just 45 minutes from Bangkok’s main international airport and only 90 minutes from Thailand’s busiest and most advanced seaport.

At the heart of SVI’s solution based services and operational excellence is a professional company culture working to build amicable business relationships and partnerships.

This commitment and dedication to service excellence, competitive costing strategies and high quality complex EMS solutions is why SVI has been able to attract large prestigious businesses successfully assisting these client in operating competitive and cost effective EMS systems.

Owing to SVI’s global success is the company’s founding mission; to supply a full range of quality turnkey projects within professional and industrial electronic industry sectors as well as a dedication to placing high value on client relationships in order to understand their needs in each individual case.

Name: Howard Industries
Description: Howard Industries is the leading manufacturer of liquid-filled distribution transformers for the utility and commercial/industrial markets.  Other utility products include small and medium power transformers, network transfomers, voltage regulators, junction enclosures, sectionalizing equipment, and transformer components. Other Howard products include computers and technology solutions, medical technology products, and lighting and ballast products.  We also have a transportation division which operates a fleet of 150 tractor-trailers.

Name: TRONICO ATLAS
Description:
As of 2004, TRONICO ATLAS reinforces the development and reputation of its Moroccan site to support the world's leading industrial companies (in Aeronautics, Energy, Medical and more).

The advantages are numerous for our partners thanks to a qualified workforce of 450 employees, an optimal geographical coverage, a dynamic industrial policy, favorable free trade agreements and quality logistics infrastructures.

In order to respond to the tremendous growth potential of its markets, TRONICO ATLAS continues to expand the production capacity of its Moroccan site (new hires with specialized technical skills, Nadcap certification, significant investments, expanded production area...) in build-to-print and build-to-spec.

TRONICO ATLAS also has a local supply chain qualified in Aeronautics.

Finally, TRONICO ATLAS has completed its offer in service by creating a dedicated R&D center in Morocco, in addition to its two other centers located in France.

Name: TMC TRANSFORMERS
Description:
At TMC Transformers SpA, we blend tradition with innovation to produce highly engineered Dry Type Transformers in Cast Resin or VPI technology.
 
Born from the acquisition of TMC Italia SpA by Next Technology Group (NTG), we are driven by a commitment to excellence. Our team of top-tier engineers and technicians brings extensive experience to design and manufacture tailor-made transformers for diverse applications, including Data Centres, Building & Infrastructure, Industry, Marine & Offshore, Mining, Oil & Gas, Railways and Substations, Power Generation, and more.
 
TMC strives to empower our customers from development and technical consultancy to ensuring timely final product delivery and offering service support, exceeding expectations.
 
"We are proud to offer our technological strengths and engineering expertise to foster mutual business growth and market expansion." 
Join us on our journey to power the future with cutting-edge solutions and unparalleled service.
 
Together, we can achieve remarkable growth and success.

Name: Powerline
Description:
Powerline is an electrification solutions manufacturer and distributor specialized in low and medium voltage solutions as well as one of the most trusted and reliable implementors of electromechanical projects in different kind of scales.

Our story began in 2012, Back then we were just a small trading company of ABB products began with a single small office, few number of employees and good connections in the electrical market.
Today, we are privileged to have expert engineers, consultants, technicians together with our broad knowledge and products Know-how also besides the capabilities of two factories, we have secured our market position as one-stop trusted supplier of top-notch power solutions who is serving a wide client base and participated in more than 2000 projects.

Powerline has later evolved to be one of the most reliable manufacturers of its own high quality solutions by being ABB Certified panel builder for low voltage electrical panel boards and ABB Original equipment manufacturer for medium voltage switchgear.

Name: National Transmission & Dispatch Company (NTDC), Pakistan
Description:
National Transmission & Despatch Company (NTDC) was incorporated on 6th November, 1998 and commenced commercial operation on 24th December, 1998. It was organized to take over all the propertise, rights and assets obligations and liabilities of 220 KV and 500KV Grid Stations and Transmission Lines/Network owned by Pakistan Water and Power Development Authority (WAPDA). NTDC operates and maintains fourteen 500 KV and thirty eight 220 KV Grid Stations, 5110.48 km of 500 KV transmission line and 9686.32 km of 220 KV transmission line in Pakistan.

NTDC was granted Transmission Licence No.TL/01//2002 on 31st December 2002 by National Electric Power Regularity Authority (NEPRA) to engage in the exclusive transmission business for a term of thirty (30) years, pursuant to Section 17 of the Regulation of Generation, Transmission and Distribution of Electric Power Act, 1997.

Name: Hikvision India
Description:
Hikvision India is India’s leading provider of video surveillance products and solutions. Driven by the ‘Make-in-India’ vision, the company manufactures a wide range of video surveillance products at its state-of-the-art manufacturing facility near Mumbai. Backed by the 26 RMA centers, the company offers Smart IP Cameras, HD Analog Cameras, Speed Domes, NVRs, DVRs, Video Management Software, Access Control and Alarm Systems, Encoder, Decoders, and other elements of sophisticated security systems and CCTV technology for any security need. Hikvision India offers a diverse set of vertical market solutions, including Retail, Banking, Power Petroleum Oil and Gas (PPOG), Transportation, Education, Hospitality, Tourism, Government, Healthcare, Pharma, Heavy Industries and Real Estate, etc.
The company is focused on research and development.  Hikvision India is committed to provide the best quality products with agile technical support through its PAN India branches and employees.

Name: Zetec
Description:
ZETEC is a global leader in nondestructive testing (NDT) solutions for the critical inspection needs of industries the world counts on, including - 
- Power Generation
- Oil and Gas
- Aerospace
- Automotive
- Maritime
- Military
- Rail
- Heavy Industry and Manufacturing

We serve as a single source for high-performance solutions in both eddy current and ultrasonic technologies. For over 50 years, we’ve advanced NDT standards and science, providing new insight and control through inspection solutions that protect our customers’ most important assets and ensure the quality of their products. By integrating design and engineering with our own manufacturing, Zetec delivers solutions that optimize productivity, safety and total cost of ownership.

Discover the latest inspection news, insights and innovations. Follow us today.

Name: Amphenol RF
Description: Amphenol is the world leader in the design, manufacture and supply of RF interconnect systems for the automotive, broadband, instrumentation, internet, military/aerospace and wireless infrastructure markets. With the combination of our global footprint and experience extending over a half-century, Amphenol is your RF Global Solutions Provider for the 21st Century.

Name: SHEMAR
Description:
Shemar Group was founded in 1996 with business scope covering four sectors: manufacturing of new material external insulation power products (Jiangsu Shemar Electric Co., Ltd, Shanghai Stock Exchange: 603530), design of new material external insulation grid solutions, grid investment and operation, industry and supply chain investment.

3 principles of production innovation:
1. Only develop products that solve key problems in the industry.
2. Only develop products with the best cost performance in the industry.
3. Only develop products with the highest market share in the industry.

Industry Leader
Shemar leads the formulation of
IEEE P2833 “Guide for Overhead Transmission Lines with Composite Insulated Cross Arm Supports”
IEEE P3196 “Guide for Composite External Insulation Technology in Distribution Network (36kV and below)”
IEEE Standard "Guide for Composite External Insulation Substations (CEIS)"
Shemar is initiating the development of an IEC standard for the Overhead Line CICA Solution.

Name: Firefly Electric & Lighting Corporation
Description:
At Firefly Electric and Lighting Corporation (FELCO), customer satisfaction is a commitment. It is our mission to elevate everyday experiences with accessible quality products and solutions that every Filipino deserves. 

We started our operations in 2001. Since then we have worked hard to build our expertise in delivering quality products, reliable service, and trustworthy lighting and electrical solutions through our brands—Firefly, Royu, ECOLum, and Herks. Today, we continue to ensure a diverse range of premium products for our valued customers by introducing new categories and by partnering with internationally-recognized brand Chint.

Name: Gexpro
Description:
Gexpro (www.gexpro.com) is part of the Rexel family of business which together form one of the world’s largest electrical distributors.  Gexpro and its sister businesses have over 400 branches in the United States.  Gexpro combines productivity tools, large local inventories and dedicated product and solutions specialists to get customers the electrical supplies they need, when and where they need them.  Gexpro supports customers across the country and the world to create value, lower their total cost of ownership and run their businesses better.  

Our electrical distribution business includes the Parts Super Center (PSC), which helps customers with renewal parts for GE and other OEMs industrial equipment. PSC also offers complete aftermarket parts management expertise, systems and outsourcing for OEMs.  Gexpro Services builds complete supply chain solutions for OEM customers – sourcing, inventorying and managing fasteners and other “C” parts from planning to production line support. 

With more than 2,500 professionals staffing more than 150 locations around the globe, our customers experience an unmatched level of service and support to help them be more successful every day.

Name: Constanta Industrial Ltda
Description:
Constanta has long history of quality and success in the Brazilian eletronics market.
Founded 60 years ago by german immigrants in Ribeirão Pires-SP, Constanta started its operations with the production of coal resistors for the Brazilian market

In 2012, beginning a new phase of business expansion, Constanta built her second plant with an area of  2.500 m2, located at the Brazilian Business Park condominium in Atibaia/SP

History of 60 years of quality, dedication and commitment to our customers. History that is being written day by day, responding to the challenges offered by you.

Name: PT. Patco Elektronik Teknologi
Description:
PT. Patco Elektronik Teknologi, located in Cikarang Barat (a suburb of Jakarta, Indonesia) was founded in June 1994. We are a manufacturing company that specializes in precision plastic injection molding, precision coil winding, electronic assembly of printers and the manufacture of medical electronic components. Along with our ISO 9001/14001 & 13485 Certifications, we have also secured “Green Partner/Procurement” status awarded by customers such as Epson, Panasonic, Sony and Omron. 
We are the first-tier vendor of PT. Indonesia Epson Industry.

PT. Patco Elektronik Teknologi is part of Senjaya Group involved in manufacturing of metal plating, advanced metal air batteries, and distribution of Professional Broadcast systems, Security Systems Solutions and Communications systems.

We are able to leverage on our group’s strength to form long term strategic manufacturing partnerships with leading-edge customers. We are currently providing contract manufacturing services to original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) in medical electronics, consumer electronics and automotive industries.

Our growth strategy is to promote our capabilities as a leading electronic manufacturing service provider offering a ONE-STOP Manufacturing Solution. This will be achieved through our vertically integrated operations, strong customer focus and the synergies of our dedicated and motivated management team.

Our philosophy is to provide the Best Quality, Cost and Delivery to our customer through continuous improvement. We use 5S, 3T, VISUAL MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS for factory control. Our strong emphasis on training enables us to continuously upgrade our technical and assembly skills and in turn enhances our performance with our customers.

Name: MASA Trading FZE
Description:
Founded in 2003 and strategically headquartered in Dubai, UAE, MASA Trading FZE has emerged as a global leader in Consumer Electronics and Home Appliances. With an extensive footprint across 40+ countries, we are dedicated to delivering high-quality products and exceptional customer experiences at every touchpoint along your MASA Journey.

Our diverse portfolio ranges from premium Italian-inspired designs to budget-friendly solutions, ensuring we cater to every lifestyle, every need, and every home. Over the past 21 years, MASA has built a legacy of trust, innovation, and excellence by forging exclusive partnerships with world-class manufacturers. 

Our bold vision is to lead globally— delivering cutting-edge products, creating extraordinary customer experiences, and fostering valuable opportunities for all.

The MASA Impact:
5 Brands
6 Operational Offices
Exporting Network in 40+ Countries
200+ Employees
250+ Products
500+ Distributors

And the MASA journey has only just begun!

Name: JBC Soldering Tools
Description:
➤ Since 1929, JBC has been at the forefront in developing SOLDERING and REWORK tools for electronics professionals.

➤ JBC is now a WORLDWIDE RENOWNED BRAND offering a wide range of products specially designed to meet every operator needs and applications.

➤ JBC has headquarters in Barcelona, SPAIN, and branches in St. Louis, MO USA, in Guadalajara, MEXICO, Hong Kong and Shanghai, CHINA and Chennai, INDIA. 

➤ JBC guarantees a quick and efficient service with a distributor network covering the 5 continents.

Name: Free2move eSolutions
Description:
Free2move eSolutions is part of the Stellantis'eMobiliy ecosystem. Born to become an international leader in the design, manufacturing and supply of e-mobility products and services for residential and busiiness customers. 
With our innovative and pioneering spirit, we will lead the transition towards new forms of mobility, with a new set of offers 100% dedicated to electric mobility, including hardware, digital products and turn-key projects.
We rely on a team of young talents with great skills and specific knowledge to design, develop, produce, distribute and market all over the world simple and innovative mobility solutions, contributing to the reduction of CO2 emissions.
Thanks to our continuous disruptive technological innovation, radical digitalization and a pioneering approach to development, production and offer, Free2move eSolutions simplifies the transition to the mobility of the future.

Name: Crowcon
Description:
We want to share our knowledge of gas detection to help people stay safe.

Crowcon make gas detection instruments for oxygen, flammable and toxic gas hazards. Fixed gas detectors protect plants; portable gas monitors protect people; and control panels integrate gas detection into engineered fire and gas fixed systems.

 Follow our page to get the latest updates on safety and gas detection.

Name: Munich Electrification
Description:
We develop innovative electronic control units for electric vehicles and stationary storage systems for our global customers.

Our battery management system is world-leading regarding safety, features and costs. Our products stand out for function-integration, scalability, variant handling, space and weight. They are being used worldwide in multiple series production vehicles and stationary storage systems.

Our Vision:
CONNECTED MOBILITY AND CLEAN ENERGY STORAGE TECHNOLOGIES TO CREATE A MEANINGFUL IMPACT ON EVERYONE'S LIFE.

Our international team is composed of highly motivated and exceptional employees. We offer a relaxed and friendly work atmosphere with flat hierarchies. As a small and specialized team we are well-aware of the importance of each individual colleague and support and promote each employee according to their abilities and needs. Our office with adjacent prototype and testing lab is located in the heart of Munich close to Heimeranplatz.

Name: NR Electric Co., Ltd
Description:
NR Electric, as a power stability expert, is dedicated to all around solutions for electric power generation, transmission, and distribution. With more than twenty years of experience and high-tech innovations, NR Electric provides a wide range of electrical and power electronics solution to its worldwide customers. 

NR Electric’s continuous innovation and dedicated power system with world class products & services to its esteemed customers make its more favorable for international markets. Our feedback oriented approach and close working attitude with clients helps us to potentially solve the problems and manage the risks effectively.
 
Through decades, NR Electric commits to our customers’ success and contributes to significant projects. Our solutions play vital roles from mega power generations, long distance high capacity HVAC and HVDC transmissions, industry, to eco-friendly renewable wind and solar farms.

Name: iEngineering Group
Description:
iEngineering Group specializes in:

1) Engineering Software Products
     a) NEPLAN - Power & Network Analysis Software
     b) SDS - Substation Design Suite - Primary & Secondary Design
     c) XGSLab - Earthing/Lightning/EMFI Analysis Software
     d) CARL  - Computerized Maintenance Management System & Enterprise Asset Management 
     e) EBase - Engineering platform ideal for leading industry solutions customized for to various Process
     f) Neara - Underground and Overhead Power Line Designer

2) Engineering Design & Consulting
     a) Automation and Industrial Engineering
     b) ASP Level 3 Design
     c) Power System Studies
     d) Earthing/Lightning/EMFI Studies
     e) Power Quality and Energy Saving
      f) Electrical Safety Audit
     g) Renewable Energy

3) Industrial Plants & Hardware Products
     a) Electrical & Electronic Parts
     b) Electrical Panels
     c) Plants and Equipment
     d) Machinery
     e) Lightning Protection System

Name: Unionaire Group
Description:
“17 years back Unionaire was a dream. Today this dream is a reality, but still we have bigger dreams for our business, our society, our employees, and for our customers.

Unionaire was found in 1995 with a clear vision from day one: “To invest in the Best Equipment and Best calibers to reach achievements that would position Egypt in the top ranks of manufacturers and exporters of high quality air-conditioning equipment with the Best After Sales Services.”
 
We have built Unionaire on the revolutionary philosophies of excellence in the workplace, customer service and always having the “value for money” prices.

Today Unionaire is ranked amongst the foremost respectable and successful private sector groups in Egypt and in more than 70 countries were our successful growing exports exist in the International Market.

Unionaire is the Mother company of several growing and diversified companies in the field of home appliances manufacturing and distribution. Today, Unionaire Group’s companies proved its solid status through insightful planning, a solid marketing and a financial status locally and internationally.

Our Factories are adopting the highest-quality technology for production and Quality Control. That is why we are classified among the top 10 manufacturers worldwide in the field of Air-conditioning systems , Stoves, Screens, washing machines; and other home appliances, Water heaters, Refrigerators, Digital filters, Fans, Deep freezers

In Unionaire , our working force exceeds 3000 people. We are always investing in the Top-Notch Engineering and Business professionals in the market, and our concern is sustaining human development. We believe that our working force is our most important Capital Investment.

In spite of the Global Economic Crises that effected most countries and companies worldwide, we did not decrease our number of working force. On the contrary, during this period and until date, we were hiring new people due to our production expansion, and our clear marketing and sales goals locally and internationally.

In Unionaire , we focused on ensuring that we provide great value products for our customers every day. We want our customers to trust in our pricing philosophy and to always be able to find the best value for money products with the best possible service.

Our customers are our partners in success, that is why it is always a long term business relation ship that is build on trust, respect, and care. At Unionaire , we do this, in part, by making products that meet the expectations and aspirations of customers who share the same values as we do.

16 years past since we started our business, and within the coming few years we will witness sustained growth and new success of Unionaire as one of the top world leaders in Air-condition and Home Appliances products and related services.”

Name: Apollo Fire Detectors
Description:
Welcome to Apollo

Our purpose is simple; to keep people safe from fire every second of every day. We combine technologies and capabilities with knowledge and care to deliver effective fire safety solutions that protect commercial, industrial and marine customers around the world. 

Through a network of partners and distributors spanning five continents, our systems are approved to local regulations and we hold 3,000 product approvals worldwide. We are proud of our global reputation for innovation, quality and reliability and strive to exceed the highest standards to consistently deliver value to our customer’s needs. 

We were the first UK company of its kind to hold three consecutive Queen’s Awards for Export Achievement, together with several internationally recognised quality and environmental awards.

Name: Linea Light Group
Description:
From the time of its establishment in 1985 to the present, Linea Light Group has grown to the point of becoming and being known as one of the major players in technical and decorative lighting. These two spirits co-exist and fuel one another thanks to the group’s constant and continuous technological research.

With the recent acquisition of the historic Stilnovo brand, famous for its innovative and experimental products, Linea Light Group’s decorative range is enriched. From Stilnovo, we inherited lighting items designed by Ettore Sottsass and De Pas D’urbino Lomazzi, as well as Joe Colombo, and we brought new lights alongside these icons, developed entirely in-house. The acquisition completes the Decòrative collection made up of products with great personality and a strong dramatic presence.

Linea Light Group simultaneously maintains its presence as a leader in professional lighting with the I-Lèd brand, acknowledged as one of the major innovators in the LED area. From 2019, we have been in the urban & industrial lighting segment with dedicated products, reinforcing our presence in the technical lighting market with efficient and innovative products. The completeness of our catalogues allows us to be present and active on diversified sales channels, so we are able to supply all our customers optimally and quickly. Precision, speed and reliability are the characteristics that have always defined Linea Light Group.

Name: ROBE Lighting s.r.o.
Description:
Robe is among the world’s leading moving light manufacturers, recognised for its innovation, quality engineering and dedication to the very highest production values. 
The company is based in the Czech Republic and all processes involved in making the luminaires is undertaken locally in a 75.000 square metre premises. Currently Robe employs over 750 skilled staff worldwide.
Robe has wholly-owned subsidiaries in six key markets – the U.S., U.K., Middle East, Singapore (Asia Paciﬁc), France and Germany - and a highly proactive and talented regional sales management team which helps oversee and co-ordinate the worldwide distribution network covering over 100 countries.
Robe’s moving and LED lights can be found everywhere. They are working and installed on stages and in concert halls, in theatres and all types of other venues; they are lighting all genres of performance from music to TV to drama and opera; appearing on a myriad of diverse events as well as at theme park attractions and entering the specialist worlds of architectural and environmental illumination.
Robe is also known for being accessible, forward-thinking and understanding the importance of people and personal communication in sustaining a successful enterprise. The excellent communication with those investing in and using its dynamic range of products is at the core of future research and development.
The company is very proud of its independence and private ownership. 
This ensures the business remains agile, efﬁcient, decisive and focussed on producing genuinely creative tools for an imaginative and exciting industry that constantly pushes boundaries.

Name: Wurth Elektronik
Description:
The Würth Elektronik Group of companies has about 7,500 employees worldwide and generated global sales of € 1.02 billion in 2024

Würth Elektronik offers sophisticated electronic components for a multitude of applications in all industrial sectors. For us, it’s not the individual component that’s most important – it’s finding the solutions to problems. We’re the reliable partner for our customers. With Würth Elektronik, customers realize electronic visions – we’re on board from start to finish.

The passive division include inductors, ferrites, chokes, LEDs, capacitors, crystals, resistors, sensors, transformers and wireless charging coils. Board-to-Board, Wire-to-Board, Terminal Blocks, and Input/Output connectors are included in the electromechanical division. Online tools have been developed for use by engineering customers to design in magnetics for switchmode power supplies: REDEXPERT, for non-isolated, and isolated, flyback designs.

https://linktr.ee/wurthelektronik

Name: HARMAN DO BRASIL
Description:
É bem provável que a HARMAN e suas marcas inovadoras já tenham alcançado a sua vida.

A HARMAN projeta e desenvolve produtos e soluções conectadas para fabricantes de automóveis, consumidores e empresas do mundo todo, incluindo sistemas para carros conectados, produtos audiovisuais, soluções de automação empresarial e serviços conectados. Nossa talentosa equipe e nossa força em inovação criam valor para os nossos stakeholders permitindo experiências ricas através de carros conectados, empresas conectadas e um estilo de vida conectado.

Audiófilos de todas as gerações contam com a HARMAN para entregar o melhor em som no estÚdio, no palco e em casa. O portfólio de marcas memoráveis de equipamentos de áudio da HARMAN inclui AKG, Harman Kardon, Infinity, JBL, Lexicon, Mark Levinson e Revel. Mais de 25 milhões de veículos que circulam hoje desfrutam de uma experiência aprimorada de transporte graças aos equipamentos de áudio e infotenimento da HARMAN. Nós estendemos o mesmo espírito de inovação para os principais locais de apresentações artísticas e eventos esportivos do mundo, oferecendo a todos os melhores lugares. A HARMAN reestruturou sua organização e sua estrutura de custos para tornar a Empresa mais ágil em um mundo em transformação e abordou a crescente importância de produtos e serviços altamente integrados e ricos em software. E o mais importante: nosso histórico de inovação, que tem diferenciado a HARMAN e suas marcas premium de áudio e infotenimento por mais de 60 anos, continua. No Brasil, a Harman possui fábricas no Rio Grande do Sul e Manaus, além de um escritório técnico e comercial em São Paulo.
Location: Nova Santa Rita, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Farasis Energy
Description:
Farasis Energy, founded in 2002 by Dr. Yu Wang and Dr. Keith Kepler, is a global innovator in lithium-ion battery technology, shaping the future of electric mobility and energy storage. Headquartered in Ganzhou, China, we have a strong international presence with advanced R&D and manufacturing facilities in China, Germany, and the United States.

Our cutting-edge battery solutions power some of the world’s leading automotive brands, delivering exceptional energy density, safety, and lifecycle performance. We are committed to a sustainable future, pioneering low-carbon production, second-life applications, and innovative recycling strategies.

In 2021, we expanded our global impact by launching Siro, a joint venture with Togg in Turkey. This partnership strengthens our role in the European market, accelerating EV battery production and energy solutions to drive the next era of electrification.

With a relentless focus on technology, sustainability, and scalability, Farasis Energy is redefining the battery industry—one charge at a time.

Glamox is a Norwegian industrial group that develops, manufactures and distributes lighting solutions for the global professional market. Our mission is to provide sustainable lighting solutions that improve the performance and wellbeing of people. We are a leading supplier to the world’s marine and offshore markets, and a significant supplier to the professional building market in Europe. 
 
The Glamox Group employs around 2 200 professionals, with sales and production in Europe, Asia and America. In 2021, the annual turnover reached NOK 3 377 million. We offer our solutions through a range of quality lighting brands, including Glamox, Aqua Signal, Luxo, Norselight, LINKSrechts, Küttel, Luxonic, ES-SYSTEM, LiteIP, Luminell and Wasco.www.glamox.com

At KHY we have 16 SMT Lines, 14 Assembly Lines and 12 Packaging Lines. With more then 300+ Highly Experienced Professional with average 10+ Years experience in Mobile Manufacturing Industry.

Name: Foxconn Interconnect Technology (FIT)
Description:
FIT is an innovative market leader of connectivity technologies within the data center, mobile, computing, and IoT environments. Foxconn Interconnect Technology, Ltd. (FIT) has offices and manufacturing sites located in Asia, the Americas, and Europe.
FIT develops, manufactures, and markets electronic and optoelectronic connectors, antennas, acoustic components, cables and modules for applications in computers, communication equipment, consumer electronics, automobiles, industrial and green energy field products.   
FIT had a very successful IPO on July 13, 2017 and is traded on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as FIT Hon Teng (stock 6088).  Prior to that, FIT was a wholly owned subsidiary of Foxconn.  FIT was the original product line of Foxconn, founded as Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. by Terry Gou in 1974 which has grown into one of the largest companies in the world. 
FIT offers competitive compensation and world class benefits. In addition, we recognize the performance of the company, business unit and individual through our incentive and recognition programs.  FIT is an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to inclusion and diversity: Females / Minorities / Veterans / Disabled

Website: 
http://www.fit-foxconn.com

Name: Samsung Germany
Description:
Als weltweit führender Technologiekonzern leben wir Innovation. Wir stellen die technologische Welt Tag für Tag auf den Kopf: Wir falten Smartphones und erweitern mit Connected Living das Smart Home. In Sachen Health Devices machen wir uns stark, denn dank unserer energieeffizienten Geräte ist jeder Haushalt für die Zukunft gerüstet.

Kern unserer Philosophie ist es, einen wichtigen Beitrag für eine bessere globale Gesellschaft zu leisten: Alle MitarbeiterInnen widmen sich der Einzigartigkeit unserer Produkte. Ob in der Konzeption, der Ausführung oder der Weiterentwicklung. Dabei setzen wir auf Kreativität und Diversität. Gemeinsam wachsen wir über uns hinaus und machen das Unmögliche möglich. #DoWhatYouCant

Name: Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai
Description:
Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai is a diversified international industrial group, whose business covers residential air conditioners, central air conditioners, intelligent equipments, home appliances, air source water heaters, smart phones, refrigerators, etc.

Gree was founded in 1991. It takes “Independent Innovation” as the development concept and “To build a centenary enterprise” as the business goal. It is highly reputable both at home and abroad for its advanced technologies, strict quality control, unique sales mode and complete after-sales service.

The company has its headquarters in Zhuhai, a beautiful coastal city in the south of China, with over 80,000 employees. Gree has established 11 production bases around the world, 9 are located in China, with another 2 in Brazil and Pakistan. Moreover, it has 5 bases of renewable resources in Changsha, Zhengzhou, Shijiazhuang, Wuhu and Tianjing, and 6 subsidiary companies (Lamda Compressor Co. Ltd., Gree Electrical Co. Ltd., Kaibang Motor Manufacture Co., Ltd., Xinyuan Electronics Co., Ltd， Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd and Precision Mould Co. Ltd), covering the entire supply chain from production of core parts and components to the recovery of waste products.

Gree has developed 24 “world leading” technologies. Gree products are classified into 20 categories, 400 series, and over 12700 models, with 36,949 technology patents, including 15,253 invention patents. They are sold widely in more than 160 countries and regions, to more than 300 million users all across the world.

Since 2005, Gree has topped No.1 in production and sales volume of residential air conditioners for 13 consecutive years. In 2006, it was awarded “World Brand”. Gree achieved sales revenue of 150.02 billion yuan in 2017, with net profit of 22.402 billion yuan and tax payment of 14.939 billion yuan.In 2018， Gree ranked No. 294 on the list of “ForesGlobal 2000 Public Companies”.

Name: KSTAR
Description:
Kstar, a leading digital infrastructure & renewable energy equipment manufacturer with three decades of experience, is dedicated to satisfying the growing demands of the power market with its comprehensive range of products. 

Our main products include:

UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) systems: Ensuring reliable and continuous power supply for critical applications.

Data Center Infrastructure solutions: Offering a complete suite of products, including batteries, PDUs (Power Distribution Units), data center cooling systems, racks, and monitoring systems, to optimize the performance and efficiency of your data center.

Modular Data Centers: Providing flexible and scalable solutions, such as container data centers and mining containers, to meet the unique requirements of various industries.

PV Inverter and ESS (Energy Storage System) Solutions: Harnessing the power of renewable energy with our advanced solar inverters and energy storage products, enabling sustainable and efficient power generation.

EV Chargers: Supporting the growth of electric vehicles with our state-of-the-art charging solutions, facilitating the transition to a greener future.

At Kstar, we are dedicated to delivering innovative, reliable, and efficient power management solutions to help our customers navigate the evolving power market landscape and achieve long-term success.

Name: beyerdynamic
Description:
beyerdynamic is one of the leading manufacturers in the audio industry. Founded 1924 in Berlin, the company stands for numerous audio innovations and for high quality products engineered and made in Germany. 

Today, our portfolio includes some of the finest microphones, headphones, and conference systems in the audio industry. The beyerdynamic headquarters and manufacturing facilities are located in Heilbronn,Germany. 

The beyerdynamic US sales and marketing office is located in Farmingdale, New York.

Imprint: https://www.beyerdynamic.de/imprint

Name: Marquardt U.S.
Description:
Marquardt is a global leader in mechatronics, combining nearly 100 years of innovation with a passion for developing smart, intuitive technologies. Our U.S. operations include a manufacturing and R&D hub in Cazenovia, NY, and an automotive-focused engineering, sales, and program management center in Rochester Hills, MI.

From intelligent switches and HMI systems to battery management, drive authorization, and e-mobility solutions, Marquardt technologies power the products people rely on every day—across automotive, industrial, appliance, medical, and smart device markets.

Explore your next opportunity with us: marquardt.com/us/careers

Name: Industrial Scientific
Description:
Industrial Scientific designs and manufactures gas detection products and solutions that protect workers from hazardous conditions around the world. Since our beginnings in 1985, we have pioneered numerous technologies, including the first 3-gas detector, 6-gas detector, wireless gas detector, and even the first gas detector to be included on a NASA space shuttle. 

Today, we continue to innovate and expand our hardware and software offerings to equip the connected workers of the future. Our latest solutions make it possible to see and respond to hazards in real time, bringing us one step closer to our vision of ending death on the job by 2050.

Name: Smart Wires Inc.
Description:
Smart Wires is the world’s leading grid enhancing technology and services provider. We help electric utilities to unlock capacity and solve their critical grid issues, using our solutions to create a more flexible, reliable and affordable grid. This enables a faster, more cost-efficient path to meet growing electricity demand with clean energy generation, at lowest cost to consumers. Headquartered in the Research Triangle of North Carolina, Smart Wires has a global workforce of passionate and visionary industry-leading experts spread across four continents, who work every day to transform grids globally. In collaboration with our customers and partners, we’ve unlocked over 3.5 Gigawatts capacity—enough to power over 2.5 million homes—supporting the faster integration of clean energy and new demand, enhancing security of supply and delivering cost savings to consumers.

Together, we are reimagining the grid for net zero.

Name: BizLink Group
Description:
Founded in 1996 and headquartered in Silicon Valley, USA, BizLink is dedicated to making transformative connections that bring visionary ideas to life. We specialize in providing essential components such as wire harnesses, connectors, and cables to a broad spectrum of industries, including the information and communications technology, consumer electronics, healthcare, transportation, and industrial automation sectors. 

Our global presence, with flexible production resources and R&D teams across North America, Europe, and Asia, allows us to proactively drive innovation and enable future possibilities. At BizLink, our customer-centric approach and commitment to relentless advancement empower us to deliver zero-distance service and continual performance optimization, making a positive and meaningful impact worldwide. 

We turn possibilities into reality; furthermore, we connect possibilities to world-changing visions.

Name: LCGC Resolute Group
Description:
Empowering 'Make in India': Your Trusted EMS Partner for Electronic Manufacturing Excellence

LCGC Resolute Group, a Pioneer in Electronics Manufacturing Services in India, with over 27 years of industry expertise, specializing in establishing and scaling strategic alliances with global OEMs and ODMs. At LCGC Resolute Group, we are dedicated to driving mutual growth and regional expansion by offering end-to-end electronic manufacturing solutions that align perfectly with the 'Make in India' initiative.

We combine global standards with deep local expertise to provide cost-effective, high-quality manufacturing and comprehensive technical support. Since 2005, through the influence of a global EMS company, we have leveraged state-of-the-art facilities and a robust infrastructure to build strategic partnerships with leading MNCs.

Core Manufacturing & Expertise:

Our advanced capabilities span across key high-growth sectors:

•	Telecommunications & Networking: CPEs, Enterprise Switches, Networking Switches
•	Consumer Electronics: Smart TVs, IFPDs, OLED Displays, Washing Machines, Home Electronics
•	High-Tech/Industrial: AI Servers, IT-IoT, Mini PCs, Automotive Clusters, Dashcams
•	Specialized Capabilities: Vertical Integration

Impact-Driven Operational Excellence:

We ensure superior output through:

•	A Strategic Vendor Network and a strong Local Procurement Ecosystem.
•	Advanced Automation for guaranteed high-quality production.
•	Digital Traceability and control via MES (Manufacturing Execution System).
•	Proven record of successful Collaborative Projects and rapid Industry Trend Adoption.

We are actively seeking to partner with companies looking to effectively capitalize on the strategic opportunities within the Indian market. Let's connect to explore how our manufacturing excellence can help expand your footprint and achieve ambitious growth targets.
#EMS #MakeInIndia #ElectronicManufacturing #OEM #ODM #ManufacturingExcellence #StrategicPartnerships #Technology

We foster a vibrant photonics ecosystem by maintaining a strong network and acting as a catalyst and facilitator for technological and commercial advancement. EPIC publishes market and technology reports, organizes technical workshops and B2B roundtables, coordinates EU funding proposals, advocacy and lobbying, education and training activities, standards and roadmaps, pavilions at exhibitions.

Name: Hesai Technology
Description: Hesai Technology (NASDAQ: HSAI; HKEX: 2525) is a global leader in lidar solutions. The company’s lidar products enable a broad spectrum of applications including passenger and commercial vehicles ("ADAS"), as well as autonomous driving vehicles and robotics and other non-automotive applications such as last-mile delivery robots and AGVs ("Robotics"). Hesai seamlessly integrates its in-house manufacturing process with lidar R&D and design, enabling rapid product iteration while ensuring high performance, high quality and affordability. The company’s commercially validated solutions are backed by superior R&D capabilities across optics, mechanics, and electronics. Hesai has established offices in Shanghai, Palo Alto and Stuttgart, with customers spanning more than 40 countries.

Name: Zollner Group
Description:
Complex mechatronic systems – from the development phase through to after-sales service: As a partner to global leaders as well as small and medium-sized enterprises from 7 different sectors, the Zollner Group offers cross-technology and cross-sector system solutions along the entire product life cycle. 
Our family-owned company was founded as a one-man business in 1965 in Zandt, Bavaria. Through continuous organic growth, we have established ourselves with over 13,000 employees at 24 locations across the globe as Europe's number 1 and at the same time among the top 15 EMS providers worldwide.  

Zollner Elektronik AG – more than just an EMS provider

Our focus is on high quality, reliable performance, and the precise fulfilment of customer requirements across products, processes, and technical consulting. As a family-owned industrial company headquartered in Austria, GG Group employs more than 4,000 people at 13 locations worldwide and combines engineering expertise with a strong global network.

With technical solutions, GG Group aims at high quality and the precise fulfilment of customer requirements. Quality is not only the focus of our products and processes, but also of our technical competence in advising our customers. With more than 4000 employees at 13 locations worldwide, GG Group is one of Austria's most successful family-owned industrial companies.

Description:
Step into the innovative world of LG Electronics. As a global leader in technology, LG Electronics is dedicated to creating innovative solutions for a better life. Our brand promise, 'Life's Good', embodies our commitment to ensuring a happier, better life for all. 
With a rich history spanning over six decades and a global presence of more than 100 subsidiaries, we operate on a truly global scale. Since our establishment in 1958, our dedication to enhancing lives worldwide through innovative products has remained unwavering. Our business domains include Home Appliance & Air Solution, Home Entertainment, Vehicle Components Solutions, and Business Solutions.
Our management philosophy, "Jeong-do Management," embodies our commitment to high ethical standards and transparent operations. Grounded in the principles of 'Customer-Value Creation' and 'People-Oriented Management', these values shape our corporate culture, fostering creativity, diversity, and integrity. At LG, we believe in the power of collective wisdom, fostering a collaborative work environment.

Join us and become a part of a company that is not just about creating solutions for a better life, because at LG, Life's Good.

Name: Samsung Electronics Polska
Description:
Samsung Electronics Polska to światowy lider w dostarczaniu nowoczesnych technologii cyfrowych wspierających biznes. 

Nieustannie ulepszamy Digital Signage, kanał sprzedaży profesjonalnych systemów wizualnych dla rozwojowych branż. Oferujemy innowacyjne produkty dynamizujące biznes, a także pokazujemy, jak wprowadzić do firm nowoczesne rozwiązania z zakresu technologii cyfrowej.

Firmom z sektora Logistyki i transportu proponujemy m.in. cyfrowy terminal oraz urządzenia przenośne zwiększające wygodę i mobilność pracowników, usprawniające obsługę klienta, a także podnoszące komfort podróży. 

Branży hotelarskiej dedykujemy serię telewizorów hotelowych wraz z rozwiązaniem umożliwiającym zarządzanie kanałami i treścią, aplikacje na urządzenia przenośne (informujące o promocjach i usługach), klimatyzatory systemowe i ekrany z innowacyjnym rozwiązaniem MagicInfo. Rozwiązania te zapewniają kompleksową obsługę gości, pełną automatyzację oraz usprawniają pracę hotelu na wielu poziomach.

Firmom z sektora Finansów i bankowości oraz Retailu przydatne będą m.in. monitory profesjonalne, tablety Galaxy, a także najnowocześniejsza ścianka z paneli LED, czyli innowacyjne rozwiązanie do prezentowania informacji. 
Przygotowaliśmy też nowatorskie rozwiązania dla Edukacji, m.in. możliwość stworzenia inteligentnej sali lekcyjnej dzięki monitorom interaktywnym, materiałom edukacyjnym czy tabletom Galaxy. 

W Instytucjach rządowych przydatne są nowoczesne rozwiązania jak tablety, smartfony, płaskie monitory wielkoformatowe, zegarki Smart. Podnoszą jakość usług publicznych oraz działań obronnych.

Name: PT TDK ELECTRONICS INDONESIA
Description: TDK Electronics (previously EPCOS) develops, manufactures and markets electronic components and systems, focusing on fast-growing leading-edge technology markets, which include automotive electronics, industrial electronics and consumer electronics as well as information and communications technology. Thanks to the 24,000 employees at some 20 design and production locations and an extensive sales network, the company is globally positioned – beyond the provision of standard products – to work closely with customers and create the right solutions for them. Products The diverse range of TDK Electronics portfolio includes capacitors, ferrites and inductors, piezo and protection devices, as well as sensors. Electronic components and systems are found today in almost every item of electrical equipment, where they are essential for guaranteeing perfect functionality. They perform key functions in cars and trucks, industrial machine tools and in electric railways, wind farms and photovoltaic plants, as well as in washing machines, LED lamps, smartphones, notebooks and televisions. In all these applications TDK Electronics solutions ensure the supply of power, protect electronic circuits and ensure their fault-free operation.

Name: CIRCUTOR
Description:
Technology of Electrical Energy Efficiency.

CIRCUTOR has over 40 years' experience and 6 production centres in Spain and the Czech Republic, working on the design and manufacture of units for improving energy efficiency: electrical energy and power quality measurement and control units, industrial electrical protection, reactive energy compensation and harmonic filtering, smart electric vehicle charging and, during the past few years: Renewable Energies.

Providing solutions with over 3000 products in over 100 countries worldwide.

Innovation:
All the knowledge acquired during this time is reflected in our products, which are reliable, robust, easy to use and most importantly: innovative.

Own technology:
CIRCUTOR has an R+D+i team composed of more than 60 engineers that design new products to satisfy the market demand, incorporating the most advanced technologies.

Test laboratories:
The company has its own laboratories for electromagnetic compatibility tests (EMC/EMI) and calibrations, and an official metrological verification laboratory, which can guarantee the quality of its products and ensure that they meet the highest quality standards.

New products:
CIRCUTOR is committed to innovation as a way to follow the latest technological advances and incorporate these advances in its products.

Name: Klimasan
PCB Piezotronics, Inc.
Description: PCB manufactures vibration, pressure, force, strain, shock, and acoustic sensors used by design engineers and predictive maintenance professionals worldwide for test, measurement, monitoring, and control requirements. Our sensors support testing in aerospace and defense, automotive, transportation, civil engineering, and general R&D industries. Primary sensing technologies include piezoelectric (ICP), piezoresistive, and capacitive MEMS. With a worldwide customer support team, 24-hour SensorLine, and a global distribution network, PCB is committed to Total Customer Satisfaction. PCB Piezotronics is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Amphenol Corporation.

Name: AVX Corporation
Description:
KYOCERA AVX is a leading international manufacturer and supplier of a vast portfolio of advanced electronic components, including: capacitors, inductors, filters, resistors, couplers, diodes, and circuit protection devices, as well as a broad range of innovative sensor, control, interconnect and antenna solutions. With 33 research, design, manufacturing, and customer support facilities in 16 countries around the world, KYOCERA AVX offers significant competitive advantages, including delivery and production capabilities optimized to suit each individual customer’s just-in-time inventory requirements, and global engineering teams experienced in developing new-to-market product solutions especially designed to fulfill customer’s unique application requirements.

KYOCERA AVX has successfully served the automotive, industrial, medical, military, consumer electronics, communications, and transportation markets for nearly 50 years. In the automotive sector, KYOCERA AVX actively contributes to the development of new safety, engine control, infotainment, and chassis control technologies. In the medical sector, advanced KYOCERA AVX products provide critical support for a wide range of implantable, life-supporting, treatment, imaging, and diagnostic devices, including pacemakers that regulate patients’ heartbeats, cochlear implants that provide audio input for the hearing-impaired, and diagnostic equipment that helps medical professionals identify and cure patients’ ailments. In the communications sector, our accomplished research and development (R&D) teams regularly anticipate needs and adapt and innovate products to support the explosive growth of next-generation technologies spanning smartphones and tablets to networks and datacenters.

KYOCERA AVX is committed to consistently exceeding customer expectations, and continuously satisfies that goal through the successful implementation of the company’s corporate mission and vision statements.

Name: NAPIT

We are NAPIT.

We're a fast-growing government-approved and UKAS-accredited membership scheme operator in the building services and fabric sector. 

For further details about the scope of the NAPIT UKAS accreditation, please visit the UKAS website .

With over 20,000 registered installers across the UK, we serve the electrical, heating, plumbing, ventilation, microgeneration, and building fabric trades in domestic, commercial, and industrial markets.

Committed to raising standards and safety with a friendly, common-sense approach, we operate our membership schemes through NAPIT Registration and NAPIT Certification.

Our best in their field technical experts sit on a wide range of influential industry committees, including BSI/IET Wiring Regulation Committee JPEL/64 and Sub Committee A and B, BSI committees, EAS Management Committee, Electrical Safety Roundtable and Electrical Safety First Technical Committee.

Extensive events schedule with our own NAPIT EXPO’s (or NAPIT EXPO Zones within ELEX), as well as appearing as regular technical speakers and panelists at ELEX Tool Fair, ETT Stay Connected and InstallerSHOW.  

The NAPIT Group spans across many different services, some of these being:

The NAPIT|Shop – Home of our helpful on-site tools, member branded workwear, and to a wide variety of informative and supportive publications, including our own award-winning publications written by our technical experts. 

NAPIT|Training – Approved training centres across the UK, with all training certified or accredited by City & Guilds, BPEC, LCL awards, NCFE or EAL.

 NAPIT|FastTest – Our in-house advanced, multi-platform electrical installation, inspection & testing, fire, gas and ventilation certification software.  

With many other services provided as benefits to our members only.

Name: MORNSUN POWER

MORNSUN, is a leading vertical industrial power supply manufacturer, specializes in magnetic isolation technology and product research & applications. MORNSUN manufactures high-quality products include AC-DC Enclosed, AC-DC converter, DC-DC converter, isolation transmitter, IGBT driver and LED driver, most of which are UL, CE, CSA, CB and DoE Level VI certified. Name: Réseau DEF
Description:
Réseau international et indépendant d’entreprises expertes en sécurité incendie, le Réseau DEF est un acteur majeur sur le marché européen dans le secteur des SSI - Systèmes de Sécurité Incendie.
Fondé en 1958 par Daniel Lécuyer, père de l’actuel président, ce réseau international basé dans 10 pays est composé de plus de 50 entreprises. A travers ses entreprises expertes et complémentaires, le Réseau DEF fournit des produits et services pour des projets de toute complexité. Les expertises rassemblées au sein du Réseau vont bien au-delà de la détection et de l’extinction, en intégrant notamment des solutions de sonorisation, gestion des issues de secours, désenfumage et compartimentage.

CHIFFRES CLÉS
•	Plus de 50 entreprises
•	12 usines en France et à l’étranger
•	2 400 collaborateurs
•	130 ingénieurs dédiés à la R&D
•	1958 : date de création


ABOUT THE DEF NETWORK
DEF Network is an international and independent network of fire safety expert companies, and a major player on the European market of the FSS - Fire Safety System. This international network was founded in 1958 by Daniel Lécuyer, father of the current president, and counts more than 50 companies based in 10 countries. Through its expert and complementary companies, DEF Network provides products and services for project of any complexity. Expertise gathered within the DEF Network go far beyond detection and extinguishing systems, and include, among others, voice alarm and public-address solutions, exits management, smoke extraction and compartmentation.

KEY FIGURES
•	more than 50 companies

Name: VARTA AG
Description:
VARTA AG produces and markets a comprehensive battery portfolio from micro batteries, household batteries, energy storage systems to customer-specific battery solutions for a variety of applications and, as a technology leader, sets industry standards in important areas. As the parent company of the group, it operates in the business segments "Lithium-Ion Solutions & Microbatteries" and "Household Batteries". The "Lithium-Ion Solutions & Microbatteries" segment focuses on microbatteries, lithium-ion coin power, lithium-ion round cells (lithium-ion large cells) and the lithium-ion battery pack business. Through intensive research and development, VARTA sets global standards in many areas of lithium-ion technology and microbatteries, making it a recognized innovation leader in the important growth markets of lithium-ion technology and in primary hearing aid batteries. The “Household Batteries” segment comprises the battery business for end customers, including household batteries, accumulators, chargers, portable power (power banks) and lights as well as energy storage devices. The VARTA AG Group currently employs almost 4,800 people. With five production and manufacturing facilities in Europe and Asia as well as sales centers in Asia, Europe and the USA, the operating subsidiaries of VARTA AG are currently active in over 75 countries around the world.

Imprint: https://www.varta-ag.com/en/imprint

With revenues of ₹37,500 Cr ($4.5B) and a market cap of ₹1,57,000 Cr ($19B), the group operates across 40 countries with 21K+ employees.

Torrent Electricals is a leading power cable manufacturer since 1989, serving both private and public sectors. Expanding into housing wires, and Fast-Moving Electrical Goods (FMEG), we strive to deliver innovative, high-quality products that redefine industry standards.

Name: Delta Controls
Description:
Delta Controls is a global leader in Building Automation Systems (BAS), with over 300 distributors, and many thousand of installations in more than 80 countries. Delta Controls is recognized as a market leader in the manufacture of open-protocol BAS.

Delta Controls has been instrumental in the development and evolution of the BACnet open-protocol (now the most common protocol in the industry).  An early adopter of the technology 20+ years ago, and a leading manufacturer with our entire product line being BTL certified from the smallest field device to enterprise level software.

Our R&D expenditures exceed industry averages, which allows us to develop products that are easier to install and simpler to use.  Product quality and reliability are a core focus of our organization.  All R&D and manufacturing take place at our corporate headquarters near Vancouver in Canada. As a manufacturer registered to ISO9001:2015, we make a significant investment in product testing to ensure performance and reliability. Once installed, Delta Controls' Partners work to enhance your building’s performance and contribute to saving energy.

Delta Controls' success is reflected by an experienced network of global installers, many of whom have built the success of their systems integration business using the Delta Controls Product line.  We have consistently won many awards over the last three decades.

Name: Hanna Instruments
Description: Hanna Instruments, Inc is the world’s largest privately held manufacturer of analytical and scientific instruments. Since 1978 Hanna has produced simple, affordable, high quality devices for laboratory, food, agriculture, aquarium, environmental, industry applications, and more. We offer a wide array of instrumentation from research grade benchtop meters and ISEs, to single and multiparameter meters for pH, DO, and more. Thousands of consumers and major brands trust Hanna for their testing needs. Hanna operates in 34 countries around the globe, ensuring exceptional levels of customer service and support.

Name: RFI Technology Solutions
Description: RFI is an Australian success story renowned for its expertise, industry know-how, and for delivering industry-leading, tech products, solutions, and services to customers worldwide, for over 40 years. Specialists in wireless coverage, public safety networks, and solar power, our business is now poised for its next stage of growth in high-potential markets.

Name: Versa Drives Private Limited
Description:
Versa Drives is committed to revolutionizing energy efficiency through customized motor control and embedded system products. We specialize in a range of motors and motor drives up to 20HP with applications in diverse sectors like appliances, industrial machines, EVs, drones, solar & conventional pumps, and fans.

Building on our core expertise in motor control, one of our ground breaking innovations is Superfan, which is India’s first super energy-efficient ceiling fan released to the market in 2012. Utilizing BLDC motor technology, Superfan achieved superior performance and efficiency, leading to several patents and national and international recognition. Eventually led to the creation of a dedicated business vertical focused on comprehensive fan motor design, hardware, blade design, understanding human thermal comfort, manufacturing, sales, and marketing.

Our vision is to save electricity joyfully for a better future, and our mission is to save millions of units of electricity every year. We achieve this by continuously pushing the boundaries of technology and innovation.

Versa Drives offers a serene workspace that aligns with our vision and mission. Our unique infrastructure has a low carbon footprint and provides a healthy environment for our team, serving as a habitat for over 50 species of birds and critters.

We foster continuous learning and career growth, comply with all employee-related statutory requirements, and showcase our commitment to employee satisfaction through our policies.

Notable Events and Achievements:

•	Launched Superfan to the commercial market in 2012, setting a new standard in the fan industry and actively working with policymakers and NGOs.
•	Secured a strategic investment from Murata Manufacturing, Japan.
•	Hold several patents and have received numerous global awards, including Dupont’s Global Sustainability Award, the Global LEAP Award, and the India Innovation Award.

Connect with us to learn more.

Name: ZVEI e. V.

Name: EGYTRAFO Group
Description:
EGYTRAFO Group is a leading manufacturer of Oil, Dry Transformers and Nickel Cadmium Batteries. We had been working since 1979 when we first established our trading company “ETCO”.
 
We were trading in electrical products as Insulators, HRC Fuses, Lighting Arrestors, Dis-connectors, Instrument Transformers & Nickel Cadmium Batteries.
 
In 1994, we were capable to manage reaching “EGYTRAFO” since we believe in the Egyptian qualifications and looking forward to enhancing the Egyptian market which produces Oil Transformers and Nickel Cadmium Batteries. Later, in 2007 “EGYTRAFO Grp.” was introduced with the launch of the Dry Cast Resin Transformers.
 
On the other hand, we established a factory in KSA that produces Oil Immersed, Dry Cast Resin Transformers, MV Switch Gears, MV Compartment, LV Systems, and Package Substations. 

In 2013, TERAFOTECH MANUFACTURING PLC was established in Ethiopia as an extension of EGYTRAFO Grp. It is specialized in producing and maintaining oil immersed electrical distribution transformers from 50 KVA up to 5000 KVA.
 
EGYTRAFO Grp. shall meet or exceed the quality standards in its products, in which our quality assurance team ensures the compliance of the IEC and ISO Standards, so, our products are internationally accepted. Besides, our transformers are “KEMA” certified.
 
One of our main objectives is to maintain continuance improvement to maintain our quality and reliability.
  
Vision:
“Being market leader in manufacture of transformers and Nickel Cadmium batteries and its services locally and globally”

Mission:
“Customer focus through high quality and reliable products / services with competitive price and on time delivery. ”

Objective:
“Maintain continual improvement in our business and manufacturing procedures with persistent staff development taking into consideration operational health and safety in all stages. 

Email: info@egytrafo.com

Name: Everest Instruments Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
At Everest Instruments, we take pride in being a leader in the field of high-quality measurement and instrumentation solutions. With over 25 years of experience, our commitment to precision and innovation has established us as a trusted partner for industries across the globe.

Our journey began with a vision to provide cutting-edge instruments that meet the highest standards of accuracy and reliability. Over the decades, we have evolved with advancements in technology, continuously expanding our product range and enhancing our services to address the ever-changing needs of our clients.
