Name: Testo do Brasil
Description:
A Testo SE & Co. KGaA, com sede em Titisee-Neustadt na Floresta Negra Alemã é líder de mercado mundial na área de tecnologia de medição portátil e estacionária. Em todo o mundo, mais de 3.000 colaboradores estão envolvidos em pesquisa e desenvolvimento, produção, Marketing, Vendas e Serviços para esta empresa de alta tecnologia, trabalhando para encontrar soluções inovadoras de medição, por exemplo, nas áreas de ar condicionado e ventilação, qualidade dos alimentos, tecnologia de construção e controle de emissões.

NO BRASIL 

Presente no Brasil desde 1999, contamos com uma equipe formada por colaboradores qualificados, que desempenham funções nas áreas de vendas, Marketing e serviços para o suporte técnico de todos os equipamentos. Além disso, a empresa se orgulha de ter um laboratório próprio com certificação RBC.

Estamos sediados no interior de São Paulo, na cidade de Campinas, região estratégica e polo de diversas indústrias. Atendemos todo o país através de nosso corpo de vendedores e também através de distribuidores parceiros.

Nosso produtos e serviços contribuem para a garantia da qualidade de diversos processos nos mais variados mercados, promovendo medições precisas aos nossos clientes e qualidade de vida para seus respectivos consumidores.

Name: SHARP CONSUMER ELECTRONICS MEA
Description:
Official page for Consumer Electronics department for Sharp Middle East Fze handling operations for the Middle East, Africa & CIS countries.

SHARP is a 111 year old Japanese technology company with a global presence and regional operations in Middle East, Africa and CIS countries through Sharp Middle East Fze.

Sharp, setup in 1912 in Osaka Japan, is globally trusted brand known for its one-of-a-kind electronic products. Headquartered in Japan with more than 60 globally positioned offices, Sharp leads the world of technology both in R&D & manufacturing of Consumer Electronics, Business Solutions, Micro-Electronics & Solar PV technology. 

Mission:

We shape the future with innovations.
Ever since the establishment in 1912, innovation has been an integral part of our corporate philosophy. Correspondingly, the company's name Sharp is derived from our first major invention made in the year 1915, the “Ever Sharp Pencil”, the first mechanical retractable pencil in the world. 

Our goal has been and will be to win our customers' and partners' confidence through honesty and creativity. We are open to new things and oriented towards our customers' and users' wishes.

Today we are a leading manufacturer of digital information technologies. We not only strive to continually expand our business volume – we are also committed to contributing to the culture and the well-being of people all over the world with our unique, innovative technologies.

We take on responsibility for our environment. 
We think that ecology and economy are inseparably interlinked with each other. Therefore, the protection of the environment is an important part of our business philosophy. We develop eco-friendly products based on cutting-edge technologies. Since, after all, besides innovative power and efficiency, a sense of responsibility and credibility are elementary foundations of our success.

Name: Dialight
Description: Dialight (LSE: DIA.L) is a global leader in sustainable LED lighting for industrial applications. Dialight's LED products are providing the next generation of lighting solutions that deliver reduced energy consumption and create a safer working environment. Our products are specifically designed to provide superior operational performance, reliability and durability, reducing energy consumption and ongoing maintenance and achieving a rapid return on investment. The company is headquartered in the UK with operations in the USA, UK, Denmark, Germany, Malaysia, Singapore, Australia, Mexico and Brazil.  www.dialight.com.

Name: Zennio
Description:
Zennio is a specialist manufacturer of KNX automation solutions for the real estate industry; residential, hotel and commercial buildings with operations in 117 countries.

Zennio’s objective is to improve comfort, security and energy consumption through advanced KNX automation solutions. 

We offer solutions full of subtle and seductive details. A perfect mix of technology, innovation and materials to enjoy maximum functionality and performance. Elegant and balance designs that exceed any expectation.

Zennio's portfolio includes more than 250 CE and KNX certified products. Touch panels, LED lighting, climate, sensors, interfaces, actuators, access control systems, touch switches, video intercom, switches and sockets, and energy saving devices, which are successfully installed in outstanding projects all over the world.

Innovation is at the core of Zennio’s business, and it is delivered through ground-breaking designs, high quality materials and finishes, and outstanding technical functionality and usability.

Name: System Protection (Electrical Engineers & Consultants)
Description:

5. Verification of Protective Relaying Schemes

2. * CT / PT health Analysis through CT ANALYSER

Supply & Installations :

3. Supply of KYORITSU Make Test & Measuring Instruments.
4. Supply of Voltage detectors.

Name: Empa Electronics
Description:
Empa Elektronik, 1981 yılında kurulduğu günden bu yana elektronik bileşen distribütörlüğü için gerekli olan tüm pazarlama, satış, lojistik ve finansal hizmetleri içeren kapsamlı bir teknolojik çözüm tedariği hizmeti sunmakta; sektördeki her inovasyonun içinde süreç hızlandırıcı olarak yer almayı amaçlamaktadır. EMPA ilk 15 yıllık dönemde, bünyesinde oluşturduğu AR-GE ekibi ile; Türkiye’de öncü teknoloji çalıştayları düzenlemiş, ilk TSE standartlı yerli bilgisayarı üretmiş ve elektronik sanayisinin gelişimine önemli katkılarda bulunmuştur.
2000 yılından itibaren Türkiye ve Ortadoğu pazarında bölgesel bir teknik distribütör olarak öne çıkan EMPA, özellikle FPGA ve elektromekanik alanlarında yaptığı yatırımlarla uzay, havacılık ve savunma sanayisinin teknoloji tedariğinde önemli bir rol üstlenmiştir. TESİD Yönetim Kuruluna girişiyle birlikte “Büyük Sıçrama” belgeseline de öncülük ederek, empa:::tech üniversite programlarını hayata geçirmiştir.
2016 yılında kurulan IoT bölümü ile, nesnelerin interneti pazarında Türkiye’nin ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda IT ve elektronik sanayilerini buluşturan projelere başlanmıştır. Bu alandaki hızlı gelişmelere cevaben, 2018 yılında İTÜ ARI Teknokent’te Empa Teknoloji kurulmuştur. Empa Teknoloji’nin bir teknokent projesi olarak geliştirdiği akıllı kovan takip platformu “Hexasense”, bu alanda Türkiye’deki ilk NB-IoT uygulaması olurken sensör, bulut ve uçta yapay zekâ kısımlarıyla EMPA’nın AR-GE faaliyetlerinin derinleşmesini sağlamıştır. Empa Teknoloji 2023 yılında Empa Elektronik ile birleşmiş ve elde edilen birikim EMPA’da “Accelerator Workshop” ve PoC’leri destekleyerek teknoloji tedarik hizmetini zenginleştirmiştir.

Name: Campbell Scientific
Description:
Welcome to our global Campbell Scientific LinkedIn page. This is your source for social media updates from our offices around the world. Please follow us to stay up to date.

As a trusted designer, manufacturer, and seller for 50 years, we have provided research-grade measurement solutions that are used in environmental, infrastructure, and renewable energy applications across the globe. Our worldwide network of offices and partners offers you specialized sales, factory and field services, and support for your location and project. 

Because each measurement application is unique, our highly trained engineers work with our customers to configure systems that address their specific instrumentation needs. Our engineers are supported by the hard work and dedicated efforts of other professionals in various areas of our organization. As a team, we recognize that our customer relationships are our most important work.

We believe that the growth and success of our company is directly related to the growth and performance of our employees. If you would like to join our team, please watch for updates regarding our career opportunities.

Name: R. STAHL Group
Description:
A leading supplier of products, systems and services for explosion protection, R. STAHL offers several decades of experience. Wherever there are explosive gas-air mixtures or dusts, our products prevent explosions. With the highest degree of reliability and quality we ensure the safety of persons, the environment and technology. As a traditional company with more than 80 years' experience in explosion protection, R. STAHL covers all ignition protection classes for the explosion protection of electrical equipment or systems. We are always in a position to design and implement the optimum solution. Our broad product range allows explosion protection ranging from a connection box to a fieldbus system. International certifications, approvals and patents underline our competence and allow our products and systems to be used worldwide.

Imprint - https://r-stahl.com/en/global/footermenu/imprint/
Privacy Policy - https://r-stahl.com/en/global/privacy-policy-social-media-channels

Name: BPM Microsystems
Description:
Imagine being involved in developing a world-class technology product required by every factory that produces electronics in the world! BPM's product development environment is the position that will creatively challenge you every day.

BPM Microsystems produces the most advanced electronic device programming systems in the world. Our products are robotic high-speed instruments that load data patterns into flash memory chips and microcontrollers. Our customers include the world's top manufacturers of smart phones, automotive electronics, consumer electronics, industrial and medical devices as well as component distributors and independent programming centers. Our goal is to promote automation and new advances in programming, enabling customers to become more competitive. Our vertically-integrated factory is located in Houston, Texas.

BPM Microsystems is the leader in device programming equipment provided to the world-wide semiconductor and electronics assembly industries.  BPM Microsystems' mission is to make it easy for our customers to program semiconductors with the highest quality at a competitive cost per device.

Name: Typhoon HIL, Inc.
Description: Typhoon HIL is a technology and market leader in ultra-high fidelity Hardware in the Loop (HIL) solutions for design, testing, and validation of power electronics, microgrids, e-Mobility, EV powertrain software testing, and distribution control and protection systems. Typhoon HIL platform ushered a new era of model-based testing and validation of control software and hardware with its embedded, ultra-high fidelity real-time Hardware in the Loop (HIL) platform. The core technology is based on proprietary numerical algorithms, ultra-low latency application-specific processors, and optimized software architecture. Our HIL systems are widely used by engineers in microgrids, solar PV inverters, wind turbine converters, battery storage, marine power systems, motor drives, automotive, and traction industries to speed up time to market, reduce the cost of testing, and improve quality and reliability.

Name: Forsee Power
Description:
Forsee Power is an industrial group specializing in smart battery systems for sustainable electric transport (light vehicles, off-highway vehicles, buses, trucks, and trains). 
A major player in Europe, Asia and North America, the Group designs, assembles, and supplies energy management systems based on cells that are among the most robust in the market and provides installation, commissioning, and maintenance on site and remotely. 
More than 4,000 buses and 140,000 LEV have been equipped with Forsee Power’s batteries. The Group also offers financing solutions (battery leasing) and second-life solutions for transport batteries. 
Forsee Power and its 850 employees are committed to sustainable development and the Group has obtained the Gold medal from leading sustainability rating agency EcoVadis. For more information: www.forseepower.com | @ForseePower

Forsee Power is listed on the Euronext stock market (FORSE).

Name: Ulusoy Electric
Description:
Ulusoy Elektrik was developed as an engineering company in 1985. As an integrated manufacturing platform for a wide variety of medium voltage electrical equipments for MV electrical distribution networks and industrial plants, it has proven Turkey's dynamic power as a leader in industry and has been at the forefront of its own sector. Ulusoy Elektrik has become one of the leading players in the electromechanical industry. Ulusoy Elektrik has undertaken many successful projects by its proven achievements in the national and international markets, a wide range of high quality products, its sectorial innovations and service quality. 
 
Ulusoy Elektrik conducts its activities in an area of more than 83.000 m² (56.000 m² of which are indoors) at the Ankara ASO First Organised Industrial Zone, Temelli Anatolia Organised Industrial Zone and Indonesia Cikarang Organised Industrial Zone.
 
With a staff of over 700 qualified employees and over 100 specialist engineers, its carries out all of its product design, development, and R & D activities on-site.
 
As a result of major projects, its production capacity and industrial success, Ulusoy Elektrik ranked #364 among "Turkey's Top 500 Industrial Enterprises" survey for the year 2017, published every year by Istanbul Chamber of Industry.  
 
By exporting to more than 70 countries, Ulusoy Elektrik has successfully carried out a worldwide production launch of its medium voltage electricity distribution equipments.
 
Ulusoy Elektrik is a publicly traded company listed on Istanbul Stock Exchange Stars Market as of November, 2014.

Eaton has completed the acquisition of %82,275 of the Ulusoy Elektrik A.S. shares as of April 15, 2019.

Name: Samsung Electronics Romania
Description:
Bine ați venit pe pagina oficială Samsung Electronics România. De peste 70 de ani, suntem aici să creăm o lume mai bună şi să ducem afacerile la nivelul următor prin tehnologie. Name: Peak Scientific
Description:
Peak Scientific is a leading innovator in the design, manufacture and support of high performance gas generators for analytical laboratories. Established in the UK in 1997 near Glasgow (Scotland), where its corporate Headquarters, and high-tech manufacturing and R&D facilities reside, Peak Scientific boasts a significant local presence on every continent – including major operations in North America, China and India.

With nearly two decades of experience in pioneering reliable gas generator technology, Peak Scientific develops market-leading nitrogen, hydrogen and zero air systems mainly for the field of LC-MS (Liquid Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry) and GC (Gas Chromatography).

Our forte is in providing our customers with high quality, dependable gas generation solutions tailored to meet their specific laboratory demands. What differentiates us is our world class technical support and on-going service care throughout the generator’s lifespan, wherever you may be in the world.

With varying flow rates, purities and pressures of gas generators, available with or without internal air compressors, Peak is confident to offer the complete solution to your total gas requirements. Our gas generators provide a safe and economical alternative to combustible bottled gas cylinders, offering a constant purity resulting in accurate analysis. 

Trusted globally, serving locally.
 
There are over 400 people employed at Peak Scientific. Most people are based in our Glasgow (UK) HQ and manufacturing center of excellence where we design and manufacture laboratory gas generators and sell into over 120 countries globally. Increasingly, we are adding more overseas colleagues based in our offices in USA, India, China, Mexico, Brazil, South Africa, France, UAE, Australia and Japan.

Name: Evident Life Science
Description:
Our core product lineup comprises clinical, educational, and research microscopes, digital imaging systems, and analytical instruments. 

Our products are all designed with an unwavering commitment to furthering scientific research; and enhancing the safety, security, quality, and productivity of those we serve. 

Privacy Notice: https://evidentscientific.com/en/legal/privacy

Impressum: https://evidentscientific.com/en/legal/imprint

Name: Color Kinetics
Description: We set creative minds free to explore the unique power of light. Our advanced lighting solutions inspire memorable experiences, create beauty, attract crowds, build brands, and get results. Through our innovations, we’re unlocking the extraordinary potential of light to inspire brighter lives and create a better world.

Name: PRUFTECHNIK Group
Description:
PRUFTECHNIK is a global maintenance technology supplier with a wide product, service and training range tailored to the needs of the maintenance professionals in the areas of shaft alignment, vibration analysis, condition monitoring and nondestructive testing. Many manufacturing organizations worldwide trust in our solutions for the reliability and condition-based maintenance of rotating machinery.

Founded in 1972 by the inventor of modern laser shaft alignment, PRUFTECHNIK is the world leader in precision shaft alignment. intelliSWEEP, Live Move or Live Trend are just a few of the top shaft alignment features developed by PRUFTECHNIK and used every day by alignment specialists around the world to deliver best-in-class alignment jobs. 

Our award-winning systems ROTALIGN, OPTALIGN, PARALIGN or VIBXPERT are built on state-of-the art technology to fulfill the highest requirements in precision and usability. Our latest product addition SONOCHEK rounds up our offline condition monitoring portfolio with uncompromising ultrasound testing capabilities.
With an extended network of subsidiaries and distributors in more than 70 countries, we serve manufacturing organizations locally, all around the world.

On our LinkedIn channel, you will find daily product news, event and training notifications as well as expert knowledge all around alignment, condition monitoring, and nondestructive testing. For a more targeted content delivery, our special focus pages offer the same content filtered out more specifically for alignment, vibration or nondestructive testing professionals.

Please don’t hesitate to leave us a comment, or contact us via our website www.pruftechnik.com. Your local PRUFTECHNIK team will be very happy to help you out.

Name: Lutfi Group of companies
Description:
Welcome to Lutfi Group of Companies, an established organization since 1971, operating in multiple sectors including home appliances, electronics, optical retail, wholesale, manufacturing, and real estate. With a legacy of excellence, we have become synonymous with quality and innovation.

At Lutfi Group, we are driven by a passion for innovation and entrepreneurship. It is at the core of who we are. We continuously strive to push boundaries, explore new avenues, and create unique opportunities in the industries we operate in.

Our expertise spans across various sectors, from retailing and wholesale distribution of home appliances, electronics, and optical products, to manufacturing high-quality goods. With a focus on meeting the diverse needs of our customers, we ensure that our products and services are of the highest standards.

Additionally, Lutfi Group of Companies has expanded into the real estate sector, offering exceptional properties and solutions for both residential and commercial purposes. We aim to provide our clients with the finest real estate options, backed by our in-depth market knowledge and commitment to customer satisfaction.

With an experienced team of dedicated professionals, we foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and excellence. We believe in empowering our employees, encouraging them to think creatively and embrace new challenges. Together, we strive to deliver outstanding results and drive growth across all our ventures.

Join us at Lutfi Group of Companies to be part of a dynamic organization that values innovation, entrepreneurship, and the pursuit of excellence. Connect with us to explore exciting opportunities and experience the Lutfi Group difference.

Name: nVent Electrical & Fastening Solutions
Description:
We are a global leader in electrical components for electrical protection, rail and transit connectivity, telecom installation, and utility and industrial facility electrical installation systems. Our products connect and protect our customers’ systems in facilities where the cost of failure is very high. We help customers enhance productivity and reduce their cost of ownership by simplifying installation and minimizing downtime during operation. 

Our portfolio of products serves a range of industries, including industrial, energy, residential & commercial and infrastructure. Brand names include nVent CADDY, ERICO, HOFFMAN, ILSCO and SCHROFF.

Name: IEC - Israel Electric Corporation חברת החשמל לישראל בע"מ
Description:
The Israel Electric Corporation (IEC) is a public, government company,  99.85% of its shares are government-owned and traded on the Tel-Aviv and Singapore stock exchange. Company activities include: generation,  transmission,   transformation, distribution, supply and sale of electricity. 

IEC owns and operates 15 power stations with 50 generating units: 16 steam-driven, 25 gas turbines and 9 combined-cycle units. IEC’s installed capacity stood at 10,955 MW.

IEC supplies reliable and high-quality electricity, complies with leading service standards, maintaining economic, commercial and environmental principles. IEC employs 10,716 workers and provides service to 3 million customers (update as of December 31, 2022).

Name: i-charging
Description:
i-charging is a technology company focusing on electric vehicle charging infrastructure.  

We develop innovative hardware and software solutions that optimize our customer's operations, smooth user experience and the electric grid utilization.  

Our team is composed of experienced professionals who have gathered years of expertise, providing in-depth knowledge in the sector, both on technology and market.  

We want to be a global reference in the e-mobility sector, providing a distinctive offer and generating value for the community.

Name: Miraco
Description:
Miraco is the leading company in the field air conditioning and Refrigeration.

In 1976, Miraco (MISR REFRIGERATION & AIR CONDITIONING MFG. Co. S.A.E) was founded as a joint stock company by its Chairman Adel Barakat, who has been in the industry over 44 years. The original factory, built in 1979 in Abu Rewash, was 5,400 m2 and had a production capacity of 2,000 Boxes per year with a total workforce of 250 employees. In 1992, Miraco signed a joint venture agreement with Carrier Corporation. Since then, Miraco Carrier has become the largest heating, ventilation, and air conditioning company in Africa. In 2010 Midea joined (Carrier 37.5%, Midea 32.5%) and In 2019 Midea share increased to be 51%. Today, Factory operates with cutting-edge manufacturing technology and boasts a total working space exceeding 90,000 square meters. Since its humble beginnings in 1976, our production capacity has grown to over 1 million boxes per year, supported by a dedicated workforce of more than 1,400 employees. Miraco is a leading name in the Egyptian market, known for its quality manufacturing, distribution, HVAC contracting, commercial refrigeration, and service divisions. We have the largest dealership network in the country and the largest Air-condition service organization.

Miraco GOAL 
OUR GOAL is to remain the leading producer and supplier of world class air conditioning and refrigeration products and services. As judged by our customers.

 
Miraco Mission 
Our mission is to remain the leading producer and supplier for the Air conditioning and Refrigeration industry in Egypt by providing world-class products and services and achieve the highest customer satisfaction.

Name: VoltasBeko
Description:
Voltas Beko was established in 2017 between Voltas Limited and Beko. Voltas is a well-known Indian multinational company specializing in air conditioning, refrigeration, and engineering solutions. Beko, a part of the Arçelik Group is a leading global manufacturer of home appliances.

The products offered by Voltas Beko are known for their innovative features, technological advancements, and energy efficiency. The joint venture leverages Arçelik’s expertise in manufacturing home appliances and Voltas’ understanding of the Indian market’s specific requirements.

Voltas Beko range of appliances has technology features to take care of your everyday needs.

Name: PCBWay
Description:
PCBWay has specialized in PCB prototype, small and medium batch production. It was founded in 2014, and we are constantly growing.  With over 15 years’ professional experiences and advanced manufacturing capabilities of our factories, in the past 4 years, our products have been well marketed in 150 countries and used by 250,000 clients around the world. 

PCBWay key highlights:

1. Quality assurance & Cost-effective: At the beginning of 2018, we’ve spent $2,000,000 in ordering a whole set of Surface Treatment Equipment Automatic Copper Production Line. We’ve also adopted the most used testing and inspecting equipment in the industry, such as Flying Probe Tester, X-Ray Inspection Machine, Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) Machine. 

With our 5 PCB & PCBA factories in Shenzhen, our pricing is transparent without extra fee, which is very competitive.

2. One-stop online self quote-order system (you just need to fill in the information for a free quotation), with 24h/7d online customer service.

3.  Headquarter in Hangzhou, business office in Paris which provides direct service and a good communication for our clients.

4.  With more than 70 persons in senior management team and senior engineer team, 50 persons in commercial team and 500 persons in professional production team, our vision is to help engineers and companies build more amazing projects and bring their ideas to life.

Name: Spectris
Description:
Spectris combines precision with purpose, delivering progress for a more sustainable world. We provide critical insights to our customers through premium precision measurement solutions combined with technical expertise and deep domain knowledge. 

Precision is at the heart of what we do - our leading, high-tech instruments and software equip our customers to solve some of their greatest  challenges to make the world cleaner, healthier and more productive. 

We are focused on two key divisions – Spectris Scientific and Spectris Dynamics, which are placed in technology-driven end  markets, with strong fundamentals and attractive growth trajectories.

Name: Amphenol Aerospace

Our connector products include circular, rectangular, filter, fiber optic, hermetic, rack and panel, board level, flex, rigid flex along with printed circuit boards, backplane systems and integrated systems. We also design custom solutions for your application, call us today!

Name: Square D by Schneider Electric
Description: Square D Company manufactures and markets electrical power distribution and control systems and services. The company provides automation, circuit protection, electrical distribution, machine control, motor control, and power management solutions. Square D Company offers its products to residential, commercial, industrial, and original equipment manufacture markets. The company was founded in 1902 as McBride Manufacturing Co. and changed its name to Fuse and Manufacturing Co. in 1908. It further changed its name to Square D Company in 1917. The company is headquartered in Palatine, Illinois. Square D Company operates as subsidiary of Schneider Electric SA.

Name: Sager Electronics
Description: Sager Electronics, a wholly owned subsidiary of TTI Inc., is a North American distributor of Interconnect, Power, and Electromechanical products and custom solutions provider. Grounded in over 135 years of innovation and service, Sager Electronics provides customers and suppliers a unique combination of operational excellence and innovative business solutions through its Distributing Confidence business model. Headquartered in Middleborough, MA, Sager Electronics operates a national network of field sales representatives and power systems sales engineers, strategically located service centers across North America, two distribution centers totaling over 218,000 sq. ft., and a 47,000 sq. ft. value-add Custom Solutions Center located in Lewisville, TX. To learn more about Sager, visit www.sager.com

Name: Al Abdulkarim Holding Company
Description: Al Abdulkarim Holding Co. (AKHC) is the largest distributor for electrical materials and systems solution provider in Saudi Arabia.  We have been leading the field of electrical distribution for the past forty (40) years with our strong team of sales and technical professionals. We have been the partner in building iconic structures throughout the kingdom and our presence in the different sectors of the government like building, industry, infrastructure, and energy is widely felt and seen.  Throughout the years, we have branched out rapidly and we have crossed borders as a group to the different regions of the gulf.  Thus, we belong to the top 100 companies in Saudi Arabia.

Name: TMEIC India
Description:
TMEIC Corporation, a 50-50 joint venture between Japan’s Toshiba Corporation and Mitsubishi Electric Corporation formed in 2003, is a global leader in rotating machines, power electronics and automation technologies that enables industrial, commercial and utility customers to enhance their performance while lowering environmental impact. TMEIC, with its headquarters in Tokyo, Japan, operates around the globe through its subsidiaries and Group companies and employs more than 3,500 people worldwide.

TMEIC Industrial Systems India Pvt. Ltd. (TMEIC India), a 100% owned subsidiary of TMEIC Japan, has its corporate office in Bengaluru and manufacturing facilities in Tumakuru, Karnataka, for design, engineering, manufacturing and testing of PV inverters, variable frequency drives, electric motors, large UPS systems and BESS. 

TMEIC India produces large capacity ground mount central inverters with single unit upto 2,550 kW capacity in its state of the art manufacturing facility in Tumakuru near Bengaluru. This plant is capable of shipping upto 4GW of Inverters / year / shift, not only to Indian sites, but also to the global customers in Japan & USA. TMEIC also produces MV VFD systems upto 15,000 kW capacity, Large UPS systems upto 1,800 KW capacity and Induction Motors of upto 20,000 kW capacity in India. TMEIC’s green factory in Tumkuru has achieved Carbon & Water neutrality through Rain water harvesting, zero discharge, natural air ventilators & lighting and in-house solar power generation of 1,000 kWp.

Name: Power Center- مركز القوى الكهربائية
Description:
Power Center Factory is a reputed "Medium/Low Voltage Switchgear , manufacture in the kingdom of Saudi Arabia, made in accordance with latest IEC standards & established in 1990 to meet current digital technologies using IOT platform to deliver enhanced efficiency, reliability and safety, of growing contraction industries demand of electrical distribution systems in production & control filed.

Name: Binghalib Group of Companies
Description:
Established in 1982, The Bin Ghalib Group of Companies is a U.A.E based organization having more than 3 decades of experience and presence in the market. With 13 companies in it's portfolio, The Bin Ghalib Group has channel partnership with leading OEM brands across the world in various areas of business mainly focusing in Electrical Engineering.

Established as a LV Switchgear manufacturing company, Bin Ghalib Group today offers services in 2-way Wireless Communication, Electrical Contracting, Trading, Instrumentation & Calibration, ERP Software, Building & Home Automation, Industrial Automation and more.

Further, the company has diversified it's portfolio across industries including manufacturing Control Valves, UPVC Windows and Doors, Fly screen & Roller shutters. 

Launching "Ghalib-1" satellite, The UAE's first satellite to track wildlife which is name after our CEO Mr. Mohamed Bin Ghalib; Bin Ghalib Group is ever expanding and has reached the skies.

Name: Nortek
Description:
Nortek excels in the development and manufacture of acoustic Doppler instrumentation. Doppler Velocity Logs (DVLs) are used for subsea navigation. Acoustic Doppler Current Profilers (ADCPs) are used to understand physical processes in the ocean, rivers, lakes and laboratories.

We pride ourselves on being innovative in product development and production processes. Nortek provides solutions to engineers and scientists by offering real-time data collection and support from our responsive technical team.

Name: Vicor
Description: Vicor Corporation designs, develops, manufactures and markets modular power components and complete power systems based upon a portfolio of patented technologies.  Headquartered in Andover, Massachusetts, Vicor sells its products to the power systems market, including enterprise and high performance computing, industrial equipment and automation, telecommunications and network infrastructure, vehicles and transportation, aerospace and defense.

Name: Claypaky
Description:
Claypaky is a world level reference brand in the sector of professional lighting systems. The wide range of Clay Paky products includes moving body and moving mirror projectors, color-changers, followspots, projectors for architectural lighting and various lighting effects.
We are known throughout the world as they have changed the way of putting on spectacular shows and continue to be first as regards the extraordinary performances, the imagination and variety of the effects, the precise focus, purity of the light beam and movement precision. Over the course of its history the Company has been awarded a total of 35 prestige international prizes, recognitions of the innovation and quality of its products and manufacturing processes.
The professional sectors using Clay Paky light effects are: Theatre, Television, Live Events, Discotheques and Clubs, Trade Fair Exhibitions, Theme Parks, Shops, Commercial Centres, Conference, Industrial Presentations, Car Showrooms and many other sectors in the show business and architectural lighting fields.
The company takes part in 25 important international trade fairs in the sector which include all the major countries of Europe, Asia, America and Australia and are part of the principal Associations in its own manufacturing division.

Name: ATLBattery India

RAB Lighting is committed to creating high quality, affordable, well designed and energy efficient LED lighting and controls that make it easy for distributors to sell, electricians to install and end-users to save energy.

Founded in 1946, RAB has a vibrantly growing infrastructure of manufacturing facilities and engineering capabilities that ensure great product design and quality.

In addition to great products, RAB also provides free lighting design services to anyone who needs assistance. Feel free to reach out to us on the phone, by email or on our website and we will do our best to help!

Name: SIMCO Electronics
Description:
SIMCO Electronics is a leading provider of calibration, repair, and software services for manufacturing, life science, and technology organizations. 

SIMCO’s network of calibration labs and CERDAAC cloud software provides lean, life-saving quality to thousands of companies including the top 10 U.S. biomedical manufacturers and 9 of the top 10 U.S. aerospace and defense manufacturers. 

SIMCO helps customers increase quality and reduce costs by offering a complete, integrated set of instrument calibration, repair, and software services.  SIMCO services a broad range of scientific equipment from hundreds of manufacturers, with service available at the customer's site or through SIMCO’s worldwide network of accredited laboratories.  

SIMCO’s CERDAAC cloud software helps companies dramatically improve their calibration, maintenance, repair, facility, compliance, and quality programs. 

Founded in 1962, SIMCO is committed to being “the standard for quality service” by providing award-winning customer service, innovative lean practices, and accredited technical expertise.  SIMCO has received calibration industry leadership awards for 8 consecutive years from Frost & Sullivan, including the 2021 Global Customer Value Leadership Award. 

SIMCO offers exciting career opportunities for professionals in metrology and calibration, software, sales, customer service, and other disciplines.  To see SIMCO’s open positions, please view the listings below or visit www.simco.com.

Name: Gira
Description:
We are Gira. We are the ones with the switches. But we’re so much more. Future-oriented. Certified. Responsible.

We‘re the guardians, innovators, smart home pioneers, developers, systems thinkers, KNX partners, shapers of the future, patent masters, award winners and designers.

But above all, we’re the ones who listen. To you.

We will always work our hardest to find the best solution for you. With service, design and performance made in Germany. Because that is what we stand for. And have been standing for since 1905.

Name: Standex Electronics
Description:
Standex Electronics is a global leader in mission‑critical electronic components, bringing together decades of engineering expertise and customer partnerships to power innovation across industries. As the platform company of Standex Detect, Standex Edge, and Standex Grid, we provide solutions that touch nearly every sector, from smart home to aerospace, from transportation to the electrical grid.

What began as a single precision manufacturing operation has evolved into a diversified global platform with three complementary operating divisions.

Standex Detect – switching and sensing technologies for various applications
Standex Edge – magnetics solutions for power, performance, and efficiency
Standex Grid – instrument transformers and grid solutions for utilities and OEMs

Over the years, we’ve expanded our capabilities through strategic acquisitions and organic growth, building a strong portfolio of brands, products, and services while maintaining a unified commitment to quality, engineering excellence, and customer intimacy.

We design and manufacture high‑reliability components that keep industries moving forward.

Our product portfolio includes:

Switching and Sensing Technologies – reed switches, relays, and sensors
Magnetics Solutions – transformers, inductors, planar power solutions
Grid Solutions – low and medium voltage instrument transformers, bushings, and related products

Our deep vertical integration allows us to provide consistent quality, rapid prototyping, and innovative design tailored to the most demanding applications.

Name: Teledyne Marine
Description: Teledyne Marine is a group of leading-edge undersea technology companies that have been assembled by Teledyne Technologies Incorporated. For a full list of companies in the Teledyne Marine group and to learn more about our wide array of sub-sea solutions, visit www.teledynemarine.com.

Name: Evostel (Previously AQESA)
Description:
Evostel (previously AQESA), is part of the Ali Zaid Al Quraishi & Brothers Company (AZAQ Group), a closed joint stock company with a diversified investment portfolio. The Group takes pride in its Saudi roots and has been successfully operating in the GCC region for over 60 years. The Group has long-established associations and strategic relationships with a number of well-known international names. 

Evostel is led by Mr. Jay Patel (MD) who is supported by a team of well-qualified team of executives from all over the globe.

To be a pioneer total solutions provider in the fields of electrical, mechanical, water, and oil & gas services and to be among the top leading Industrial Groups in the Arabian Peninsula.

Name: ROBUS Lighting
Description:
Designing and manufacturing LED Lighting products under the ROBUS brand, the LED Group was established in Dublin in 1984 by Michael Slein.  The LED Group is committed to meeting the needs of today's wholesalers and contractors through the ROBUS range of commercial, residential and retail fittings.
We currently employ over 250 people worldwide, bringing a wide range of lighting solutions to your door in Ireland, the UK, Australasia, Europe and South Africa.

An Irish owned company, our headquarters are in Dublin where we have a Robus Visitor Centre and 100,000 sq ft purpose built warehousing and distribution centre stocking 25,000 pallets of over 1,000 leading products, distributed worldwide.  We also have a sales office in the UK with a team of 35 directly employed personnel.  Our Australian HQ is based in Brisbane and we have offices in China.
Over the past 35 years we have continually invested in new technology and quality people to join our expanding team.  Our people uphold the LED Group core values of accountability, ambition, empowerment, customer focus and fast pace.  This, combined with long-term partnership with our stockists has allowed us to evolve into a market leading company. 

The ROBUS range of products integrates new technologies with an emphasis on high performance LED's, focusing on energy savings and functionality.

WHY CHOOSE ROBUS:

- Researched & developed with contractors
- Quick & easy to install
- Low maintenance
- High quality & reliability
- 2-5 year warranties
- Over 35 years servicing the electrical industry
- 10 years manufacturing LED lighting
- Experienced team, available on site 


We're proud of what we do and we strive to create profitable business relationships with our customers.
If you already a stockist then please accept our heartfelt appreciation for your continued support.
If you are a new customer or prospective employee please do get in touch - we look forward to hearing from you.

Name: Amphenol TPC Wire & Cable
Description:
Amphenol TPC Wire & Cable delivers value to its customers by providing innovative and abuse-resistant wire and cable solutions. For over four decades, we have been a leading industrial supplier of high-performance solutions designed to withstand abuse from impact, abrasion, continuous flexing, caustic chemicals, and extreme temperatures for a wide range of industries. Our customers avoid unplanned downtime by using high-quality, high-performance wire and cable products that won't need constant replacement from damage or wear.

We work closely with our customers to provide specific MRO and OEM supply chain solutions, including custom-designed wire and cable products and in-house engineering expertise. We can tackle your toughest application challenges to create a customized solution perfect for you.

The wire, cable, and connector products we sell are designed specifically for use in harsh industrial environments and include:
-	Wire and cable
-	Cable Management 
-	Cable Assemblies
-	Cordsets
-       Electrical Components 
-	Custom Solutions

But we don’t just sell industrial wire and cable. We solve problems. The most valuable resource we have to offer our customers is our in-house engineering team, experts in the field with the insight, expertise, and experience to collaborate with you on affordable, just-right solutions.

Name: KHIND Malaysia
Description:
Our journey began in 1961 in the small town of Sekinchan, driven by a mission to bring prosperity and convenience to the community.

Our founder, Mr. Cheng King Fa, started with humble beginnings — running a small electrical appliance repair shop. With dedication, vision, and the support of his pioneering team, he built Kee Hin Industries. Through perseverance, lessons learned from hard-earned experiences, and a series of pivotal moments, they transformed the business into Khind Holdings Berhad — a multinational electrical and electronic appliances company now distributing to over 58 countries worldwide.

Name: Tata Cummins
Description: Tata Cummins Manufacturer of x15 efficiency truck engine, isx12 for heavy duty truck engine & isx15 for heavy duty truck engine in Baramati, Maharashtra.

Name: Helvar
Description:
INTELLIGENT LIGHTING SOLUTIONS
At Helvar we create intelligent and energy-saving lighting solutions. Intelligent lighting is essential to the wellbeing of employees, customers, visitors, patients… and helps you to achieve your sustainability targets. Helvar lighting control solutions help to create smart environments built for the future, using information and working seamlessly with other systems. With a wide range of lighting control solutions and luminaire components, we design open and flexible solutions for lighting to suit your specific needs. We pride ourselves on being lighting experts - you can find our solutions in all sorts of places - offices, schools, hotels, hospitals among many others. 

GLOBAL PRESENCE 
Our headquarters are located in Finland, as are our luminaire component development and manufacturing operations. Our lighting control competence centre is in England. Worldwide, we serve our customers locally by our sales offices and our global network of partners in over 50 countries. To learn more, please visit www.helvar.com.

Name: Living Things
Description:
Living Things is a pioneering IoT platform by iCapotech Pvt Ltd, dedicated to accelerating the net zero journey towards a sustainable future. We bring mindfulness in energy usage by our platform.
Our solution seamlessly integrates with existing air conditioners, empowering businesses & organisations to optimise & reduce energy usage, enhance operational efficiency, reduce carbon footprints, and drive sustainable practices. By harnessing the power of real-time data analytics and intelligent insights, our energy saving algorithm helps in saving a minimum of 15% on Air Conditioner’s energy consumption.

As a result, the Motwane brand has earned the trust of clients, over the last 100 years with its innovative, energy-efficient, and user-friendly solutions.

Name: IPG Photonics GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
IPG Photonics is the leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance fiber lasers and amplifiers for diverse applications in numerous markets. IPG Photonics diverse lines of low, medium and high-power lasers and amplifiers are used in materials processing, entertainment, medical, biotechnology, scientific and advanced applications. Our products are displacing traditional technologies in many current applications and enabling new applications for lasers.

The Company is leveraging its brand and position as a pioneer and leader in developing and commercializing fiber lasers and amplifiers increasing its market share in the broader markets. IPG lasers continue to displace traditional lasers in many existing applications due to their superior performance and value. Quite simply, IPG's products are disrupting the market by empowering tomorrow's applications today.

IPG's highly vertically-integrated development and manufacturing capabilities enable the Company to meet customer requirements, accelerate development, manage costs and improve component yields, while maintaining high performance and quality standards. 

IPG is a global company with manufacturing facilities in the U.S., Germany, Russia and Italy, and regional sales offices in China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, India, Turkey, Brazil, Mexico, Singapore, Spain, Poland, Czech Republic, Canada, and the United Kingdom. The Company sells its products globally to OEMs, system integrators and end users in a wide range of diverse markets that have the in-house engineering capability to integrate IPG's products into their own systems.

Name: Perkons SA
Description:
A Perkons é uma empresa especializada em tecnologia para segurança e gestão integrada de tráfego. Tem experiência em fiscalização eletrônica de trânsito e foi pioneira neste mercado no país com a invenção da lombada eletrônica em 1992.
Hoje, tem atuação voltada para o desenvolvimento de produtos e projetos que ofereçam soluções tanto para a segurança quanto para gestão completa do trânsito. A experiência acumulada nestes 20 anos permite à empresa oferecer um mix de produtos e serviços que auxiliam os gestores públicos no planejamento urbano e gestão de tráfego. Entre as expertises da empresa está a elaboração de estudos e projetos que auxiliam na tomada de decisões para a conquista de um trânsito mais fluido e seguro. Todo o trabalho desenvolvido pela empresa tem base em uma estrutura tecnológica para o acompanhamento do trânsito em tempo real, fiscalização de infrações, contagem de fluxo e identificação da frota por categoria e tamanho. A reunião dessas informações oferece aos gestores um raio x geral do trânsito e do comportamento do motorista.

Name: INNOLUX群創光電
Description:
Company Overview
Originally established in 2003 and publicly listed in 2006. The company merged with Chi Mei Optoelectronics and Toppoly Optoelectronics in March 2010, in what was the largest merger in the flat panel display industry. Chimei Innolux Corporation was the successor company, and it initially preserved the Chimei name. In order to differentiate itself from the ChiMei brand, the company was renamed "Innolux Corporation" in December 2012.

Main products
Innolux's 14 plants in Taiwan possess a complete range of 3.5G, 4G, 4.5G, 5G, 6G, and 7.5G-8.5G production line, making it the world's total display solutions provider offering a full range of large/medium/small LCD panels and touch-control screens.Innolux offers advanced display integration solutions employing innovative, differentiated technology, including 4K2K ultra-high resolution, 3D naked eye, IGZO, LTPS, AMOLED, OLED, and touch-control solutions. Innolux is active in drafting specifications, and is a market trend leader. Its all-inclusive product lines span the full range of TFT LCD panel modules and touch panels, including TV panels, desktop monitors, notebook computer panels, small and medium-sized panels, and medical and automotive panels. The world's leading manufacturer of TFT-LCD displays, Innolux supplies customers that include many of the world's leading information and consumer electronics manufacturers.

群創光電在台灣有14個廠，擁有3.5G、4G、4.5G、5G、6G、7.5G到8.5G最完整的各世代生產線，是全球唯一擁有完整大中小尺寸LCD面板、及觸控面板的一條龍全方位顯示器提供者。

群創光電以創新及差異化技術提供先進顯示器整合方案，包括4K2K超高解析度、3D裸眼、IGZO、LTPS、AMOLED、OLED、以及觸控解決方案等，制定規格，引領市場趨勢。廣泛的產品線更是橫跨各式TFT LCD液晶面板模組、觸控模組，例如:電視用面板、桌上型監視器與筆記型電腦用面板、中小尺吋面板、醫療用、車用面板等，供應全球尖端資訊與消費電子客戶，為世界TFT-LCD（薄膜電晶體液晶顯示器）領導廠商。

群創光電立足台灣，放眼全球，身為全球光電產業鏈的火車頭，群創光電深具責任與義務，積極延攬及培育研發專才，奠定世界光電產業的領導地位。群創光電致力提昇人類視覺極致享受，以「不能被模仿的競爭力」作為企業永續經營動能，以期達到股東、客戶、員工滿意與全民最大福祉。
Location: 苗栗縣, 新竹科學工業園區

Name: Riello UPS
Description:
RIELLO UPS is one of the leading European company for single and three phases UPS on the range from 400 VA to 6400 kVA.

Riello UPS part of  the Riello Elettronica Group
Backed by 20 year’s experience, Riello Elettronica is the parent of a group of companies which operate in a number of sectors, Information Technology, Electronics, Telecommunications, Automation, Sensors, Domotics.
Its business is focussed on the conversion of energy for industrial and civil applications. It is the European leader in the production of UPS systems (Uninterruptible Power Supply) under the brand name of Riello UPS. These systems guarantee the continuous supply of power to computers, electromedical and industrial equipment and radar and telecommunication systems. Riello Elettronica also operates in the automation and industrial and home security sector alongside international partners such as AVS Electronics, Telcoma Automation, Innovatech Sweethome and Ceimu.

The objective of RIELLO UPS is to supply global solutions that guarantee power quality; through R&D investments and the manufacture of resilient and efficient products.
Power Quality can be defined using two parameters:
• Continuity - guaranteeing a stable and secure electrical supply
• Quality - in terms of frequency, voltage, waveform and energy efficiency
Riello UPS provides value added in the form of Power Quality – its extensive product range guarantees that the company has an energy solution for any critical application.

Name: STANLEY ELECTRIC CO., LTD.
Description:
Stanley Electric is an electrical manufacturer with a large share in the automotive lighting and electronic equipment fields that celebrated its 100th anniversary in December 2020. We offer a wide range of products related to optoelectronics, including automotive headlamps, LEDs for automotive and consumer use, LED lighting, displays, optical sensors, etc. 
One of our strength is the end to end manufacturing process, we produce everything from light sources to lamps and control systems offering an optimal lineup for each product and application. 
As professionals who specialize in handling light, we are thoroughly dedicated to “manufacturing” and create products by maximizing the synergistic effects of our expertise in both automotive equipment and electronic device businesses.
In terms of business scale, Stanley Electric generated sales of 382.5 billion yen in 2021. We have more than 30 group companies with over 17,000 employees worldwide.

In recent years, we have focused on the UV business, launching a deep UV germicidal lamp in 2010, and continuing to evolve in the deep UV field with both lamps and LED devices and units.
We believe that the Stanley Group’s social significance lies in boundless pursuit of the value of light and in discovering the infinite possibilities of light with contributions to society by way of creating and providing value through our technologies and products.

Name: Hengtong Group
Description:
Hengtong Group is an international enterprise with a diverse range of expertise covering optical fibre, power, marine and offshore cable, EPC turnkey service and maintenance, as well as IoT, big data and e-commerce, emerging materials and new energy.

As the largest optical fibre and power cable manufacturer in China， and ranking among the top 3 optical fibre communication enterprises in the world, Hengtong accounts for approximately 25% of the Chinese market share and 15% of the international market share. In 2024, it ranks 156th on the list of the top 500 enterprises of China.

Hengtong has over 70 wholly-owned companies and holding companies (5 of which are listed on the Shanghai, Shenzhen, Hong Kong and Indonesian stock exchanges), with 12 manufacturing facilities and 9 sales companies based in Europe, North America, South America, Africa, South Asia and Southeast Asia. It operates sales offices in over 40 countries and regions around the world, supplying products to over 150 countries and regions.

With various innovation platforms (national enterprise technology center, academician workstation, post-doctoral scientific research stations, etc.), Hengtong continuously achieves breakthroughs in key technologies in the fields of optical fiber communication, ultra-high voltage submarine cable and semiconductor materials. 

Committed to sustainable development and carbon emission reduction, Hengtong has set the target of reaching carbon peak by 2028 and carbon neutrality by 2045. It adheres to the pathway of circular economy transformation, practices the concept of recycling and utilization, and realizes the win-win situation of ecological and economic benefits.

Name: NOVEMP - Painéis elétricos e barramentos blindados
Description:
Na NOVEMP, a energia elétrica é o nosso negócio, e nossa paixão é criar soluções que conectam pessoas, empresas e comunidades com segurança e eficiência. Desde 2001, oferecemos um portfólio completo de produtos e serviços para atender às mais diversas necessidades de controle e distribuição elétrica no Brasil. Nosso diferencial está na combinação de qualidade superior, tecnologia de ponta e experiência técnica para entregar resultados que superam expectativas.

Com sede em São Bernardo do Campo (SP), operamos em um moderno galpão de 13 mil m², estrategicamente localizado para garantir a agilidade de nossas operações e o atendimento rápido e eficiente a clientes de todo o país. Somos especialistas em painéis e quadros elétricos, barramentos blindados e resistores de aterramento, além de desenvolvermos soluções personalizadas para projetos de alta complexidade, sempre focados em oferecer máxima segurança e desempenho.

Nossa equipe, composta por mais de 200 colaboradores altamente capacitados, é liderada pelos nossos diretores Anício Cabral e Edson Cabral, que trazem uma visão estratégica orientada para a inovação e a excelência operacional. Acreditamos que investir em pessoas é investir no futuro, por isso, promovemos constantes treinamentos, palestras e capacitações internas para manter nosso time atualizado com as últimas tendências do mercado e preparado para qualquer desafio.

Com mais de duas décadas de trajetória, nosso compromisso com a qualidade e a durabilidade de cada produto faz da NOVEMP uma referência sólida no setor elétrico. Atendemos a um portfólio diversificado de clientes, incluindo grandes instaladoras e indústrias, ajudando-os a construir e operar sistemas elétricos robustos e eficientes.

Estamos constantemente evoluindo e ampliando nossas soluções para atender à crescente demanda por sistemas elétricos mais inteligentes e sustentáveis. Nosso foco é entregar valor agregado, com soluções que vão além do fornecimento de equipamentos.

Name: Bticino de México
Description:

Name: Speedgoat
Description:
Driven to support acceleration of technological and scientific breakthroughs for the benefit of future generations.
 
Speedgoat is connecting Simulink control designs and plant simulations with the physical world, enabling rapid innovation and automated testing of complex real-time control systems in a more electrified and AI enabled autonomous world.
 
Core real-time simulation and testing workflows supported include Rapid Control Prototyping, Bypassing, XCP Monitoring and Calibration, Restbus Simulation, Hardware-in-the-Loop Simulation, Hybrid Physical/Digital and Digital Twins, Virtual Commissioning, Predictive Maintenance, and related Test Automation.

Innovating sustainable lighting solutions for a brighter future.

Thorlux Lighting is a globally recognised manufacturer of luminaires and lighting control systems.

Headquartered in Worcestershire, UK, its modern 16,882 m² factory is just a few miles from where Frederick William Thorpe first manufactured Thorlux luminaires in 1936. Thorlux proudly manufactures over 90% of its products in the Midlands, employing over five hundred people locally.

Thorlux is a complete lighting solutions partner, a single point of contact for luminaires, controls, design, installation, and more. Sustainability and environmental care are written in the organisation’s DNA, with a 2040 net-zero greenhouse gas emissions target.

As part of the FW Thorpe Plc Group, Thorlux remains family-driven, with the Thorpe family actively involved in the organisation. Nearly ninety years after its foundation, Thorlux remains at the forefront of efficient, high-quality lighting technology.

Name: Haier Electric Egypt Limited
Description:
Welcome to Haier!

Haier was founded in 1984. In the last 28 years, through its entrepreneurial and innovative spirit, Haier transformed itself from an insolvent collectively-owned factory on the brink of bankruptcy into the No. 1 global home appliance brand. In 2012, Haier’s global revenue and profit reached 25.8 billion USD and 1.42 billion USD respectively. Profit growth was 2.5 times revenue growth. Based on the statistics of Euromonitor International, a world leader in strategy research for consumer markets, Haier has been the No. 1 global home appliance brand four years in a row. On the 2012 “World’s 50 Most Innovative Companies” list released by the Boston Consulting Group, Haier is the only Chinese company in the top 10 and the No. 1 consumer product retailer.

Haier is known for disruptive innovation in its product solutions and management model. As an open platform company, Haier provides leading home appliance solutions to its users. Qingdao Haier (SH: 600690) uses disruptive innovation to create smart appliances for its users with the aim of becoming the leader and game changer in the home appliance industry.

Name: FRAMOS
Description:
FRAMOS is the leading camera module design and manufacturing expert.

Founded in Munich, Germany over 40 years ago, FRAMOS has empowered companies worldwide to make drones fly safely, enable robots to see and think, make diagnostics faster and more affordable, boost athletic performance with AI, and countless other innovations.

FRAMOS stands for best-in-class image quality, an open-source approach, and fast, easy integration – helping customers launch products quicker and stay ahead of the competition.

With strong expertise in electronics design, optics and optical assembly, camera calibration, image tuning, and software integration, FRAMOS provides off-the-shelf camera modules and customized embedded vision solutions. At our technology campus strategically located in Europe, we combine R&D and manufacturing services under one roof and provide scalable manufacturing capacities up to millions of pieces.

Name: Masibus Automation And Instrumentation Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
About Masibus
Masibus started its journey in 1975 in India and is recognized as one of the premier industrial automation solution providers offering products, solutions and services to customers within the country and across the globe. Masibus’ goal is to globally provide innovative industrial automation solutions, outstanding customer service and solutions in ODM, SCADA, PLC, DCS platforms and Panel manufacturing.

Masibus is part of the Sonepar Group
Sonepar is an independent family-owned company standing as the world leader in B-to-B distribution of electrical equipment, solutions, and services. In 2023, Sonepar achieved sales of €33.3 billion. Present in 40 countries with a dense network of brands, the Group is leading an ambitious transformation to make its customers’ lives easier providing them with an omnichannel experience and sustainable solutions in the building, industry, and energy markets. Sonepar’s 45 000 associates are committed to accelerating the world’s electrification and driven by a shared Purpose: Powering Progress for Future Generations. www.sonepar.com

Name: Safe Line Group of Companies
Description:
Safe Line Group started its endearing journey in the year 2000 in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. Since then the company has grown from strength to strength and today Safe Line is a multi-million-dollar corporate group with branches across all parts of UAE. Safe Line is an ISO certified company, we are committed to maintain the high standard of quality in all aspects of business and to continually satisfy the expectations of our customers.
 
Safe line meets the growing demand for high quality electrical and mechanical materials, tools for engineering progress in Power Plants and Oil fields with product ranging from Cables & Wires, Cable accessories, Earthing and lightning protection system, Switch gear and Luminaires.

Safe line owns some of the prestigious and dominant brands in Rubber cable, Lights, Cable Glands and Cable Lugs range of products.
 
Safe Line Group has specialized divisions for Switchgear assembling, MEP contracting and Lighting. Safe Line Switchgear is a Dual ASTA certified Panel builder in the region with ADDC and AADC approvals. Our MEP contracting division is one of the reputed and leading MEP contractors in the UAE. We are proud to have a full-fledged lighting division with state- of- the- art lighting showrooms.
 
The future of Safe Line looks reassuringly sound as we're about to expand our horizons across trans- national borders by making our presence felt across the GCC. It’s our pride that Safe Line is your one stop solutions for all your electrical needs and we always remain sincere to our Tag line, Electrifying ‘Safely’

Name: MENNEKES
Description:
Welcome! Founded in 1935, our family-owned company is a leading manufacturer of industrial #plugs, connectors and #emobility charging solutions. #MENNEKES is managed by the third generation of the family. Our company is active in over 90 countries with subsidiaries and representatives. Around 1,600 employees are working for us.

We are producing plugs, connectors, receptacles and receptacle combinations in a wide variety of designs. Our robust, durable solutions are used wherever electricity needs to flow safely and stably - for example in various industrial sectors, in tunnels and at railway stations, in mining and shipbuilding, in container ports, data centres, wind parks, for fire brigades and disaster control and at events of all kinds.

In the field of electromobility MENNEKES offers clever solutions and the infrastructure for the mobility of the future. Since 2014 our ‘Type 2’ charging plug has been the standard for electric vehicles throughout Europe by EU law. Our range includes charging cables with ‘Type 2’ plugs, intelligent charging stations and wallboxes as well as suitable software solutions including billing services and a trained partner network - for homes, industry, commerce and public car parks in municipalities. For the automotive industry and its suppliers we are manufacturing charging inlets and charging cables for electric cars.

We are hiring and looking for you: https://www.mennekes.org/career 

Imprint: https://www.mennekes.org/imprint

Name: NAPCO Security Technologies
Description:
NAPCO Security Technologies (NASDAQ: NSSC) is one of the world's leading manufacturers of technologically advanced electronic security equipment including intrusion and fire alarm systems, access control and door locking systems.  Headquartered in New York its products are sold and installed by tens-of-thousands of security professionals worldwide, from security dealers to locksmiths, to systems integrators and specifiers, in commercial, industrial, institutional, residential and government applications.

Name: Aico
Description:
Aico, an Ei Company, are the European market leader in home life safety, pioneering new technologies and offering high quality alarms, developed and manufactured in Ireland. All Aico alarms meet UK standards and offer a variety of sensor types to guarantee protection for every home, the cornerstone of which is delivering education, quality, service and innovation. Aico have expanded their Connected Home offering through HomeLINK. HomeLINK are a multi-award-winning high-tech software team within Aico that leverage cutting edge home integration and analytic technologies to address the needs of social landlords and their residents. 

With new innovations in Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, the notion of a connected home could prove a real asset in making our homes not only more sustainable, but also more efficient and ultimately safer – with a focus on wellbeing. Adding another dimension to home life safety, Aico strive to create safer, healthier homes.

Name: SOURIAU-SUNBANK Connection Technologies by Eaton
Description:
The same reliable people. The same reliable solutions. Now an Eaton brand. Souriau-Sunbank, a world leader in high performance interconnect technologies, was acquired by Eaton in December of 2019 and now operates under the Eaton brand. We would like to stay connected with you, please follow us at Eaton.

Eaton is an intelligent power management company dedicated to improving the quality of life and protecting the environment for people everywhere. We are guided by our commitment to do business right, to operate sustainably and to help our customers manage power ─ today and well into the future. By capitalizing on the global growth trends of electrification and digitalization, we’re accelerating the planet’s transition to renewable energy, helping to solve the world’s most urgent power management challenges, and doing what’s best for our stakeholders and all of society.

Founded in 1911, Eaton has been listed on the NYSE for nearly a century. We reported revenues of $19.6 billion in 2021 and serve customers in more than 170 countries. For more information, visit www.eaton.com.

Name: Trend Control Systems
Description:
Trend is one of the world's leading Building Energy Management Systems manufacturers, with a worldwide distribution and support network covering over 50 countries. Its fully integrated control solutions are able to meet the most complex requirements of modern buildings.

Through close control and monitoring of heating, ventilation, air conditioning and other building services, Trend systems are able to minimise energy consumption and maintain consistently comfortable conditions â€“ as well as bringing other key benefits such as lower plant maintenance costs. Systems are to be found in virtually every type of non-residential building, from schools, hospitals and leisure centres to office blocks, shops and factories. Suitable for the largest building complexes and multi-site applications, they are still cost-effective in even very small premises.

Trend control systems are supplied, engineered and commissioned by approved Systems Integrators (SI). A significant number of these specialist controls companies have qualified as Trend Technology Centres (TTC), a status they have achieved by demonstrating they can meet defined high standards of workmanship, contract management, documentation and quality control. All are subject to regular audit to ensure these standards are being maintained.

The Trend package of advanced products, specialist services and a tried and tested route to market, not only provides systems that are fit for purpose but also ensures lowest lifetime costs.

For additional information on how Trend processes your personal information please visit https://www.honeywell.com/privacy-statement.

Name: Askoll
Description:
Superb energy efficiency, low consumption and savings on raw materials: for thirty years now, these have been the hallmark features of the motors, pumps and fan motors for home appliances manufactured by Askoll, an Italian company that leads the market in electrical synchronous motor technology.
Its pumps and filters for aquariums guarantee the maximum security and comfort of the costumer and of the animals: easiness in the usability of the products for a full enjoyment of the “underwater view”.
In 2015 Askoll adopted its know-how to the electric smart mobility. It now produces a range of e-bikes and electric mopeds for both private and professional (delivery and sharing) customers. 
On-going investment in Research & Development and perfect integration between product and process development have always allowed Askoll to offer the most innovative, eco-friendly solutions on the market. 
Today Askoll is an international group headquartered in Dueville, employing 1500 people in 10 production facilities in strategic locations in Italy, Brazil, Mexico, Slovakia, Romania and China, as well as sales offices in the USA and South Korea.

Name: Simfer
Description:
1977 yılında katı yakıt soba üretimine başlayan Simfer, 1997 yılında pişirici grubu ürünlerin üretimine geçerek, yenilikçi ve özgün tasarımlarıyla sektöre yeni bir soluk getirmiştir.

2000'li yıllardan itibaren uluslararası ve yerel satışlarını artırarak hızla gelişmiş, tüketicinin ihtiyaçları ve beklentileri doğrultusunda gerçekleştirdiği tesis yatırımları, Ar-Ge ve patentli ürün çalışmaları ile ürünlerinde yüksek kalite standartlarını yakalamıştır. Böylece, hem yurt içi hem de yurt dışı pazarının en önemli üreticilerinden biri olmuştur.

Dünyanın farklı yemek pişirme kültürlerine göre tasarlanmış; kaliteli, dayanıklı ve estetik pişiriciler üreten Simfer, yurt içindeki geniş servis ağı, 2.000’den fazla satış noktası ve mevcut 4 fabrikasında 1000'den fazla çalışanı ile 48 yıldır evlerin kalbi olmaya devam etmektedir.

Üretim tesislerinde doğal enerji kaynaklarını kullanarak çevreye duyarlı üretim gerçekleştiren Simfer, sürdürülebilirlik anlayışıyla faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Rekabetçi ve teknoloji odaklı yapısı sayesinde sürekli olarak şirketin ve markasının önünü açacak yeni ufuklar ve iş fırsatlarını değerlendirmeyi önemseyen Simfer, bu bakış açısıyla 2024 yılında televizyon fabrikasını kurarak devreye almış, aynı zamanda cam üretim fabrikasını da faaliyete geçirmiştir.

Simfer'in ürün gamı, televizyon, küçük ev aletleri, elektrikli ev aletleri, beyaz eşya, klima ve ankastre ürünlerden oluşmaktadır.

Avrupa başta olmak üzere dünyanın 100'den fazla ülkeye , üretim yaparak ihracat gerçekleştiren, bugün küresel pazarda her geçen gün güçlenen konumuyla doğu ile batı arasında bir köprü görevi görerek sektördeki etkisini artırmaya devam etmektedir.

Simfer, 2024 yılında “Şikayetvar” Müşteri Memnuniyeti ve Deneyim Endeksi'nde Ankastre Kategorisinde %82,2 puanla Birincilik (Diamond) Ödülü kazanarak başarısını tescillemiştir.

Name: Mitsubishi Electric Europe B.V. - Italian Branch
Description:
With more than 100 years of experience in providing reliable, high-quality products, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation is a recognized world leader in the manufacture, marketing and sales of electrical and electronic equipment used in information processing and communications, space development and satellite communications, consumer electronics, industrial technology, energy, transportation and building equipment.

In Europe it is present since 1969 with branches in 20 Countries: UK, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Portugal, The Netherlands, Sweden, Ireland, Czech, Belgium, Russia, Poland, Slovakia, Turkey, UAE, Norway, Hungary, Romania and Greece. The Italian branch, established in 1985, operates through 3 commercial divisions: Air Conditioning – air conditioning for residential, commercial and industrial real estate, heating, de-humidification and air treatment; Industrial Automation and Mechatronics – systems and appliances for industrial automation and numerical control; Automotive – systems and components for control of car and motor vehicle devices. Support is also provided for the sales of Semiconductors.

Mitsubishi Electric enriches society with technology in the spirit of its “Changes for the Better”.

The company recorded a revenue of 5,521.7 billion yen (U.S.$ 36.8 billion*) in the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025. 

For more information, please visit mitsubishielectric.com 

*U.S. dollar amounts are translated from yen at the rate of ¥150=U.S.$1, the approximate rate on the Tokyo Foreign Exchange Market on March 31, 2025

Name: MVG | Microwave Vision Group
Description:
The Microwave Vision Group offers cutting-edge technologies for the visualization of electromagnetic waves. With advanced test solutions for antenna characterization, radar signature evaluation and electromagnetic measurements, we support company R&D teams in their drive to innovate and boost product development.

Our solutions include:

•	MV-Scan technology: electronically-scanned multi-probe arrays
•	Antenna, RCS, radome & EMC measurement systems
•	Turnkey anechoic chambers
•	StarMIMO: MIMO testing systems
•	Antennas & probes
•	Wireless device measurement & certification, including SAR & HAC
•	Measurement software
•	RF safety  monitors and other applications 
•	RF absorbers
•	EMC shielded chambers 

With highly skilled teams across the world and over 450 dedicated employees, we proudly serve the telecommunications, aerospace&defence, automotive, academic and research communities.

Over a period of more than 30 years, MVG has unified the skills of four industry leaders (Satimo, Orbit/FR, Rainford EMC, AEMI).

Together, under one unified brand, we tackle some of the world’s most complex electromagnetic wave visualisation challenges.

Description:

Avo offers one of the photonics industry’s leading engineering teams, with core competencies in device design through sub-system assembly and deep experience in package design for automation.

Located in Horsham, PA, a suburb of Philadelphia, Avo's headquarters is comprised of a 41,000 square foot manufacturing facility that features 22,000 square feet of clean room space. Name: LECO
Description:
Our story began in 1936 with the world's first rapid carbon determinator, transforming the American iron and steel industry with fast, reliable results. For 85 years, LECO has been a trusted global leader in analytical instrumentation.
Today, that same innovative spirit drives our complete portfolio of solutions, which has led to global recognition of expertise in elemental analysis, mass spectrometry and metallography and optical equipment. Our instruments solve complex challenges across a range of applications:

Metals & Materials Science: Precise elemental and thermal analysis for metals, ceramics, and advanced materials.

Protein Analysis: Rapid, accurate protein analysis for nutritional labeling and quality control.

Petrochemical: Characterize complex hydrocarbon mixtures and monitor elemental content with mass spectrometry and elemental analysis.

Battery Materials: Measure carbon/sulfur and graphite content to support performance, safety, and quality control in advanced energy storage technologies.

Food Safety: Comprehensive screening for contaminants like MOSH/MOAH, pesticide residues, and other unknown threats to ensure product integrity and regulatory compliance. 

Flavor & Aroma: High-resolution separation and identification of volatile/semi-volatile compounds for authenticity and sensory profiling.

Agriculture: Quantify key soil indicators like Total Organic Carbon (TOC) to support sustainable farming.

Environmental: Detect trace microplastics and PFAS in soil and water.

Life Sciences: Non-targeted metabolomics research powered by high-resolution mass spectrometry for deeper biological insights.

With in-house manufacturing, every LECO product meets strict standards for quality and precision. Our network of 25 subsidiaries and distributors allows us to sell in over 75 countries, ensuring you receive unmatched local support, service, and application expertise.
Discover how our solutions help your lab achieve accurate, efficient, and reliable results.

Inform Electronic, one of the European leading power solution specialist, is established in 1980 with the aim of designing and building industrial electronic systems. Soon after, it diversified into the production, and marketing of standard professional electronic equipment, and special projects.
The company always combines its experience with its innovative identity and is recognized by its worldwide technology leading character. Right business understanding of Inform makes the company one of the most wanted brands in the world with its exceptional growth ratio . Our product portfolio includes CRGO Magnetic Core Assemblies, Core Coil Assemblies, Cut Laminations, Slit Coils, Amorphous Cores, and Oil Immersed Circuit Breakers, all engineered with precision to ensure superior efficiency, reliability, and adherence to global quality standards.
