Description:
TTI, Inc., a Berkshire Hathaway company, is a world leading specialist distributor of passive, connector, electromechanical, discrete, power and sensor components.

TTI’s philosophy is "Lead by Design", and the company differentiates itself by focusing on people, parts and process. TTI in Europe strives to be the distributor of choice for customers and suppliers alike by introducing new product technologies and by stocking broad and deep inventory across its franchise base. 

TTI Europe is headquartered in Maisach-Gernlinden near Munich, Germany. Our purpose-built facility occupies 45,000m², with 40,000 m² of dedicated warehouse space, and services all European regions. Globally, TTI is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and has over 100 locations across North America, Europe and Asia. 
 TTI’s sophisticated inventory management system ensures the ability to service changes in demand due to fluctuating markets and supply chains.

Name: Mitsubishi Electric US, Inc.
Description: Mitsubishi Electric is one of the world's leading names in the manufacture and sales of electrical and electric products and systems used in a broad range of fields and applications. As a global, leading green company, we're applying our technologies to contribute to society and daily life around the world.

Name: Yonggui  Electric
Description:
Yonggui Company (“YGC”) is a high-tech enterprise with 51 years expertise focused on the research and development, manufacturing, sales and technical support of connectors, connector systems and smart precision products. It was listed on Shenzhen Stock Exchange in September 2012.  The products are distributed in the three major fields of new energy and vehicle (58%), railway and industrial (36%), special market (6%). 

Yonggui has 726 national patents, and has obtained  ISO 9001,  ISO/TS 22163, CRCC, ETL, UL and IATF16949  certifications.

Name: SkipperSeil Limited
Description:
SkipperSeil Ltd. is Substation Equipment manufacturing company forward integrated to Power Transmission, Distribution and Generation in over 50 countries, especially Africa, Middle East, India and SAARC.
 
Skipper’s best-in-class product range, through its manufacturing units in India, UAE & Africa, includes SCADA, Automation & Instrumentation Panels, Power Transformers up to 500MVA/765kV class, Distribution Transformers up to 4MVA 33kV, Current & Voltage Transformers up to 220kV. Skipper’s Special Offerings include Compact Package Substations up to 11kV, Heavy Duty Mining Transformers, Induction/Arc Furnace Rectifier Transformers, Indoor & Outdoor Metering Units up to 36kV, Off-Load Isolators up to 400kV, Vacuum Circuit Breakers up to 36kV, and Drop Out Fuses and Elements up to 36kV. 

Skipper’s products are type-tested by internationally accredited laboratories such as ASTA, CPRI and ERDA according to IEC/ANSI/IS standards and are approved by various leading utilities in India, UAE, Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, South Africa and more. Skipper has also successfully forward-integrated into EPC for EHV Substations, Transmission lines upto 400kV & Power Plant construction in gas, thermal and hydro generation with a strong focus on timely delivery and quality. Skipper's Infrastructure & Railway division specialize in developing Power Plants, Special Economic Zones, Light & Metro Railway Projects right from concept upto completion.

Skipper’s CSR initiatives in the areas of healthcare & education testify the Company’s commitment to “Making a Difference in the Lives of Millions Everyday”.

Name: IPG Laser GmbH & CO. KG
Description:
IPG Photonics is the leading developer and manufacturer of high-performance fiber lasers and amplifiers for diverse applications in numerous markets. IPG Photonics diverse lines of low, medium and high-power lasers and amplifiers are used in materials processing, entertainment, medical, biotechnology, scientific and advanced applications. Our products are displacing traditional technologies in many current applications and enabling new applications for lasers.

The Company is leveraging its brand and position as a pioneer and leader in developing and commercializing fiber lasers and amplifiers increasing its market share in the broader markets. IPG lasers continue to displace traditional lasers in many existing applications due to their superior performance and value. Quite simply, IPG's products are disrupting the market by empowering tomorrow's applications today.

IPG's highly vertically-integrated development and manufacturing capabilities enable the Company to meet customer requirements, accelerate development, manage costs and improve component yields, while maintaining high performance and quality standards. 

IPG is a global company with manufacturing facilities in the U.S., Germany, Russia and Italy, and regional sales offices in China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, India, Turkey, Brazil, Mexico, Singapore, Spain, Poland, Czech Republic, Canada, and the United Kingdom. The Company sells its products globally to OEMs, system integrators and end users in a wide range of diverse markets that have the in-house engineering capability to integrate IPG's products into their own systems.

Name: Navitasys India Private Limited
Description:
Incorporated in 2019, Navitasys India is a leading company to offer a bouquet of innovative, best-in-class energy solutions for consumer electronic brands. Description:
Nilsen is a leading electro-technology company operating throughout Australia, with offices in all mainland capital cities. We deliver quality installation, maintenance and manufacturing services from inception to replacement. Our commitment is to always meet our clients’ particular project needs, while aiming to exceed their expectations in all that we do.

We are a family owned business with a proud history of servicing customers Australia-wide following the traditions on which our company was built: service, reliability and quality. With almost a century in successful business covering contracting; communications and data; electrical and high-energy services; and switchboards, our experience and expertise has forged a reputation as a major force in the industry. And it’s one we continue to build on and develop through our on-going business relationships.

Nilsen has sophisticated design engineering, quantity estimating, strategic planning, financial stability and resources to undertake the largest of commercial, industrial, health, mining, defence and government projects. And our dedicated teams have proven they can deliver results time and time again.

Description:
PAC, Precision Analyzer Company, is a leading global manufacturer of advanced analytical instruments for the aviation, renewable fuel, process, petrochemical, hydrocarbon, packaging, pharmaceutical, and medical device testing industries.
 
Our portfolio includes the world’s most respected brands of laboratory and process analyzers: AC Analytical Controls, Advanced Sensors, Alcor, Antek, Cambridge Viscosity, Herzog, Icon Scientific, ISL, PetroSpec, Phase Technology, and Uson.
 
With 15 sales and support offices and a network of over 140 distributors, PAC is proud to deliver global solutions with local support as we work to move the world forward, safely and sustainably.
 
PAC is certified to ISO 9001:2015 and 17025:2017 standards, reaffirming our commitment to quality and customer support.
 
Headquartered in Houston, Texas, PAC is a subsidiary of Indicor, LLC, a diversified technology company and a constituent of S&P 500, Fortune 1000, and Russel 1000 indices.

Name: MADE BY GATHER

Name: UKBIC
Description:
The UK Battery Industrialisation Centre (UKBIC) is the UK’s national open-access facility dedicated to accelerating the scale-up of advanced battery technologies.

By bridging the gap between research and high-volume manufacturing, UKBIC plays a critical role in supporting the UK’s transition to net zero and strengthening its position in the global battery supply chain.

UKBIC provides state-of-the-art equipment, technical expertise, and training to help manufacturers and researchers validate processes, optimise performance, and reduce risk before committing to large-scale investment.

The facility offers both pilot and industrial-scale lines, enabling customers to trial new materials and processes under real-world conditions.

UKBIC also supplies its own benchmark products for component testing and delivers specialist training to develop the skills required for a battery-powered future. 

UKBIC is uniquely positioned to tackle complex manufacturing challenges. With expertise in processing diverse materials and products, and access to a broad range of advanced technologies, its engineers bring a comprehensive understanding of issues that span the entire battery value chain.

UKBIC is part of The Battery Innovation Programme, a flagship of the UK Industrial Strategy, funded by the Department for Business and Trade and delivered by Innovate UK.

For more information, visit: www.ukbic.co.uk
Or, get in touch with our Business Development Team at sales@ukbic.co.uk

Name: Atlona
Description:
Welcome to Hall Research — home to a growing portfolio of brands driving innovation across Pro AV, audio, connectivity, and medical technology.

One company. One vision. One home.

Name: Sonatest
Description:
Sonatest operates from three company sites across the world: UK, USA and Canada. Our UK head office houses our global sales management, manufacturing, flaw detector research and design.  In Canada, our research and product development team designs advanced instrumentation such as phased array ultrasonics, whilst our USA office provides sales and product service and support for the region. Since our formation in 1958 Sonatest Ltd has grown to become one of the most respected suppliers of ultrasonic NDT instruments in the world with many global blue chip clients. 

As a company, Sonatest is focussed on achieving our brand drivers of "Simplicity, Capability and Reliability", both within our product development programs and customer relationships. Sonatest has a long history of product innovation and market firsts that continues today in the latest advanced NDT testing equipment such as the VEO phased array flaw detector and the 2013 award winning Prisma instrumentation.

Name: Besomi Group
Description:
Welcome to Besomi Electronics Group.

Besomi Electronics Group is one of the leading suppliers of engineering spare parts in the region.

The group was born in Amman, Jordan on 1986 and expanded its operation to UAE, Dubai in 1998 which enabled the group to partner with world leading clients in different sectors such as oil & gas, industrial, education, communication, governmental sectors and more.

In 2020, The group reach another milestone after opening the office in Cairo, Egypt that will focus also the African continent.

Providing best in class service and products to these clients could have not happen without the support of our partnering suppliers who continues to provide us with world class products and services from all around the world.

We have over 22 years of experience in this field and our engineers would be eager to discuss specific problems at any mutually convenient time.

To all the engineers think of us as your robot arm to assist you demonstrate your capacities and accomplish your project. We offer you the help you need and guidelines to direct you and keep you in the right track.

Engineers like to solve problems. If there are no problems available, they will create their own problems.

 Our MISSION

Becoming one of the best solution providers for the Industrial electronics sector and a leader in sales of power electronics spare parts, components and instrumentation devices. We aspire to supply even the hardest to ﬁnd and specialized electronics related instruments and services to industries that include marine, oilﬁeld and construction, in addition to oﬀering college students and hobbyists with PCB manufacturing services and project guidance. These solutions are delivered on time at competitive prices with the aid of our committed employees.

VALUES

 Accuracy & Transparency.

Name: Aemulus Corporation Sdn Bhd
Description:
Aemulus’ core expertise is in the design, engineering, and development of automated test equipment (ATE), and test and measurement instruments. Semiconductor manufacturers and outsourced semiconductor assembly and test companies utilise ATE to test semiconductor wafer and packaged devices before shipped out for final assembly into various electronic devices and gadgets. 
Our presence is a disruption within the industry; it is in our interest to constantly innovate design with a wide range of functions, and paired with remarkable speed and cost of test (CoT). With our ground-breaking design, we contribute to advancing wireless communication infrastructures, making gadgets affordable for the mass users, and leading the next generation to a world without borders.

The Lighting Industry Association (The LIA) is the United Kingdom’s leading trade Association representing the lighting sector and its supply chain.

Membership is earned through rigorous assessment, including entry audits, random product evaluations, and ongoing reviews to ensure the highest standards are upheld across an ever-changing marketplace. LIA Membership and Certification signify trust, assurance, and excellence in lighting solutions. 

BE PART OF IT.

Name: Aimtron Electronics Limited
Description:
From small rapid-turn prototypes through high volume domestic & offshore capabilities, Aimtron will help you achieve your goals. We accomplish this by bringing together passionate, expert staff who really care about our clients. We understand that our work is out there making a difference in people's lives. 

Aimtron’s India-based manufacturing facility is located in the city of Vadodara, Gujarat. We also have partnerships with PCB suppliers in Shenzhen, China. We understand the importance of global sourcing options and offer these services at our Client's request. 

Strategic infrastructure has been established for full design and research projects. Aimtron's expertise includes medical, military, automotive, consumer, commercial, gaming, Alternative Energy and many other key areas of industrial applications. 

Headquartered in Palatine, Illinois, our American manufacturing plant offers expert services for PCB assembly, particularly with assemblies requiring quick turn prototyping, BGA Expertise and high volume PCB Assembly. 

We at Aimtron believe in the importance of proximity to our clients and therefore have established a global footprint that can support any region in the world. Aimtron features its global HQ and flagship manufacturing facility in the United States. All the processes used by Aimtron are perfected in the USA before they are implemented in India, ensuring American quality for the India market.

Description:
A Ritz Ferramentas é especializada há mais de 55 anos em projetos e fabricação de ferramentas e equipamentos para trabalhos de manutenção em sistemas elétricos desenergizados e energizados.

A Ritz possui um portfólio completo de ferramentas para trabalhos de manutenção em linha viva até 800 kV AC e DC para trabalhos em sistemas elétricos nos métodos ao contato, à distância e ao potencial, atendendo as normas brasileiras, internacionais e ISO 9001. 

CRESCER E EVOLUIR JUNTOS
Acreditamos na construção de um relacionamento de qualidade e confiança com nossos clientes, primando pelo atendimento às companhias de Energia Elétrica (Geração - Transmissão - Distribuição), bem como aos seus prestadores de serviço em todo território nacional e em mais de 60 países.

RESPONSABILIDADE QUE GERA VALOR
Profissionais especializados, em permanente processo de atualização de conhecimento, dedicados na elaboração de projetos customizados conforme a necessidade de cada cliente. Dispomos de softwares para o desenvolvimento de novas soluções, simulações 3D e elaboração de protótipos para validação dos projetos de forma ágil e confiável.

SEGURANÇA EM TODAS AS ETAPAS DO PROCESSO
Laboratório com capacidade para realização de ensaios elétricos até 400 kV e mecânicos até 75 toneladas, com experiência e excelência técnica para inspeções de acordo com Normas NBR, ANSI, IEC e ASTM, atendendo às especificações técnicas de nossos clientes.

Name: Ikotek USA, Inc.
Description:
Ikotek is a specialized, USA-headquartered global provider of original design manufacturing (ODM) for IoT. We combine end-to-end design consultancy across program management, R&D, sourcing and production at our own manufacturing facilities to produce designs for our customers. Our role is to turn customers’ device dreams into IoT reality.
We are a one-stop-shop for IoT device design, manufacturing and certification delivering high quality products and services to reduce complexity, speed up time to market, eliminate risk and reduce costs. We offer proven IoT ODM expertise at unbeatable value and have designed and produced millions of IoT devices for multiple industry sectors. Our experience enables us to drive innovation and efficiency at the same time creating a unique business proposition for our customers.
We have a wide range of IoT projects currently in progress across multiple industries, geographies and use cases and many of our projects have moved into the mass production phase, supported from our USA headquarters in San Diego, California, by our IoT experts in wireless, cellular and sensor fusion technologies. Products include devices such as trackers, smart meters, PDAs, Point of Sale (POS), AIoT and networking products. Our expertise encompasses chip on board (COB) designs, Android OS devices and design utilizing Snapdragon chips.

Solutions we provide:
-	Design and Development
-	Hardware Build
-	Testing and Verification
-	Software Development
-	New Product Introduction and Product Validation Testing

Industries we focus on:

Description:
The DKC Group is a prominent Italian company, known for its proven experience designing and creating electrical engineering and industrial automation solutions. Its activities range from cable carrier systems to car charging stations, metal trunking and uninterruptible power supplies, extending to low-voltage and energy distribution solutions as well.

Since its foundation in the 1990s, the DKC Group has pursued a massive policy of acquiring larger, well-established companies throughout Italy, a strategy that has allowed it to continuously expand its offer, relentlessly broadening its business horizons and developing expertise and specific technical skills in multiple directions.

Offering coordinated, technologically advanced systems capable of providing users with added value and sustainability, the result of a committed and advanced Research and Development Department, the Group has become a paragon of rapid and incessant growth, guaranteed by exceptional professionalism and logistics capable of providing customers with effective and efficient service.

Today, the DKC Group boasts 40 production plants covering a total of 200,000 m2 and 115,000 m2 of warehouses located all over the world, 12 of which are in Italy. It has 26 locations in 7 countries and a workforce of 4,000 people.
With experience and a wealth of knowledge, a corporate spirit whose primary motivation is to enthusiastically face the challenges that the future holds, as well as a precise and effective customer approach, the DKC Group is a valuable ally for installers and designers and the ideal partner for conceiving, designing and creating tailor-made solutions.

Name: WAGO UK & Ireland
Description:
Since its founding in 1951, WAGO has been pioneering innovative connection systems in electrical engineering and electronics. The idea for the first WAGO terminal blocks was born in 1951; the first terminal blocks with spring clamp termination technology were presented at the Hanover Fair the same year.

Precisely designed and manufactured, spring-loaded connections not only guarantee a faster and easier connection, but also offer a higher safety level since the contact quality is largely independent of operator skill.

WAGO is the leading specialist of spring clamp termination technology and is providing components for automation technology. In 1977, the success story of the CAGE CLAMP began – “vibration-proof, fast and maintenance-free connections.”

Safe operation for many devices, systems and installation depends on the unconditional reliability of our products.

Name: Comeca Group
Description:
COMECA designs, manufactures and maintain energy management solutions near your home and all around the world.

The Group supports customers in several business areas: Industries & Tertiary buildings, Industrial process, Energy, Infrastructures and Transport. It works harmoniously with the major players in the electrical industry such as Original Equipment Manufacturers (Low Voltage, Medium Voltage…), engineering companies (EPCs), installers and distributors.

Key figures:
- Since 1974

- Low Voltage switchboards (OEM)

Managing a data center is complex. It requires careful consideration of a range of factors to ensure performance, reliability, scalability, and sustainability. 
To help you navigate these challenges, we offer tailored grey and white space solutions at scale to meet individual needs
through our specialist brands that include Minkels, Raritan, Server Technology, Starline, and USystems. Our approach combines technical expertise with a deep commitment to sustainability, helping you optimize data center performance while reducing environmental impact.
We build enduring partnerships with our clients grounded in trust,
collaboration, and shared aspirations. Whether improving reliability
or increasing efficiency, we work to ensure that every detail is correct.
With our support, you can approach the future with confidence,
knowing that your data center is ready for what’s next.

Legrand: We go further

Name: Midea RAC Europe
Description:
Midea Residential Air Conditioning, subordinated to Midea Group, was started its industrial journey in 1985 when Midea achieved a global industrial layout for its residential air conditioners since the debut of its first air conditioner. Enjoyed the first ranking in China's export market share, Midea is highly recognized as the world’s No.1 air treatment company with 6 domestics and 5 overseas manufacturing bases.

Product 
Midea has a full range of residential AC products: split, window, portable, dehumidifier and light commercial. With annual production capacity of over 67 million sets, the company is equipped with the largest and most advanced CKD& SKD production lines and workshops.

Mission 
Midea understands that home is a sanctuary and the moments people spend there are precious. That is why we create products that not only perform a function, but also uplift the mood of the people using them. We strive to transform the ordinary into something extraordinary – even a home task itself can become a nice tiny moment spent together with family.

Prospectively, we strive to be the global leader of RAC industry with continuous innovation, reliable products, professional service and steady development. 

If you need more information about us, please visit http://www.midea.com/global/

Name: Festool
Description:
Manufacturingtools for professional tradespeople is one thing. Developing first-class power and air tools literally in the hands of tradespeople is quite another. In the process, we attach great importance to quality and reliability
Many Festool power tools have already been in use for 30 years – or longer. The long service life of our professional tools is no coincidence. One thing is essential to the successful design and manufacture of professional tools which are high-performing and robust yet reliable and lightweight, such as bench-mounted circular saws, compound mitre saws, jigsaws, circular saws, plunge-cut saws, routers, stirrers, electronic planers, polishers, drills, hammer drills and all types of sanding machines, such as eccentric sanders, orbital sanders, long-reach sanders, angle grinders, belt sanders, as well as construction site radios, LED working lights and many more: You have to know, think, feel and live trade. Uncompromising. With your head, your heart and your hands.

Name: Easee
Description:
Effortless electrification for all. 

Easee was founded on the belief that electrification should be effortless. Our products make life easier for both installers and users by minimising barriers and promoting the widespread adoption of electrical technologies.

The first step toward this goal was to create a smart, universal, and robust EV charger.

Today, we’ve installed more than 800,000 chargers across Europe and export worldwide – making us the largest manufacturer of connected EV chargers in the world.

Name: Maytronics
Description:
Maytronics’ vision is to lead the way to make pool water exceptional, for pool owners’ pure enjoyment. By providing the best-performing and easiest pool cleaning solutions, we help make owning a pool hassle-free. 
Since Maytronics was founded back in 1983, we have specialized in innovative technologies and solutions for swimming pool maintenance – robotic pool cleaners, pool safety products, water treatment kits, and more.  Our Dolphin line of robotic pool cleaners continually sets new standards for technology, innovation, design, and reliability. With about 2 million active users worldwide, Maytronics is well-established as a leading manufacturer of robotic pool cleaners.
Headquartered in Israel, Maytronics operates subsidiaries in the U.S, France and Australia, and sales offices in Spain and Latin America. We ensure full support for customers worldwide through our long-term collaborations with 80 distributors in 50+ countries.

Name: RayPCB
Description:
RayPCB | Powering Your Innovation
RAYPCB has been a reliable PCB & PCBA manufacturer in China since 2005, delivering end-to-end solutions for the electronics industry. From prototype to high-volume production, we specialize in precision PCB fabrication, component sourcing, assembly, and rigorous testing—all under one roof.

RayMing offers prototype to volume Assembly services including full turnkey and partial turnkey:

➽ Full Turnkey PCBA Services

➻ PCB manufacturing
➻ 100% Authentic Component Procurement
➻ Advanced PCBA Testing & Quality Control
➻ Continuous quality monitoring
➻ Final Assembly & Logistics

➽ Partial Turnkey Solutions
Already have designs or components? Let us handle the rest with seamless integration & assembly expertise.

・・Why Choose RayMing?

➤ Certified Excellence: ISO9001, ISO14001, UL, RoHS, IPC-A-610/600 compliant
➤ State-of-the-Art Facilities: Fully equipped manufacturing & assembly plant in Shenzhen, China
➤ Engineering Support: Free DFM/DFT analysis to optimize designs for cost, quality & efficiency
➤ Global Reach: Serving startups to Fortune 500 companies across 50+ countries

'*•.¸ Partner with Us! ¸.•*' 
Contact our team today for a competitive quote:

Email: Sales@raypcb.com

Name: AKG
Description: AKG professional microphones and headphones have been the go-to standard for capturing and monitoring studio-recorded and content-created audio for over 75 years.

Name: VeSync
Description:
Founded in 2011, VeSync was established with the goal of enriching the lives of customers across the globe by providing thoughtfully engineered consumer products designed with convenience, simplicity, practicality and value in mind. Today, Etekcity is now an international brand owner, serving a diverse e-commerce customer base in home improvement, consumer electronics, and outdoor equipment. 

By offering innovative, feature-rich products infused with the latest cutting edge technology and user-friendly designs, we have made tremendous strides in the e-commerce marketplace since our inception. Innovative thinking, thoughtful practicality and technological sophistication have been paramount to our continued success as a leading e-commerce brand in an extensive range of product categories.

Our team is composed of bright, ambitious and creative-minded individuals with an unwavering passion for enriching the lives of those around us in new and exciting ways. While we’re an incredibly industrious bunch, we inspire our team members to be as happy and productive as possible by offering ample opportunities for growth, flexible work schedules and a casual, start-up like work environment where work and fun are not mutually exclusive.

With multiple international branches and plans to expand our product outreach to physical storefront retail centers, we’re committed to becoming the world’s premier retailer of home goods and outdoor equipment. 

Building on better living isn’t just our slogan—it’s our promise to our valued team members too. #BuildingonBetterLiving.

Name: Zaptec
Description: We believe that the future is electric and that adventures should be powered more sustainably. By making EV charging accessible for all, we hope to inspire a new generation of explorers with the freedom to go wherever – whenever.

Name: Waldom
Description: Waldom pioneered the concept of master distribution and is the recognized leader in the electronic component redistribution market. Waldom offers innovative programs and global solutions to its supplier partners and distributor customers. These programs increase sales and market share, while reducing costs through optimizing the supply chain. Waldom supports these programs with sales offices and distribution facilities in the USA, EMEA and APAC. Waldom sells exclusively to distributors, never OEMs or end-users. Founded in 1947, Waldom has been a trusted supplier to the distribution community for more than 70 years.

Name: Liebherr Appliances Belgium (Cinem nv)
Description:
Liebherr is a highly reputed manufacterer of premium refrigerators, freezers and wine cabinets. 

At Liebherr we always keep a customer oriented focus where service and expertise are the core values.

Name: Cembre Group
Description:
Cembre is today the leading Italian manufacturer and one of the largest European manufacturers of electrical compression connectors and related installation tooling.
Extensive know-how in the field of electrical connectors, strong R&D activity and continuous innovation in manufacturing technologies and product specification, allow Cembre to respond quickly to an increasingly demanding market expectation for high-quality products that are reliable, durable and safe.

Wide product range, expert and efficient international sales network and sharp focus on customer needs represent the strengths of the Cembre Group and ensure a significant competitive advantage in a continuously evolving global market.

Name: INTERRA
Description:
INTERRA is the pioneering smart home technology leader developing KNX-based software and hardware solutions with its R&D teams experienced in the field of smart building automation by aiming for each product to be unique and comply with high-quality standards. With a history of uniqueness and innovativeness of 15 years, Interra's global success is driven by around 150 talented engineers and employees in over 75 countries.

For more information: info@interratechnology.com

Name: GivEnergy
Description:
GivEnergy – No. 1 for energy storage solutions in the United Kingdom, and growing worldwide.  GivEnergy was born from bold, innovative ideas. Our engineers are driven by a passion to reduce climate change and how we might empower a future free from fossil fuels.

We design, engineer and distribute innovative battery storage systems for both residential and commercial use. Our innovative solutions are sold and adopted in the UK, Europe, Australia, South Africa and we continue to expand our distribution to more global markets. We serve our customers with a comprehensive portfolio, an end-to-end ecosystem of products – spanning inverters, battery systems, EV chargers, energy management software, and a host of supporting accessories.

Each year, the average GivEnergy customer saves 85% on their energy bills, and reduces their carbon emissions by 300kg. Lastly we do so with high integrity around GDPR standards, we ensure data security by storing data at rest and in transit all in the UK. 
We believe our everyday choices might a difference to reduce our impact on the environment and we trust our products help powering the Future, One Home at a Time. GivEducation is our non-profit arm, and our mission is to ignite the next generation of STEM learners and leaders. We empower communities with knowledge and tools to lead more purposeful and sustainable lives.

Name: Farnell Electronics
Description:
We are Farnell Electronics, part of Farnell Global, the fast and reliable distributor of products and technology for electronic and industrial system design, maintenance, and repair.  From research and design through prototype to production, we are here to help you access the products and services you need 24/7.  With more than 80 years of experience, 48 localised websites, and a dedicated team of over 3,300 employees, we provide every component you need to build the technology of tomorrow.

Farnell Global trades as Newark in the Americas, Farnell in Europe, the Middle East, Africa and Japan, and element14 across Asia Pacific.  It also sells direct to consumers through its CPC business in the UK.

We have been part of the established global technology distributor, Avnet, since 2016. Today, this relationship allows us to support our customers at every stage of the product life cycle, offering a truly unique distribution model, as well as expertise in end-to-end delivery and product design.

For more information, visit: https://bit.ly/44I8osr


Stay up-to-date with us across:

Facebook: http://facebook.com/farnellelectronics
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/Farnell_Avnet
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/farnell_electronics/
Community: www.community.element14.com

Name: Delta Dore Group
Description:
At Delta Dore, we follow our convictions by charting our own course, with the determination to involve everyone around us in the energy transition. 

Since 1970, this desire has forged our expertise in energy management, then in connected housing. We put our technology, made in France & Germany, to work for people, enabling them to reduce their energy consumption and impact, without sacrificing their comfort. 

Our 820 European employees are seeking to transform lifestyles, by giving everyone the means to commit to positive sobriety: a world in which optimising energy goes hand in hand with living better. 

Join us and let's rise to the challenge of positive sobriety together!

Name: Streamlight, Inc.
Description:
Streamlight is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company that designs, manufactures, and markets a variety of portable lighting products. This includes a broad range of miniature, rechargeable and standard battery, precision-engineered flashlights and lanterns for professional fire fighting, law enforcement, military, industrial, outdoor and automotive applications. Today, Streamlight offers the highest level of flashlight technology and quality for the application, at the best value. 

The company is a participating manufacturer in a uniform rating system for flashlight products called the ANSI (American National Standards Institute)/ PLATO (Portable Lights Trade Organization) FL-1 Standard. It's designed to help customers rate and compare the most important features of personal lighting tools. Streamlight products are sold throughout the U.S. and in over 90 countries around the world.

As a recognized leader in our industry, we are looking for the best and brightest to be part of our team. From our assemblers to engineers and other corporate positions, Streamlight offers excellent benefits, growth and advancement opportunities to all members of our team.

For additional information, please visit streamlight.com.

Name: Fluke Reliability
Description: Fluke Reliability offers reliability and maintenance teams the tools, software, and services they need to optimize asset performance. Home to three powerful iconic brands – PRUFTECHNIK, eMaint, and Fluke Connect – we serve over 70,000 customers worldwide with a relentless dedication to quality, innovation, and service. Our products inform customers on the health of their assets and our software and services drive better maintenance decisions – improving productivity, driving uptime, and reducing costs.

Name: Digitaltest
Description:
Welcome to Digitaltest –
the experts for In-Circuit-Test, Flying Probe and Software

As a leading partner in the electronics industry, Digitaltest develops and produces automated test systems (ATE) for electronic circuit boards, software for automating production, and quality management systems. 

Digitaltest is known for innovative solutions for optimizing the entire manufacturing process – as an interface between CAD, the testing process and production itself. We also offer comprehensive service and support, including complete outsourcing of PCB testing at locations worldwide. For more than 40 years we have been offering technological leadership, reliability and intrinsic value in matters of automated test systems.

Name: Sunova Solar becomes Thornova Solar
Description:
Sunova Solar and Thornova Solar are Tier 1 global manufacturers focused on energy solutions and the design and manufacture of renewable energy components such as photovoltaic modules, solar cells, inverters and solar battery storage solutions.

Our R&D team is focused on the ongoing development of innovative solar technology for the residential rooftop distributed generation and C&I and utility-scale ground-mounted solar markets.

With our state-of-the-art automated production facilities, we deliver the reliability and performance you and your customers expect. Our local warehousing capacity and support around the world ensures that your projects are always installed on time.

We currently have 4 manufacturing plants in China and Indonesia and are building 2 more factories in the United States. All our operations are located outside of the Xinjiang area of China.

Name: Voltech Group
Description: VOLTECH group is one of the most experienced and professional Electrical Engineering company in Testing and Commissioning of medium and heavy duty electrical in power and transmission sector.

Name: SENAI FIEMG
Description:
O SENAI é um dos maiores polos de geração e disseminação de conhecimentos aplicados ao desenvolvimento da indústria do Brasil e de Minas Gerais. Criado em 1942, por iniciativa do empresariado do setor, o SENAI faz parte da Confederação Nacional da Indústria (CNI) e do Sistema Federação das Indústrias do Estado de Minas Gerais (FIEMG).

Com o apoio de diversas áreas industriais, o SENAI é responsável pela formação profissional de recursos humanos para a indústria, a prestação de serviços como assistência técnica e tecnológica ao setor produtivo, serviços de laboratório, pesquisa aplicada e informação tecnológica. Graças à flexibilidade de sua estrutura, se tornou o maior complexo de educação profissional da América Latina.

O SENAI, através do desenvolvimento dos seus programas, projetos e atividades, oferece atendimentos adequados às diferentes necessidades da indústria e contribui para o seu fortalecimento e o desenvolvimento pleno e sustentável do país.

Name: WEG Portugal
Description:
Founded in 1961, in the State of Santa Catarina (South of Brazil), nowadays WEG is a company with global implementation.
The manufacture of electric motors was in the origin of the Company, but today WEG is a global supplier of solutions, control systems, control and protection of Motors and systems of Distribution and Energy Transformation.
With presence in Portugal since 2002, through its industrial unit in Maia and more recently since 2017, with the new plant of Santo Tirso, WEG is today a reference of the Portuguese National Industry, dedicated to the manufacture of electrical motors, design and implementation of Automation Solutions, Energy and Services.
With teams of Research & Development and Engineering in Portugal, WEG has been showing a sustainable growth, reinforcing its position as an Industrial and Service platform for the whole world.
This is our world. This is WEG.

Name: Goldmedal India
Description:
Established in 1979, Goldmedal has a vision to create switches and electrical systems that make a difference to the lives of the Indian consumer.  Over the years,  Goldmedal has emerged as a leading brand that manufactures high quality, innovative products including modular wiring devices, home automation systems, LED lighting, MCBs, distribution boards, wires & cables, doorbells, electrical accessories and PVC pipes. 

The Company has a strong focus on design and R&D and has full-fledged manufacturing set ups across India equipped with the latest machinery and tools. 
Goldmedal products are available at retail outlets and at many of India’s leading consumer malls. The company has a huge distribution network and a presence in 22 states across India.

Name: LOVATO Electric SpA
Description:
For more than 100 years, LOVATO Electric has been designing and manufacturing low voltage electrical devices for industrial applications. 

Founded in 1922 in Bergamo (Italy), LOVATO Electric is a private company managed by the same family of entrepreneurs for 4 generations. 
The company started from the dawn of electrical engineering to today's mix of electronics, automation and software. The wide range of products is designed, industrialized, tested and built by LOVATO Electric according to the highest quality standards.

A team of designers and researchers develops innovative and reliable products using the most modern software tools available on the market and an internal test laboratory (accredited in accordance with EN ISO/IEC 17025) carries out tests according to national and international standards. 

The successes collected over time on national territory have allowed the company to open 14 branches abroad and a network of over 90 importers that today guarantee the availability of LOVATO Electric products over 100 countries in the world. 
The group currently has 700 employees worldwide.

Name: Pilz Automation Safety US
Description:
Pilz is a leading, innovative automation technology company. 
 
As experts in the safety of human, machine and the environment, Pilz provides worldwide, customer-oriented solutions for all industries. 
 
This includes innovative products in the area of sensor, control and drive technology.
 
Our international team provides professional services for Machinery Safety.

Name: LACROIX
Description:
Convinced that technology must contribute to simple, sustainable, and safer environments, LACROIX supports its customers in developing more sustainable living ecosystems, thanks to useful, robust, and secure electronic equipment and connected technologies.

As a listed, family-owned midcap company with €477 million in revenue 
in 2024, excluding divested activities, LACROIX combines agile innovation, industrialization capacity, cutting-edge technological know-how, and a longterm vision to address environmental and social challenges through its two main activities: Electronics and Environment.

The LACROIX’s Electronics activity designs and manufactures electronic 
equipment and industrial IoT solutions (hardware, software, and cloud) for the automotive, industrial, home and building automation (HBAS), avionics and defense, and healthcare sectors. As the Group’s industrial backbone, the Electronics activity ranks among the world’s TOP 50 and Europe’s TOP 10 EMS (Electronics Manufacturing Services).

LACROIX’s Environment activity also provides electronic equipment and 
industrial IoT solutions to optimize and secure the management of water and energy infrastructures (HVAC installations, smart grids, and smart lighting). 

Drawing on its experience and its technological and business expertise, 
LACROIX works hand in hand with its customers and partners to bridge the gap between the world of today and the world of tomorrow. The Group helps them benefit from the innovation opportunities around them, by providing them with electronic equipment and industrial IoT solutions for a more sustainable world.

Name: Universal Scientific Industrial Co., Ltd.
Description:
About USI (SSE: 601231)
USI, Universal Scientific Industrial (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., is a global leader in electronic design and manufacturing as well as a leader in the field of SiP (System-in-Package) technology. With Asteelflash and Hirschmann Car Communication, USI has 30 production and service locations across four continents of Asia, Europe, Americas and Africa, and offers customer diversified electronic products with D(MS)2 product services: Design, Manufacturing, Miniaturization, Industrial software and hardware Solutions, and material procurement, logistics and maintenance Services. USI is a subsidiary of ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 3711, NYSE: ASX). To learn more, please visit www.usiglobal.com and engage with us on LinkedIn and YouTube.

Name: Rogers Corporation
Description:
NYSE:ROG –  Rogers Corporation is a global technology leader in specialty engineered materials that enable high performance and high reliability in EV/HEV, wireless infrastructure, automotive safety and portable electronics. Three things characterize us – leadership in mission-critical reliability, commitment to market-focused innovation and our passion for delivering exceptional value that enables our customers’ success. The company was founded in 1832 as a paper mill in Manchester, Connecticut. Now headquartered in Arizona (USA), Rogers operates manufacturing facilities in the United States, Belgium, China, Germany, Hungary and South Korea, with joint ventures and sales offices worldwide.

With over 190 years of knowledge in material science and process engineering, we are trusted business partners to many of the world’s most innovative and successful industrial technology providers. Our innovative material technologies help power, protect and connect our world while enabling a more sustainable future.

Name: Transrail Lighting Limited
Description: Transrail Lighting Limited is an integrated Power Transmission and Distribution company, which provides turnkey solutions in areas of Transmission, Distribution and Rural Electrification, and a lighting solutions provider for outdoor lighting. At its core, it is a company driven by passion for quality, innovation and excellence.

Name: HBL Engineering Limited
Description:
HBL Engineering Limited, formerly known as HBL Power Systems Limited, is the India’s leading research-based engineering company and one of the leading manufacturers of specialized batteries, railway electronics, and e-mobility solutions. 

HBL manufactures a wide range of batteries, including lead-acid, nickel-cadmium, and lithium-ion. It also produces railway and defense electronics, solar photovoltaic modules, and is involved in charging infrastructure for electric vehicles. 

Our success has been built by serving some of the world’s most demanding customers and applications including Aviation, Railways, Defense, Oil & Gas, Power, Telecom, and Data Centres.

Name: Alutal
Description:
A Alutal é uma empresa nacional, especializada na fabricação e comercialização de sensores e instrumentos para medição, monitoramento e controle de temperatura.
Atua no mercado há mais de 15 anos, situada em suas novas instalações, no Distrito Industrial de Votorantim – SP, numa área de 2000 m2.
Atualmente atendemos, praticamente, todo os segmentos das indústrias

Name: Somfy
Description:
For more than 50 years, Somfy has been driving durable positive motion as a pioneer in window and door automation. Developed with comfort, ease of use, security and sustainabilityin mind,  our seamless and connected solutions are designed to help people make  the move to living spaces impactful for humans and with a reduced impacton nature.
https://www.somfy.com/en-en/

Name: Thermon
Description:
Industrial Process Heating Solutions

Through its global network, Thermon provides safe, reliable and innovative mission critical industrial process heating solutions. Thermon serves the energy, power generation, chemical, food and beverage, commercial, rail and transit and other industries to provide innovative solutions for industrial heating applications by deeply understanding our customers’ needs. We specialize in providing complete flow assurance, process heating, temperature maintenance, freeze protection and environmental monitoring solutions.

Global Capabilities
With global design, manufacturing, and warehouse facilities, Thermon is capable of supplying industrial process heating solutions that meet the needs of customers around the world. These state-of-the-art facilities incorporate patented manufacturing processes utilizing computer-controlled equipment, laser technology and infrared imagery. Each design office is fully staffed to provide complete engineering services.

Complete Process Heating Solutions
As an independent manufacturing, design and support organization, Thermon can supply a complete range of  products, design services, project management, site installation, system audits, maintenance and training with performance guaranteed.

Name: S&P Ventilación España
Description:
Soler & Palau es el líder mundial en la fabricación de sistemas de ventilación para la mejora de la calidad del aire interior de los edificios que habitamos y transitamos. 

Durante más de 70 años, nuestro objetivo ha sido innovar en soluciones de ventilación que sean amigables con el planeta (#PlanetFriendly) y fáciles de instalar (#InstallFriendly), con el fin de asegurar la calidad del aire en todos los espacios interiores que habitamos y transitamos - #BreatheAndRelax. 

Para lograr esto, desarrollamos bajo la marca S&P las más completas y avanzadas soluciones de ventilación para que los profesionales de la arquitectura y la construcción puedan ofrecer espacios habitables a las personas que primen la calidad del aire y la recuperación de energía, contribuyendo así a la verdadera sostenibilidad de nuestro medio ambiente. 

Más allá de la fabricación de los sistemas de ventilación, acompañamos a los profesionales del sector con nuestro servicio VentilAction. Estamos presentes en todas las fases de los proyectos de ventilación, desde el estudio previo hasta el final de la vida útil del producto. 

• Compartir nuestro conocimiento con el profesional, como expertos en ventilación eficiente. 
• Asesorar en la concepción del proyecto, aportando las herramientas necesarias, para el diseño y dimensionado de los sistemas de ventilación. 
• Asegurar el correcto funcionamiento de las instalaciones realizadas con nuestros sistemas, garantizando su calidad. 
• Apoyar a los agentes implicados a través de nuestro servicio técnico, incluso una vez finalizada la instalación. 

En S&P, contribuimos a un mundo en el que la calidad del aire interior esté al alcance de todas las personas.

Name: Bender
Description:
Bender is one of the world's leading providers of solutions that make electrical systems, smart, safer, and more sustainable.

Since 1946, we have been at the forefront in developing solutions that protect man and machine from the hazards associated with electricity, and as pioneering family business, we do all of this with the utmost of care and pride in what we do. Because electricity and a reliable power supply are of crucial importance to everyone - for society, the economy, global markets, for all of us, today and in the future.

A globally active family business with more than 1,200 employees, our work takes us to over 100 countries worldwide. Thanks to our knowledge, expertise, and application, we are able to provide innovative answers to tomorrow’s energy problems. 

We offer our employees a stimulating working environment that enables their ability to apply knowledge and know-how, supporting their own personal and professional development. This enables us to create innovative solutions and make electricity smart and safer in critical industry sectors such as hospitals, mining, ships, in factories, data centers, renewable energy and in transport sectors such as railways and electric cars. We create state-of-the-art products and services, individually tailored to the specific industry needs of our customers.

And to ensure that we continue to stay at the forefront, we trust and rely on our pioneering heritage, to build a strong, safer environment, where we can continue to make and impact and design the future of energy.


Imprint: https://www.bender.de/en/imprint
Data Protection Declaration: https://www.bender.de/en/data-protection-declaration

Name: Knowles Corporation
Description:
Knowles is a leading manufacturer of specialty electronic components. We design parts that perform unique, critical functions for innovative technologies. Through extreme reliability, custom engineering, and scalable manufacturing, we enable businesses to succeed in the most demanding applications across MedTech, Defense, and Industrial markets.

Our high-performance capacitors, RF/Microwave filters, advanced medtech microphones, balanced armatures, and miniaturization products enable and enhance the performance of technologies with the power to change, improve, and save lives.

Name: Amperex Technology Limited (ATL)
Description:
Amperex Technology Limited (ATL) is a world-leading manufacturer of lithium-ion batteries, specializing in providing high-quality solutions for rechargeable lithium-ion cells, packs, and system integration. Our products are widely integrated into the consumer electronics market, powering devices such as smartphones, laptops, tablets, smartwatches, Bluetooth headsets, AR/VR systems, smart door locks, and power banks.

Headquartered in Hong Kong, ATL's subsidiaries are located in Dongguan, Guangdong and Ningde, Fujian in China. We are committed to close collaboration with our global clients, leveraging technological innovation to make consumer electronics safer, more convenient, longer-lasting, and more versatile in their use. Through these efforts, we strive to contribute to a better future for all.

Name: Logic Fruit Technologies
Description:
Based in Gurugram, India, Logic Fruit Technologies designs and deploys embedded solutions for customers around the world. The company has specific experience in FPGA Design & Hardware Design, RTL Testing, variety of Digital Protocols, Communication Buses and Tools, including 1G, 10G, 40G, 100G Ethernet, PCIe, DIGRF, USB3.0, STM, HDMI, and software-defined radio (SDR), as well as Encryption, Protocol Compliance, Signal Generation, Data Analysis, IoT Technology, and Multiple Image Processing Techniques. 

For years, Logic Fruit has created solutions for the telecom, semiconductor, security/surveillance, defense/aerospace, medical instrumentation, and industrial automation industries, remaining flexible to the evolving demands and aggressive timelines of customers.

Incorporated in November 2009 with just 5 engineers, today we have a workforce of 250+ passionate and committed professionals with more than 900+ man years of technical experience. Our team constitutes best-in-class leaders from top Institutes with detailed R&D experience in the fields of FPGA, Hardware and Software design. 

With one of the industry’s broadest product portfolios and best in-class support, we deliver complete solutions to key verticals like Aerospace and Defence, Test and Measurement, Automobile, Security,  AI/ML, Image processing and Semiconductor.  

Logic Fruit is emerging as one of the top technology innovators and one stop solution provider and trusted partner for product engineering research and development services. With offices in India and USA, an ISO 9001:2008 certification, sound financial background, Logic Fruit's expertise has been recognised by industry giants such as Agilent, Keysight, Avago Technologies, Freescale Semiconductors, Stryker Technologies, AMCC, NVidia, Techlabs, NEC, Quest Technologies, BitIfEye Technologies, Intel & AMD.

Name: Alfa Electronics
Description:
Established in 1987, Alfa Electronics specializes in the design and implementation of embedded systems, Software/Electronic systems and electronic circuits.  Alfa Electronics serves the industrial, educational, banking, public service and hospitality market sectors with products such as waiting area management systems, energy saving systems, electronic locks, currency exchange boards, nurse calling systems and many more innovative electronic solutions.

The company activities include in-house research and development, in-house design, manufacturing and assembly of electronic systems, in-house design and development of embedded and Software systems, marketing, business development, sales, installation, customer support and maintenance.

With over 3500 customers in Egypt and over 50 customers in the Middle East and Africa, Alfa Electronics is a thought leader and innovator utilizing 25 years of experience producing top-notch proprietary systems that satisfy carefully studied market needs. All products are based on state of the art technologies designed, manufactured and maintained by over 160 skilled employees.

Alfa Electronics is also the main seller and distributor of Markem-Imaje industrial marking solutions in Egypt.  The company provides after sales services including installation, customer support and maintenance.

Name: UTL
Description:
UTL is one of the leading brand in power back-up and power generation in India. UTL offers wide range of quality products, has 4 manufacturing units, strong network of Distributors and dealers across the globe and highly motivated workforce. UTL has always been considered as a leader and modernizer in the market, when it comes to innovation. UTL is esteemed part of Fujiyama Power Systems Limited and owns highly coveted patent in rMPPT Technology for Solar PCU.

We have been working successfully in over 35 different countries all around the world for a long time, with an internationally experienced and highly skilled team of 800+ people and 100+ engineers.

Girisim Elektrik and our group companies are specialized on electrical and electromechanical EPC contracting and subcontracting in projects in Turkey and abroad, such as; AIS and GIS substations, solar power plants, wind power plants, hydro power plants, biomass power plants, thermal power plants, combined natural gas cycle power plants, overhead lines, electrification of airports, railway systems, industrial facilities, hospitals, residential and commercial building complexes, and more…

Name: ELMEASURE
Description:
Founded in 2004 by a passionate team of entrepreneurs with deep expertise in energy management, Elmeasure began with a bold mission: to help industries, businesses, and communities power their present while preparing for a sustainable future. We believe that every bit of energy saved today fuels a brighter tomorrow.

What We Do
At Elmeasure, we’re dedicated to Powering Today. Preserving Tomorrow. Through a suite of over 400+ products and 7+ specialized solutions, we empower industries to harness energy with greater intelligence, reliability, and efficiency. Our IoT-driven solutions are tailored for the unique demands of over 25 industries worldwide, making energy management not just possible but transformative.

Our Approach
We understand that every industry is different, which is why flexibility and customization are at the heart of our solutions. From advanced energy management systems to prepaid metering and Energy Billing Systems (EBS), we provide innovative tools that reduce waste, cut costs, and contribute to a sustainable future.

With a team of over 250 experts, we bring together technical know-how, creativity, and a relentless drive to innovate. Our solutions reach 50+ countries, helping businesses across the globe power smarter, greener, and better every day.

Why We’re Here
Elmeasure is more than just a technology provider; we’re your partner in energy transformation. As a Great Place to Work-Certified company, we foster a culture that values innovation, collaboration, and the vision of a better world. Our commitment is to deliver pioneering solutions that empower our customers to meet today’s energy needs and build resilience for tomorrow.

Name: Inertial Labs, a VIAVI Solutions Company
Description:
Based out of Virginia, USA - Inertial Labs Inc. was founded in 2001.
Today, Inertial Labs is ISO 9001-2015 certified designer, developer, and manufacturer of commercial, ITAR-free ECCN 7A994 classification motion control, position and orientation tracking systems, based on the combination of inertial sensors with a variety of other sensing technologies. With specific engineering expertise that includes the development of Fluxgate magnetometers, 1 deg/hr grade gyroscopes and few micro g accelerometers technologies, gyro-compass systems, optically enhanced and sensors fusion solutions; Inertial Labs engineers combine practical experience with PhD level academic knowledge.

As a result, Inertial Labs currently boasts a variety of the inertial sensor industry's smallest and lowest cost inertial sensor systems for their respective class of performance:

* Inertial Measurement Units (IMU)
* Motion Reference Units (MRU)
* Attitude & Heading Reference Systems (AHRS)
* GPS-Aided single and dual antenna Inertial Navigation Systems (INS)
* Miniature and Subminiature 3D orientation sensors (OS3D)

Name: Trojan Battery Company
Description:
Founded in 1925 by co-founders George Godber and Carl Speer, Trojan Battery Company is the world’s leading manufacturer of deep-cycle batteries. From flooded lead acid batteries to AES AGM to lithium-ion batteries, Trojan has shaped the world of deep-cycle battery technology with 100 years of battery manufacturing experience. With the invention of the golf car battery for the Autoette vehicle in 1952, Trojan pioneered the development of deep-cycle battery technology for the golf industry; successfully introducing mobilization to the game of golf. For Trojan, this began a legacy of leadership and innovation that prevails today in the global, deep-cycle markets spanning applications for golf, renewable energy, transportation, floor machines, aerial work platforms, marine and recreational vehicles. 

Trojan’s operations include ISO 9001:2008 certified manufacturing plants in California and Georgia, two advanced research and development centers dedicated exclusively to deep-cycle battery technologies and international offices located in Europe, UAE and Asia. Trojan is a proud member of the Battery Council International (BCI) and a technical research partner with the Bulgarian Academy of Sciences.

Name: TechnoFiber | Technical Factory for FRP Products
Description:
Founded in 1998 under the umbrella of  Techno Group of Trade and Industries, TechnoFiber has grown to become a leading manufacturer of innovative FRP/GRP products. Name: Marathon Motors & Generators
Description:
Marathon has a history of over 110 years of making Motors & Generators. Encompassing thousands of products and solutions found in some of the most demanding industrial applications around the world.

A History Of Industry Leadership

Marathon started in 1913 as Marathon Electric in Wausau, Wisconsin, USA. In a converted logging mill on Plumer's Island, the young company made its first product, a single phase 115VAC, 1/4 horsepower washing machine motor.

After a few years as a fledgling motor manufacturer, inventor Austin Kimble took over as general manager. Kimble introduced new production methods and products based on his patents. With mixed results, Marathon's portfolio expanded into fans, talking movies, and metered washing machines. During the 1930s, the company reorganized as Marathon Electric Manufacturing Corporation and turned profits during the Great Depression.

Marathon expanded in the following decades. New production plants opened and Marathon purchased Pennsylvania-based Burke Electronics in 1949. This purchase allowed Marathon to enter into the generators, fuse, and terminal block fields.

Name: LUNA Elektrik A.Ş | A Landis+Gyr Company
Description:
Luna Elektrik is a leading company in the energy sector, specializing in smart meter systems and energy management solutions. With its strong production infrastructure and engineering expertise in Turkey, the company offers energy-efficient and sustainable solutions.

In 2021, Luna Elektrik was acquired by Landis+Gyr, a leading global provider of integrated energy management solutions. Landis+Gyr, with over 125 years of experience, is a Switzerland-based company and a global leader in energy management. The company provides innovative solutions in digitalization, smart grid technologies, and energy efficiency, serving the global energy sector. Landis+Gyr operates in more than 30 countries worldwide, using the most advanced technologies to shape the energy industry.

Mission
Landis+Gyr and Luna Elektrik focus on providing their customers with solutions to manage their energy in the most efficient way, building sustainable energy infrastructures. Our goal is to optimize energy management for our clients with high-quality, cost-effective solutions that support their long-term sustainability.

Vision
Landis+Gyr and Luna Elektrik’s vision is to continue being leaders in the energy sector both in Turkey and globally, advancing excellence through continuous growth, service perfection, and innovation. This goal includes creating value for both our communities and the environment through the solutions we develop.

Name: Riello UPS Ltd
Description:
Riello UPS Ltd is a leader in the manufacture of uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) from 400 VA to 6.4 MVA and standby generators from 8 kVA to 2.5 MVA.

We enable reliable power for a sustainable world by offering products that combine engineering excellence and quality performance with exceptional energy efficiency. 

Our award-winning range incorporates solutions powering the smallest desktop PCs through to the latest data centre supercomputers. Riello UPS products protect power for high-profile businesses leading sectors as diverse as manufacturing, finance, retail, healthcare, and telecommunications.

Riello UPS is part of the Riello Elettronica group, which has subsidiaries in 85 countries and is the second-largest UPS manufacturer in Europe. This market share is driven by our ongoing commitment to reliability, innovation, and customer service.

As well as high-quality products, Riello UPS offers a complete range of installation, servicing, and maintenance support, plus unrivalled sales and technical advice. Our UPS maintenance contracts include guaranteed emergency response and fix times, while we offer a 5 year warranty as standard on all UPS up to and including 3kVA.

We operate from 4 well-placed sites across the UK and enjoy the country’s largest stockholding of UPS. This enables us to offer a truly nationwide end-to-end service of technical support and super-fast dispatch.

As part of the Riello Elettronica group, Riello UPS is an official sponsor and partner of the Ducati Corse MotoGP and Aruba.it Racing World Superbike Championship motorcycle racing teams.

Name: Deki Electronics Ltd
Description:
Deki is India’s largest manufacturer of film capacitors. We were recently ranked the third largest electronic component manufacturer in India (source: EB Times).

Deki was established in 1984 in technical collaboration with Okaya Electric Industries, Japan. A steady annual average growth rate of over 20% has been achieved during the past three decades. The state of the art manufacturing facility located at Noida (NCR Delhi), has reached an annual capacity of 1.2 billion capacitors. The 600+ team members at Deki are committed to the shared vision of becoming a “company that  makes India proud”.

Deki is an innovative, customer driven organization. The well equipped R&D centre, approved by Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (Government of India) is responsible to develop new products that generate 25% of the sales. The technical centre offers best in class application engineering support to our 250+ customers worldwide. 

The systems and processes at Deki are certified as per TS 16949:2000, ISO 9001-2008, ISO 14001: 2004 and OHSAS 18001:2007.

The “shared ownership” culture at Deki, based on an open, transparent, dynamic and participative management, encourages leadership development at all levels. Consistent success in this globalized business, has been possible because of this “bottom up”, “charged up” approach. 

The company actively contributes to policy advocacy aimed at transforming the currently sub optimal ecosystem into a globally competitive manufacturing destination. Our MD, Mr. Vinod Sharma has served as President, ELCINA, Chairman, ESC and Chairman, CII National ICTE Committee.  

We are now keen to leverage our experience by diversifying into other electronic components and innovative products.

Name: Hochiki Europe
Description:
INTERNATIONAL MARKET LEADER
Hochiki has a distinguished heritage of specialist technological expertise which has gained the group its international status as one of the world’s leading manufacturers of commercial and industrial fire detection solutions.  Established early in the twentieth century, Hochiki has remained an independent, multi-national company which now employs over 1500 personnel in total, operating five manufacturing plants, thirty-one sales offices and eighteen subsidiaries.

Hochiki Europe (UK) Ltd manufactures and distributes product for Europe, the Middle East and Africa and is dedicated to providing sales and technical services to these markets.  

WORLD PROVEN PERFORMANCE
With a heritage of innovative design and leading edge technologies, Hochiki’s products have gained widespread acceptance as the benchmark for high-integrity and long-term reliability throughout the world.

RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT FOR LIFE SAFETY
Hochiki owns the world’s largest, purpose-built, state of the art fire test laboratory.  This ensures that the pedigree of Hochiki products remains unrivalled and guarantees that even large scale designs are fully proven in real fire conditions. 

In addition, the Group employs over 100 specialist research and development engineers that undertake activities from fundamental research into the physical properties of fire, to hardware and software product design and development.

Description:

Developed to function flawlessly even in the harshest environments, our solutions are already used in many industries, from industrial automation to robotics.
We license our technology for other markets as well, including security and building automation.

Inxpect's S101A was the first and is still the only safety radar sensor for industrial use in the world.

///

Inxpect pensa, progetta, produce e distribuisce sensori intelligenti basati su tecnologia radar 3D, capaci di coniugare sicurezza nell'ambiente di lavoro e continuità produttiva, il tutto in perfetta conformità agli standard internazionali di sicurezza più aggiornati.

Sviluppate per funzionare perfettamente anche negli ambienti più difficili, le nostre soluzioni sono già utilizzate in molti settori, dall'automazione industriale alla robotica.
Abbiamo concesso in licenza la nostra tecnologia anche per altri mercati, tra cui quello della sicurezza e dell'automazione degli edifici.

L'S101A di Inxpect è stato il primo ed è tuttora l'unico sensore radar di sicurezza per uso industriale al mondo.

Description:
Carlo Gavazzi is an international group active in designing, manufacturing and marketing electronic equipment. Automation Components is the core business operated by Carlo Gavazzi Group.

Automation Components designs and manufactures electronic control components for the global building and industrial automation markets in its ISO 90001 certified factories in Italy, Lithuania, Malta and China.

The products (sensors, monitoring relays, timers, energy management systems, solid state relays, electronic motor controllers, safety devices and fieldbus systems) provide automation solutions for the industrial and building automation markets.

Typical customers are original equipment manufacturers of packaging machines, plastic-injection moulding machines, agriculture machines, food and beverage production, conveying and materials handling equipment, door and entrance control systems, lifts and escalators as well as heating, ventilation and air conditioning devices. System integrators and distributors are other effective channels to the market.

The products are marketed across Europe, North America and Asia-Pacific through a network of 23 own sales companies and around 60 independent national distributors.

Name: Abensal Lighting
Description:
Good lighting is effective lighting.

Good lighting improves productivity, enhances feelings and emotions.
Being one of the most important fundamentals in interior design, architecture and conception of any given project, lighting creates mood and atmosphere; it emphasizes elements of design and produces dramatic effects.

Since its founding in 1992, abensal has implemented this philosophy within its projects. 

Within the years, abensal has created for itself a name in the lighting industry. 

The company is considered as a specialized vendor for design oriented lighting products. Since then, abensal has grown to become one of the foremost suppliers for designers lighting fixtures with a strategic marketing network.

The knowledge, experience quality and product reliability of the company enable it to face the future with confidence in order to become an increasingly solid organization, which is ready to cope with the challenges of this competitive market.

Name: BEA Sensors Europe
Description:
BEA is a leading manufacturer of sensing solutions for automatic doors systems. The company was founded in 1965 and its headquarters are located in Liège, Belgium. BEA also has offices in the United States, Japan and China and our products can be found across the globe.

A pioneer in the sensor industry, BEA was one of the first companies to launch a Doppler microwave radar designed for automatic doors. 

The technologies we use at BEA are the Doppler effect (RADAR), active and passive infrared, electromagnetic induction and LASER. We exploit them to design motion sensors, presence sensors and safety sensors for a wide range of applications and meet the needs of six specific markets: Pedestrian Sensing Solutions, Industrial Automation Solutions, People Counting Solutions, Public Transportation Solutions, Vehicle Sensing Solutions, Security & Access Solutions. 

You will find us in public facilities like airports, parking facilities, public transportation, shopping malls and warehouses.

In 2002 BEA became a member of the British HALMA Group, which includes around 50 companies worldwide designing, producing and marketing products for the safety of public and industrial automatic installations. 

Check out our website : www.bea-sensors.com

Name: Oxford Instruments Andor
Description:
Since the formation of Andor Technology in 1989 we have grown to become the global leader in pioneering and manufacturing high performance light measuring solutions. Our products enable routine measurements of light down to a single photon and capture events occurring within one billionth of a second.

Our company has grown organically and through acquisitions year on year since it was established in 1989 as a spin-out of the Physics Department at Queen’s University Belfast, Northern Ireland. In 2004 Andor Technology plc floated on the London’s Stock Exchange (listed as AND:LSE) and now counts over 400 employees in 16 offices across the Americas, Europe and Asia. Over 80 core products and hundreds of accessories are offered to over 10,000 scientific research and OEM customers through a direct sales engineers and network of regional distributors.

Amplitude is a leading manufacturer of ultrafast lasers for scientific, medical and industrial applications. From ultrafast industrial fiber lasers to petawatt-class high intensity lasers, Amplitude is focused on helping its customers with advanced solutions. Amplitude offers a unique, distinct and large product portfolio: diode-pumped ultrafast solid-state lasers, ultra-high energy Ti:Sapphire ultrafast lasers and a full line of high energy solid state laser products. With three manufacturing locations in Bordeaux and Paris (France), and Milpitas, U.S.A., and an extensive network of support offices, more than 400 employees around Europe, Asia and America are committed to working with our customers to create the highest level of performance.

Amplitude offers a unique, distinct and large product portfolio: diode-pumped ultrafast solid-state lasers, ultra-high energy Ti:Sapphire ultrafast lasers and a full line of high energy solid state laser products. 

With three manufacturing locations in Bordeaux and Paris (France), and San Jose, U.S.A., and an extensive network of support offices, more than 300 employees around Europe, Asia and America are committed to working with our customers to create the highest level of performance.

Founded in 1995, UEC Electronics, LLC (UEC) is an award-winning business. 

We are a product design and manufacturing company. Description:

We set our sights high with four common objectives.

1. EMPOWER: Build meaningful connections within a collaborative, professional community. 

2. DEVELOP: Strengthen and grow critical leadership skills with a foundation of civility, ethics, and humanity. 

3. ADVOCATE: Access valuable mentorship and guidance to confidently navigate your career path.

4. CELEBRATE: Honor the dedication of members, sponsors, and stakeholders who champion our mission.

Totally Focused. Totally Independent.

Description:

It starts with generation - as alternators produce current.
It flows through transformation - stepped up, stepped down, routed by transformers.

At every step, details like winding, insulation, cores, resins, testing, and integration determine the efficiency and reliability of electric motors, transformers, and generators.
