Description:
We are Velatia. Velatia is a global, industrial, technological, benchmark family-owned group that performs its activity in the environment of electrical networks, electronics and communication networks as well as in the aeronautics component sector, where safety, efficiency and reliability are valued.

Our customer orientation has led to the development of four extensive networks of categories in Spain, France, Germany, Brazil, Mexico and China, helping to meet our customers needs in more than 50 countries.

The Ormazabal Group is now called Velatia. We have combined our forces to transform ourselves into a stronger group. Made up of companies with more than a hundred years of experience and committed to innovation to meet the present and future needs of our customers. Wherever they may be.

The solutions of the companies in Velatia seek to make the world a more connected, more sustainable, smarter, better connected, safer, more human place.

Name: Coilcraft, Inc.
Description:
Our privately held company was founded in 1945 as a custom coil maker for the radio manufacturers clustered around the Chicago area.

Today we produce inductors for a long list of customers in telecommunications, computers, instrumentation and consumer electronics.

Many are standard, off-the-shelf products. But we also provide custom components designed to meet customers' specific requirements. Our basic product lines include:

Surface mount RF inductors  
Surface mount power inductors 
Tunable and fixed RF inductors 
EMI filters 
LED driver magnetics

Coilcraft's worldwide headquarters are in Cary, Illinois, 30 miles northwest of Chicago's O'Hare Airport.

European headquarters are located in Cumbernauld, Scotland, near Glasgow. Production centers are strategically positioned throughout the world.

Our diversity of locations offers several advantages to our customers. Engineering prototypes are shipped in a matter of days. Our domestic plants can quickly provide your pilot run requirements. And then full scale production can be done at an appropriate offshore plant for maximum economy and convenience to your own facilities.

Manufacturing capabilities are duplicated at several locations, assuring you a steady supply of components.

NovaStar, a global leading LED display system integrator, designs and develops LED display system control solutions for a variety of market applications including entertainment, digital signage and rental.

Our product line ranges from LED display synchronous control system, LED display point-to-point calibration system to cloud-based management services. We have proudly served both corporate and retail clients ranging from the Beijing 2008 Olympic opening ceremony, concerts to digital advertising signage. Description:

With a focus on providing a complete solution rather than only products, LED Lighting South Africa ensures that the LED product exactly matches the client's requirements. Description: Our frequency control products and timing solutions enable the lightning speed of 5G networks, precision positioning for autonomous vehicles, synchronisation for cloud computing and much more. Name: MikroElektronika
Description:
Development Tools

MikroElektronika manufactures high-quality development tools for microcontrollers. We deliver our products across the globe and many satisfied customers guarantee first-rate service. Boards for PIC, PSoC, AVR, 8051, STM32. Tina, FT90x and other MCU’s at competitive prices.

Compilers

Description:
The WeWALK team is on a mission to enhance the mobility of visually impaired people with cutting-edge technology driven by their lived and professional experience of visual impairment.

WeWALK's patented technology smart cane improves safety and independence with obstacle detection, accessible multimodal navigation, and public transport integration. WeWALK has already impacted lives in over 59 countries and has been recognised as a TIME Best Invention, Amazon's Startup of the Year, and an Edison Gold Award.

WeWALK continuously expands its feature set through R&D collaborations with Microsoft, Imperial College London, the Royal National Institute of Blind People (RNIB), and other global visually impaired organization partners.

Description:
The SCHURTER Group is a globally successful Swiss technology company. With our components ensuring the clean and safe supply of power, input systems for easeof use and sophisticated overall solutions, we impress our customers with agility and excellent product and service quality. 

As a leading innovator, SCHURTER manufactures and distributes components for circuit protection, as well as connectors, switches and EMC products. In close cooperation with the customers, input systems are developed and manufactured. SCHURTER also offers services for the electronics industry in the field of printed circuit board assembly. The business unit Solutions coordinates complete solutions from project planning to the manufacture of end products.

22 companies in 17 countries belong to the SCHURTER Group, 11 companies of which have their own production sites. This ensures that all major markets can be served by their own companies. They are coordinated from three hubs: SCHURTER AG in Lucerne for Europe, SCHURTER Inc. in Santa Rosa for America as well as SCHURTER (S) Pte. Ltd. in Singapore for Asia. In addition, SCHURTER has representatives in about 60 countries and works together with over 200 distributors. This close-knit network guarantees that SCHURTER products are securely and quickly available internationally.

The recent development in its product range.  

 

 

 

1993 Started marketing of FG Wilson (UK) brand diesel generator. 
1996 Started import distribution of 'Legrand' brand low voltage electrical accessories from France.

1999 Energypac started business with Rolls-Royce in Bangladesh.

Energypac Power Generation Ltd. as a sister concern of Energypac Group has continued to grow and expand over its 7 years history due to the combination of activities which take place throughout the company and throughout the country.

Our manufacturing base is in Noida Special Economic Zone in Delhi NCR, India. Having a base in an export oriented unit allows us to swiftly deliver to our export customers. We have proper QMS and QAP process in place with certifications for Automotive, Medical, Environmental and Aerospace. We are AN ISO 9001:2015, IATF 16949:2016, ISO/TS 22163:2017,  ISO 13485:2016,  ISO 14001:2015,  ISO 45001:2018,  ANSI/ESD S20.20-2014 and EN 9100:2018 certified company. Description:
IBS Electronics was established in 1980 in Southern California. IBS Electronics is an ISO 9001:2015 & AS9120B certified distributor and a global leader in the delivery of innovative electronic components and logistic solutions. Our company operates a highly effective global sourcing network with offices in Asia, Europe, and the Americas, providing a broad range of integrated sourcing solutions to leading original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and contract manufacturers (CMs) across a range of industries.

IBS Electronics’ expertise in quality assurance, technology, and supply chain management, together with our leadership in the global deployment of Lean and Six Sigma, enables us to provide a competitive advantage to our customers by improving time-to-market, scalability, and efficiency.

Supply Chain Management

IBS Electronics creates an integrated supply chain with our customers and suppliers by becoming a seamless extension of their operations. We deliver “Best in Class” processes, information technology tools, and people.

Seamless Global Network

IBS Electronics operates a global Procurement Network that enables us to provide our services and products seamlessly worldwide. This network consists of a robust set of systems, skills, and tools that we use to efficiently manage production and services, regardless of geography, cost point, technology or end-market demand.

IBS supports its network of global customers with turnkey value-added services designed to reduce response times, increase flexibility in the supply chain, reduce order delivery costs and inventory investment, and help customers to optimize their total cost of ownership.

Low-Cost Source

IBS Electronics is recognized as a low-cost source of electronic procurement services (EPS) and products, without sacrificing quality, technology or on-time delivery.

Name: Siglent Technologies CO., Ltd
Description: SIGLENT is a global leader in the design and manufacture of electronic test and measurement instruments that provide high accuracy data, dependable quality, and a smart user interface at prices that deliver value for many years. Product innovation is a key driver for the company as it invests more than 15% of total sales into R&D and owns many patents for its advanced technologies.

Name: Absen Inc.
Description:
Absen combines the global reach of one of the world’s largest and most financially secure LED display manufacturers with Absen Inc., an Orlando based company that understands the U.S. LED market and the needs of our partners.

A U.S. Sales Team

Absen America has a team of U.S. industry experts with extensive knowledge of market conditions, client needs and industry standards. We provide our clients with high quality, innovative LED products at a great value. This combination of fantastic products with a knowledgeable team allows us to offer outstanding solutions and client experiences.

Orlando Based Tech Service & Support Team

Absen backs its U.S. product warranties right here in Orlando, FL with our own factory- trained technicians. Whether you purchased through distribution or directly from Absen, we’ve always honored our parts warranty. In addition, we offer cost-effective factory service for out-of-warranty repairs, on-site field support and product training. Ours is the ONLY factory authorized service center in the United States. Be sure to protect your LED investments with factory authorized parts and service.

It is now easier than ever to do business with Absen. Reach out and follow us today.

Name: ENTES ENERGY
Description: Entes Energy offers state of the art products and solutions in the field of Power factor correction  , Energy monitoring and  Protection & control domain.  Head quartered in NCR , Entes energy has now presence across the  country with rapidly growing network of channel partners and a dedicated team of sales and application engineers.

Name: imc Test & Measurement
Description:
Since 1988, imc Test & Measurement has been committed to support industrial innovations with optimal measurement solutions. Our integrated and flexible data acquisition platform supports test engineers across industries including automotive, mechanical engineering, railway, aerospace, and energy. Every day, imc DAQ systems, software, and test stands are used worldwide to validate prototypes, optimize products, monitor processes, and transform measurement data into actionable insights. From road load data acquisition and durability testing to EV and battery testing, NVH analysis, torsional vibration, and sound power measurement, imc delivers solutions precisely tailored to your application.
As a comprehensive solution provider, imc also offers a broad portfolio of services. These ranges from consulting and training to contract measurements, data analysis, and customized turnkey test benches. Backed by a global team of experienced engineers, we combine deep technical expertise with extensive project experience to help customers achieve their testing goals faster and more efficiently.

Name: Global Light & Power LLC
Description:
Global Light & Power offers bespoke LED Lighting Products & Services for Commercial, Residential, Hospitality and Industrial Sectors. Based in Dubai, UAE, GLP offers an innovative approach to speciﬁcation grade, energy efﬁcient LED ﬁxtures that exhibit superior craftsmanship and aesthetics. Working on a multitude of architectural and landscape projects, GLP has helped several clients to reduce power and maintenance cost by over 85%.
                                                                                  
GLP maintains product development engineering teams in Dubai, UAE, manufacturing facilities in Dubai, Guangzhou, China, and sales distribution throughout the United States, Africa and the Middle East. GLP partners with Nichia from Japan, the world’s leading LED Chip manfacturer.

Name: SAES
Description:
SAES is a Group that internally conceives and produces advanced functional materials, that is, materials bearing special characteristics which find their application in a variety of areas such as consumer electronics, domotics, automotive, medical devices, particle accelerators, advanced flexible packaging, food packaging and other new frontiers yet to be discovered.
The unique expertise of SAES Group in the field of materials science translates into an outstanding R&D facility, committed to technological excellence and able to keep the Group at the forefront in innovation capability.
A total production capacity distributed over 10 manufacturing plants, more than 1000 employees plus a worldwide based sales and service network allow the Group to combine multicultural resources, skills and expertise to form a truly global enterprise. 

A global enterprise capable to support customers meeting their needs and developing solutions based on advanced technological competencies.

Name: Quercus Technologies
Description:
Experts in parking guidance systems and LPR cameras and parking sensors manufacturers. Quercus Technologies is a consolidated company in the parking sector with installations worldwide in more than 60 airports, 80 shopping centers, hotels, universities, public institutions, hospitals, condominiums, and offices.

The know-how, the experience in the market and the quality of its products and services are the main assets that position Quercus Technologies as a world reference in license plate recognition, vehicle detection and parking guidance systems, offering optimal solutions for any type of parking facilities, maximizing the efficiency in its management and improving the customers’ parking experience.

Name: DMF Lighting
Description:
DMF brings a creative approach to lighting and offers industry-leading technology that sets the bar for performance, quality, and flexibility. Our in-house research and development team designs products that provide exceptional aesthetics and are modular, which allows our lights to adapt easily to project changes. DMF award-winning LED lights produce accurate color rendering, smooth dimming and have low power consumption. They complement and enhance how a room looks and feels without sacrificing energy efficiency. 

At DMF, we understand that light is more than illumination; light is what makes a space beautiful, useful and, ultimately, enjoyable.

Name: Epson Southeast Asia
Description:
Epson is a global technology company best known for printers and projectors, as well as industrial robots, sensing systems and other electronic components. Our core technologies include the proprietary Micro Piezo inkjet printing and 3LCD projection technologies that are known for their high quality output, as well as our compact, high-performance QMEMS crystal devices.

Founded in Japan more than 70 years ago, our company has now established a firm presence in communities worldwide. A Southeast Asia headquarters in Singapore was established in 1982 and Epson has since developed a strong presence across an extensive network of 18 countries in the region.

Name: R&B Switchgear Group
Description:
Since its establishment in 1985, R&B Switchgear Group has supported an international client base through the delivery of essential LV/MV & HV switchgear services, ensuring the reliability and operation of power distribution systems worldwide.

Recognised as a leading electrical service provider, R&B Switchgear Group incorporates a global network of offices, operating in just about every major industry sector, from Marine and Oil & Gas, to Rail, Energy and Construction.

The Group’s portfolio of services & solutions includes:

- Switchgear Design & Manufacture
- Installation & Commissioning
- Protection Testing
- Retrofits, Upgrades & Extensions
- Repairs & Modifications
- Planned Preventative Maintenance
- Whipp & Bourne
- Service Agreements
- 24hr Emergency Callout
- Thermographic Windows/Surveys
- Partial Discharge Testing/Monitoring Solutions

With a strong track record of taking on complex switchgear and power distribution projects, R&B Switchgear Group’s experience and knowledge ensures all work is completed to a high standard and in line with ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001 procedures.

Name: Midtronics
Description:
Founded in 1984, Midtronics’ entire focus is developing and producing leading edge battery management equipment and services for the global automotive industry.  Our advancements in testing, diagnostic charging, monitoring, and analytics have provided value across the entire battery lifecycle in automotive, heavy truck and motor sport industries.

Midtronics has a proven track record of helping our customers exceed their service and vehicle quality, battery warranty, and battery sales objectives.  Since the introduction of electric vehicles, Midtronics have enabled our customers to become service ready for lithium-ion batteries in hybrid and electric vehicles. Partnering with automotive manufacturers around the world, our maintenance equipment has become essential tools for dealers servicing all vehicles.

Our team listens to the needs of customers. Our curiosity fosters innovation.  Midtronics has the products, technology, and expertise needed to help our customers profitably manage their battery business.

Name: Yale Home
Description: Yale is trusted by millions of people every day to keep what`s important to them safe. Their homes, families and belongings. Our innovations have protected homes and given peace of mind for over 184 years.

Name: Electro Industries / GaugeTech
Description:
For over 45 years, Electro Industries/GaugeTech has been a leader in innovation and technological advancements in the areas of energy management and power monitoring.  Today, EIG continues to create ground-breaking technological developments that deliver results to our customers. We believe that data is the future of energy management and have brought these data focused technological developments along with our highly accurate energy metering to help our customers become energy efficient and improve their power reliability.
 
Our integrated approach to energy and power-related information management is led by our EnergyPQA.com Cloud-based Energy Management solution, which unites all of EIG’s energy monitoring expertise into a comprehensive energy management platform. EnergyPQA.com provides energy analytics and AI based predictions, reducing costs while improving power system reliability. It also surpasses traditional energy management systems by adding energy prediction engines and deep insights into power quality. It is fully compatible with EIG’s widely used Shark and Nexus meters series, as well as energy management software.

EIG has always been a proud American manufacturer and continues to be one today. EIG meters are assembled in the United States, at our manufacturing facility in Westbury, New York. We have an extensive quality control process in place that includes multiple inspections and rigorous testing procedures to ensure quality products are delivered to our customers.

Name: SGB-SMIT POWER MATLA
Description: SGB-Smit Power Matla is owned by SGB-Smit, the number one medium-sized manufacturer of transformers in Europe and Power Matla (a local black empowered company). Power and distribution transformers for the African continent are manufactured by SGB-Smit Power Matla at its operations in Pretoria West and Cape Town. Additionally transformer accessories which include transformer insulation and copper bars are manufactured in Pretoria West by SGB-Smit Calidus.

Name: Unionaire Group Technology - UGT
Description:
UGT is a reputable parent company that oversees a diversified portfolio of distinguished home appliances manufacturing brands; Unionaire and Premium.

The company has a rich history, having been in operation since 1995, and is widely recognized for its commitment to producing innovative, high-quality products.
Using the latest technology in our factories, we ensure that our air conditioning systems, cookers, refrigerators, deep freezers, heaters, and washing machines are among the best in the ME.

As a prominent manufacturer and distributor of home, we are committed to providing our customers with an exceptional shopping experience.

UGT is proud of its achievements and unwavering dedication to quality and innovation, and we are confident that we will continue to lead the home appliance market for many years to come.

Name: Gupta Power Infrastructure Limited
Description:
Gupta Power Infrastructure Ltd is a time-honored name in the manufacturing dome with its array of Cables & Conductors. An ISO 9001:2008 & 14001:2004 OHSAS 18001:2007 accredited company, GPIL has striven over 50 years succeeding in its quest for meeting prompt customer demands through its stern quality control & ceaseless effort of diversified product mix. With the Star Export House Certification that stands proof to our Export activities, GPIL has soared to newer heights by achieving a record turnover of more than USD 250 million at the end of financial year 2011-2012. 

Gupta Power offers a single window solution for all types of Electrical needs through its inimitable product offering that includes Overhead Conductors, HT-LT Power Cables upto 66 KV, Instrumentation Cables, Mining Cables, Thermocouple Cables, Airfield Lighting Cables, Railway Signaling Cables & Specialized Cables. With its own EPC Division, GPIL provides the turnkey solutions to Power Infrastructure Projects. 
With the installation of CCV lines procured from TROESTER Germany & by entering into strategic agreement with “Mercury Cables & Energy” of USA for manufacturing HTLS, Gupta Power has sailed through myriad of oddities with its stead-fast working culture & has surfaced with better sagacity of exhilaration with progressively amplified Sales Volume & is the Profit Earner by far that adds to its Testimony par Brilliance.

Name: Wasion
Description:
Founded in 2000 and listed on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HK3393) in 2005,  Wasion Holdings Limited (referred to as Wasion) is a leading IoT solutions and operations service provider in Smart Energy Metering, Intelligent Power Distribution, Energy Efficiency Management, and Smart Utilities. The company's portfolio covers various energy metering products—such as electricity, water, gas, and heat meters—as well as smart energy devices, innovative energy storage equipment, and system solutions.  

Wasion has been actively exploring global markets, and its products have been exported to more than 50 countries. Wasion owns and operates multiple manufacturing plants globally to ensure efficiency in production and on-time delivery of high-quality products and services.

Name: Cincinnati Test Systems
Description:
Cincinnati Test Systems Inc. is a leader in the design and manufacture of leak test and function test instruments, with custom solutions for a wide range of manufacturing operations. CTS serves a diverse cross section of industries, including Transportation, Energy, Medical Devices, Consumer Products,  Industrial, HVAC-R and more.

CTS is part of TASI Test and Automation's Product Integrity segment.

Name: Topcon Agriculture
Description:
Topcon Agriculture provides advanced IoT connected field and farm management solutions for aftermarket and OEM customers in the agriculture industry, integrating high-precision hardware, software and data to bring efficiency and enhance productivity to every phase of the farming operations. Topcon Agriculture has a full portfolio of solutions.  Product lines include Topcon, Digi-Star, Norac, and RDS Technology.

Over the course of more than 40 years, Topcon, Digi-Star, NORAC, Wachendorff Elektronik and RDS Technology solutions have implemented a unique vision of providing innovative, easy-to-use technology that improves decision making, efficiency, and productivity to solve challenges on farms around the globe. Now as one, Topcon Agriculture provides a complete, full-season precision farming platform based on modularity of systems and components.

Today, Internet of Things (IoT) is providing new options to face the global food challenge. In the era of smart, connected products, agricultural IoT improves operational efficiency and drives productivity. Our mission is the smart integration of information and our technology to constantly improve productivity to create sustainable agriculture. Through IoT, sustainability becomes synonymous with profit.

Name: DEHN SE
Description:
DEHN, headquartered in Neumarkt i.d.OPf., Germany, develops and manufactures devices for the reliable protection of persons, buildings, electrical and electronic systems against the effects of lightning and surges.

Thanks to our pioneering spirit we have been pushing developments in the fields of surge protection, lightning protection and safety equipment for more than 100 years, making us a trusted expert in these fields. At the same time, we are continuously expanding our international activities. With 20 subsidiaries and sales offices throughout the world, our sales activities are adapted to suit country-specific conditions and include active pre-marketing, short delivery times as well as product availability thanks to modern logistics.

DEHN protects. The slogan of our company has been both an obligation and an incentive for the past four generations of our family-owned company. A promise we keep with expertise and dedication – for the benefit of our customers, partners and employees.

Legal Notice: http://de.hn/imprint

Name: Pulse Electronics Corporation
Description:
PULSE is a global leader in the design and manufacturing of passive electronic components and brings over 60 years of innovation experience and a legacy of leadership in technology, design, and manufacturing.

PULSE
PULSE’s broad portfolio includes power and networking magnetics, current sensing components, cable harnesses, power supplies, antennas, and connectors. These products serve a global customer base, including market leaders in Communications, Computing, Consumer, Industrial, IoT, and Transportation sectors. These solutions enable critical applications such as hybrid and electric vehicles, 5G mobile network systems, smart grids, wearables, lighting, cell phones, data centers, wireless charging, industrial automation equipment, and security systems. With offices and manufacturing locations in ten countries across three continents, PULSE maintains a true global presence while ensuring localized responsiveness to its worldwide customer base. As a subsidiary of YAGEO Corporation and part of YAGEO Group, PULSE emphasizes a culture of innovation, encouraging customers, partners, and employees to think outside the box, push boundaries, and leverage their strengths to sustain its role as a cutting-edge industry leader.

YAGEO Group, headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan, is a global leader in electronic components, delivering reliable, innovative solutions for diverse industries. Leveraging the strengths of YAGEO, KEMET, PULSE, and Telemecanique Sensors, we provide industry-leading resistors, capacitors, inductors, magnetics, and sensors that drive advancements in automotive, aerospace, telecommunications, and industrial sectors.
Our mission is to forge sustainable partnerships by harnessing our global scale, diverse product portfolio, and innovative team. We aim to shape an interconnected future through technological excellence and customer-focused solutions.

Name: Moog Music Inc
Description: Moog Music is the leading manufacturer of analog synthesizers in the world.  Our Employee-owned company and its customers carry on the legacy of our founder, electronic musical instrument pioneer, Dr. Bob Moog.

Name: Bulgin
Description:
Bulgin is widely recognised as a leading manufacturer of environmentally sealed connectors and components. With over 95 years of experience in the industry, Bulgin continues to innovate and develop products and services to cater for its global customer base across a variety of markets.

In 2016, Bulgin announced the strategic incorporation of sister company Arcolectric into its business offering. This brings together two complementary product portfolios to make Bulgin a more comprehensive and wider reaching provider of engineered solutions to meet the needs of the industry. In addition, the integration has expanded Bulgins expertise across a broader range of components, particularly electromechanical switches.

Our popular Buccaneer Circular Connector range is well known in the industry for providing reliable, robust connections for power, signal and data in challenging environments.

To find out more please visit: www.bulgin.com

Name: Cabcon India Limited
Description:
Cabcon India Limited is an ISO 9001:2015, 14001:2015, and 45001:2018 certified company specializing in the manufacturing of aluminium conductors, HT/LT power & control cable, and LT AB cables, alongside turnkey EPC solutions for power transmission and distribution.

Established in 1991 and headquartered in Kolkata, we operate state-of-the-art manufacturing units in Kolkata and Howrah, enabling fully integrated, quality-controlled production at scale. With a presence in over 20+ Indian states and global approvals across Asia and Africa, Cabcon supports both government and private sector projects in powering homes, industries, and communities.

Our EPC division has successfully executed critical rural electrification and substation projects under major Government of India programs. Known for reliability, precision, and on-time delivery, we are an approved vendor for leading utilities including PGCIL, NTPC, CESC, DVC, and several state DISCOMs.
Driven by a belief that infrastructure is the foundation of national growth, Cabcon continues to build power networks that are strong, scalable, and future-ready, enabling connection where it matters most

Explore more: www.cabconindia.com

Name: Legero Lighting
Description: Founded in 2009, LEGERO Lighting is a proudly Made-in-India LED lighting manufacturer with a clear mission: to deliver high-performance lighting solutions that combine innovation, aesthetics, and sustainability. With in-house R&D, a state-of-the-art testing lab, and an ISO-certified manufacturing facility, LEGERO is equipped to engineer tailored lighting solutions. Driven by a vision to be a globally recognised leader in lighting technology,  we have executed over 5,000 projects, including landmark installations at IGI Airport Delhi, Kathmandu Airport, and the Chandigarh Municipal Corporation.

Name: Nanolumens
Description:
Founded in 2006, Nanolumens is a world-class LED display designer and manufacturer headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. Nanolumens serves multiple market segments from retail experience and higher education to transportation and themed entertainment; helping organizations add wonder to physical spaces. 

With a bold and visionary team of experts Nanolumens will take your project from concept to reality, bringing your creative vision to life, and leaving a first and lasting impression. We Are LED

Build your custom LED project: www.nanolumens.com/nanodesigner

Name: Rigaku
Description:
Since its inception in 1951, Rigaku has been at the forefront of analytical and industrial instrumentation technology. Today, with hundreds of major innovations to their credit, the Rigaku Group of Companies are world leaders in the fields of general X-ray diffraction (XRD), thin film analysis (XRF, XRD and XRR), X-ray fluorescence spectrometry (TXRF, EDXRF and WDXRF), small angle X-ray scattering (SAXS), protein and small molecule X-ray crystallography, Raman spectroscopy, X-ray optics, semiconductor metrology (TXRF, XRF, XRD and XRR), X-ray sources, computed tomography, nondestructive testing and thermal analysis.

With Rigaku's vast understanding of X-ray and its complementary technologies as a foundation, our true strength is seen in an unparalleled willingness to collaborate with customers. By promoting partnerships, dialog, and innovation within the global scientific and industrial communities, Rigaku demonstrates a relentless commitment to providing our client markets with fully integrated solutions.

The company and its employees are dedicated to developing and supplying universities, industry, and government labs with the ultimate in customer-focused integrated solutions across a wide variety of disciplines, including structural proteomics, nanoengineering research, general purpose X-ray diffraction (XRD) and spectroscopy (XRF), materials analysis and quality assurance.

Whether supplying the tools to create better semiconductor chips, enabling drug discovery, improving production line quality, or exploring the new frontier of nanotechnology, Rigaku products and services lead with innovation.

Rigaku employs over 1,400 people worldwide in operations based in Japan, the U.S., Europe and China. We value our people. Our value comes from them. Close collaboration between our users and employees sets the direction and focus of our work, allowing us to address customers' needs and stay close to the market place.

Name: Günsan Elektrik
Description:
Günsan Elektrik, 30 yıl önce yerel bir firma olarak çıktığı yolculuğuna, 2014 yılında Schneider Electric tarafından satın alınmasıyla artık global bir güçle devam etmektedir. Schneider Electric’in global pozitif katkılarını yerel tecrübesiyle harmanlayan Günsan Elektrik, gündelik hayata dokunan inovatif ürünleri ile paydaşları için artı değer yaratmayı amaçlamaktadır.  

Günsan Elektrik, son teknoloji otomasyon sistemine sahip endüstriyel tesisinde evrensel kalite ve standartlarda anahtar-priz üretimi gerçekleştirmektedir. 

50'den fazla ülkeye yaptığı ihracat ile dünyanın önemli coğrafyalarına ulaşan Günsan Elektrik, artan verimlilik ve satış figürleri ile Türkiye kalkınmasına olanak sağlayan firmalar arasında yer almaktadır. 

Türkiye’deki yeni nesil yaşam alanları ve konut uygulamaları için bir numaralı elektrik tesisat ürünleri çözüm ortağı olmayı ve Türkiye’yi uluslararası pazarlarda gururla temsil etmeyi hedefleyen Günsan Elektrik, hem yerel hem de uluslararası pazarlarda rekabet eden “glokal” bir marka olma yolunda emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir.

Name: Hanna Instruments Chile

Hanna Instruments es una empresa multinacional dedicada a la fabricación y distribución de tecnologías para el control de calidad del agua y de alimentos.


Una empresa Internacional con más de 40 años de trayectoria, con  presencia en más de 50 países.   Cuenta con su Casa Matriz en EE.UU y fábrica en Rumania, son el resultado de ser líderes en desarrollo y tecnología de sus propios productos.

Name: Abu Tawileh Group
Description:
تطور، تكنولوجيا، تحديات، وفرص هي القوى الدافعة التي تدفعنا لنكون في حركة مستمرة وفتح آفاق جديدة. كل يوم نخطو خطوات جديدة، ونفتح مسارات جديدة، ونتطور في مواجهة المستقبل.

كل شيء بدأ في عام 1972، بشغف لتحويل الحياة اليومية، وعادات الاستهلاك، والطريقة التي نعيش بها.

نحن، في أبو طويلة، نسعى باستمرار للتفوق من خلال اعتماد منتجات وخدمات فريدة من نوعها عامًا بعد عام. اليوم نتنافس مع تسارع التكنولوجيا والابتكار، وأصبحنا واحدة من الشركات الرائدة في السوق الأردنية التي توفر التكنولوجيا الرقمية والراحة الإبداعية.

في أبو طويلة، نعزز، ونسرع، ونبني علاقة دائمة مع العلامات التجارية التي نمثلها، مثل أريستون، هايسنس، لا جيرمانيا، أوبرا، فيليبس، فيستل، بالإضافة إلى علامتنا الخاصة كونتي.

Name: Optoma

Experience more.

With customer needs and the user experience at the centre of everything we do, Optoma’s projection, LED and interactive flat panel display products combine superior image processing technologies with exceptional engineering and innovation to deliver stunning crystal clear images with ultimate reliability. 

Designed for professional AV and home entertainment, our award-winning projectors use DLP technology, pioneered by Texas Instruments.

The Optoma Group has continental headquarters in Europe, the USA and Asia Pacific. Optoma Europe, based in London, covers Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA). Local services are delivered from multiple offices across this region.

We are Altawakol NTT, one of the pioneer electrical equipment manufacturers in Egypt and a member of Altawakol Group since 1996. Name: MIC Electronics Ltd
Description:
MIC Electronics Limited. is a global leader in the design, development & manufacturing of LED Video Displays,LED Luminaires, high-end Electronic and Telecommunication equipment and development of Telecom software since 1988. An ISO 9001: 2000 certified, it has marked presence in the highly dynamic domains of:

    *  Embedded, System and Telecom software
    *  Communication and Electronic Products

Today, MIC's flagship products are LED Video Displays (indoor / outdoor / mobile), that have become an integral part of Sports Stadiums, Transportation Hubs, Digital Theatres and Theme Parks, Advertisements and Public Information Displays.

Headquartered at one of the fastest emerging IT cities, Hyderabad (India), it has nation wide presence in the form of a vast network of marketing, sales and service support centres in all metros of India. To meet the demand of its products worldwide, it has offices in Australia,Korea and USA. Now the company is gradually setting up operations in other international markets.

Name: Gantner
Description:
Gantner is one of the main three core brands that constitute a unique brand platform: SALTO WECOSYSTEM.

Gantner develops reliable and smart identification in the fields of electronic access control, smart locker systems, and cashless payment that automate and digitize business processes, optimizing organizational efficiency and security.

Established in 1982, Gantner has been at the forefront of contactless Near Field Communication (NFC) electronic technology, setting industry standards with innovative solutions. ISO certified for quality, environmental, and information security management, Gantner is acclaimed for innovation and employee-friendly practices. With a flat hierarchy and emphasis on initiative, we foster a creative and learning-driven work environment.

Make sure to also follow our other two main core brands:

Salto — continues to lead the way in pioneering building access, identity management, and electronic locking technology that ensures a secure, smart, and seamless user experience.

Vintia — specializes in ticketing and booking systems that revolutionize the customer experience in the leisure and attractions sector.
 
For further information, please check out our website at www.gantner.com and our official brand platform at www.saltowecosystem.com.

Name: Rallis India Limited(A Tata Enterprise)
Description: Rallis India Limited(A Tata Enterprise) is an electrical/electronic manufacturing company based out of Bellevista, C-803, Plot 46-47-48,Sector-15, Cbd-Belapur, Navi , Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

Name: Porsche E-Bike Performance
Description:
Porsche E-Bike Performance was founded to drive the transformation of mobility with smart, innovative electrical solutions. We now house a unique pool of expertise with e-bike drive system specialist FAZUA, Croatian software and connectivity innovator Greyp and, of course, all the knowledge, research and experience from the Porsche family.

In Ottobrunn near Munich, two brands develop and produce advanced drive systems: FAZUA with the focus on pioneering compact lightweights for agile e-bikes and under the brand name Porsche exceptionally powerful drive systems that will be offered to the industry mid-decade.

Name: CPE Tecnologia
Description:
A CPE Tecnologia atua no mercado de soluções para geotecnologia desde 1974. Somos distribuidores exclusivos no Brasil das melhores empresas do mundo em seus segmentos.

Estamos presentes em todas as regiões do Brasil, com 09 unidades, atendendo com eficácia todo o país. Todo produto adquirido na CPE conta com suporte e treinamento de uma equipe especializada treinada pela fabrica, proporcionando aos clientes soluções rápidas com excelência.

Pensando na qualificação técnica e melhora da competitividade dos profissionais e empresas do mercado de geotecnologias, realizamos cursos que são ministrados em nossas unidades por profissionais altamente capacitados. Os participantes dos nossos cursos tem acesso aos mais avançados e tecnológicos software e equipamentos do mercado.

A Assistência Técnica é um dos diferenciais da CPE. Nossos profissionais são capacitados pelos fabricantes e possuem todo o conhecimento necessário para efetuar reparos nos equipamentos que vendemos e alugamos.

Temos  a solução ideal para atender você e sua empresa. Entre em contato conosco e converse com nossos consultores.

Name: ETS-Lindgren
Description:
ETS-Lindgren is the leading supplier of energy management solutions for the industrial and commercial markets. Our global team of 750 professionals design and manufacture the electromagnetic and acoustic energy components and systems that make many aspects of modern life possible. 

For 75 years, ETS-Lindgren has cut across industries and market sectors to create a track record of success through such innovations as: 

●  Systems that control unintended electromagnetic energy emissions.
●  Tools that analyze and measure the performance of wireless devices before they go to market.
●  Microwave chambers used to test military aircraft before they are put into operation.
●  Facilities that enable physicians to obtain MRI images and perform surgery in the same room.
●  Safety monitoring solutions for utility workers who are exposed to electromagnetic fields when they climb telecom and broadcast towers.

Many of today's items create, use, or are affected by electromagnetic, magnetic, or acoustic energy. To make sure things work together harmoniously in the same environment, testing has to be done according to established compliance and performance standards. ETS-Lindgren is the company that designs and manufactures the test systems that make our electronics-infused lifestyle a reality. 


Since 1993, ETS-Lindgren has been part of the ESCO Technologies’ (NYSE ESE) portfolio. This worldwide partnership ensures ETS-Lindgren has robust financial backing and resources to invest in operational efficiencies, as well as long-term industry research and development.

ETS-Lindgren | Beyond Measure

Like us on Facebook: facebook.com/ETSLindgren
Follow us on Twitter: twitter.com/ETSLindgren
Subscribe to our channel on YouTube: youtube.com/c/etslindgrenvideo

Name: Light Conversion
Description:
LIGHT CONVERSION is a global leader in ultrafast technology, designing and manufacturing femtosecond lasers, wavelength-tunable sources, optical parametric chirped-pulse amplifiers, microscopy sources, and spectroscopy systems. The comprehensive portfolio represents the best-in-class lasers tailored for industry, science, and medicine.

With over 9,000 systems installed worldwide – LIGHT CONVERSION drives innovation in ultrafast laser technology. The company’s lasers are used by all of the world's top 50 universities, highlighting its commitment to state-of-the-art research, while also ensuring the reliability and performance in 24/7 industrial applications. With international offices in the US, China, and Korea, along with a global representative network, the company ensures worldwide sales and service.

Name: Fujikura Automotive America
Description:
The Fujikura Group offers a wide range of automotive products, including wire-harnesses, several types of sensors, and electronic products. Fujikura supports the business of automotive manufacturers around the globe, with a 3-polar service structure based on 97 overseas locations among 23 countries. 

Two Fujikura entities support the growing needs of automotive customers in North America—Fujikura Automotive America (“FAA”) and Fujikura America, Inc. (“FAI”).

Fujikura Automotive America, LLC (FAA) product line includes wire harnesses, joint box and main fuse box, air-bag harness (tubed wire), and high voltage cable and connectors for EV and HEV. Fujikura America Inc. (FAI) product line includes Wire Harness, Flexible Print Circuit, Membrane Switch technology, Connectors, Thermal Products, Wire, and Fiber Optic.

FAA's Michigan office directs the design and sales of wire-harnesses and our products are manufactured in Northern Mexico, Central Mexico, and South America. FAI's product base extends our manufacturing footprint to include Thailand, Japan, Vietnam, and China.

Fujikura’s first responsibility is to our customers. We help them sustain and develop their business by providing superior products and services through “Tsunagu” (Connecting) Technologies.

Name: NEXIA lighting
Description:
NEXIA is a Spanish led lightning company based in Barcelona that designs and manufactures LED lighting solutions based on quality, innovation and design.

We have a wide ranging catalogue of indoor and outdoor technical lighting products, including different series of LED downlights and LED floodlights.

Thanks to our permanent stock and our flexibility, we are currently working in Europe (France, Portugal, Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands, Poland, Macedonia, Norway, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Ireland, United Kingdom, etc.), South and Central America (Colombia, Panama, Mexico, Chile), Middle East (Abu Dhabi, Kuwait, Qatar and Jordan), North Africa (Morocco) and our international expansion continues every day.

In 2010 we exhibited for the first time in the sector trade fair Light + Building, in Frankfurt (Hall 3.0 – stand C10), alongside the most important companies in the sector. This year 2013 it was the third time.

In 2011, due to significant international development, we moved to new facilities boasting over 1800 square meters so we can maintain permanent stock and guarantee delivering goods within 2-3 days.

At NEXIA you will find a qualified, experienced and accessible team of professionals always ready to adapt our products to your requests and needs.

We love what we do (Love for Lighting) and this is reflected in the products and services that we offer.

Name: EGLO Leuchten
Description:
EGLO is a leading provider of lighting and home accessories. Founded in 1969, the family-owned company is headquartered in Tyrol, Austria, and has grown into a global market leader, now active in over 60 countries.

With around 4,500 employees worldwide, EGLO develops innovative designs and products every day. The company operates three of its own production facilities in Hungary, China, and India, and manages 18 logistics centers to ensure efficient distribution.

EGLO offers a broad, internationally available product range — from premium items to everyday essentials. This includes innovative lighting concepts, stylish decorative pieces, and high-performance fans. The company is also active in the project business, delivering tailored solutions for demanding construction projects where quality and design are top priorities.

As Europe’s market leader in decorative lighting, EGLO offers a portfolio of 50,000 products and sells nearly 100,000 lights every day. In 2024, the company generated €523 million in revenue.

With a strong focus on customer needs, EGLO’s vision is to combine modern design with high functionality — at fair prices and for every living situation. Feels like home.

Name: Electric Technology
Description:
Electric Technology offers high quality products and high efficient solutions for Factory and Process Automation .Close to customers through our three branches in Alex, sheraton in Cairo.
High quality products where we only offers Germany products and after sale services have made us the market leader in our field 
Electric Technology is an authorized Distributor for SIEMENS -  RITTAL-  PHOENIX - TURCK -  BANNER -  SENSOPART -  WERMA )-Schneider Panel Builder

Name: GK POWER EXPERTISE PVT LTD
Description:
GK EXPERTISE is a Leading Manufacture in Transmission & Distribution Equipment of Power Transformer, Current Transformer, OLTC, Control & Relay Panels, MV Switchgears, Lighting Arrestor, Disconnector, Load Break Switch and Earth Switch.

We works closely with utility, industry, transport and infrastructure customers globally with digital technologies
Products:

2.	Switchgears 
3.	Current Transformer 
4.	Potential Transformer 
5.	Disconnector 
6.	Lighting Arrestor 
7.	Control & Relay Panels 
Services: 
1.	Testing & Commissioning 
2.	Detailed Engineering 
3.	Protection & Automation 
4.	Substation Automation System 
5.	Diagnostic Testing .

Name: SHIBLI
Description:
Established in 2012, SHIBLI is an International Manufacturer specialized in designing and manufacturing of Security Systems. With our innovative and cutting-edge products, we aim to contribute to the global surveillance security industry.

Our thermal imaging cameras and equipment are state-of-art and built to the highest technological standards to unlock the future of effective and convenient solutions for our clients.

Name: Danfoss Editron
Description:
Danfoss Editron is changing the way the world moves with electric and hybrid powertrain systems for the marine, off-highway and transportation sectors.

A business division of Danfoss, the company develops and manufactures high-performance power systems for heavy-duty and commercial vehicles, machines and marine vessels. Based on synchronous reluctance assisted permanent magnet technology, our unique approach delivers maximum efficiencies, reduced size and weight, plus continual improvements for our customers. The sophisticated software behind our system controls and optimizes each individual component of an electric or hybrid drivetrain, leading to more intelligent management of power distribution.

With operations in Lappeenranta, Finland and Colorado, United States of America, Danfoss Editron has assembled an award-winning team to work on the technologies that will enable the world of tomorrow to do more with less.

Name: Merus Power
Description:
Merus Power is a technology company headquartered in the city of Ylöjärvi, Finland where we design and manufacture innovative Finnish battery energy storage systems and power quality solutions. Scalable and modular power electronics, intelligent software technologies, and electrical engineering expertise are the base of our business. Our innovative Merus technology enables the use of our products and services in a wide range of different application needs.

We accelerate the renewable energy transition by enabling easy grid connection, ensuring grid stability and grid code compliance. Our energy storage system supports the grid by balancing production and consumption while allowing participation in the Frequency Reserve markets. We turn the challenges of renewable energy into a brand-new source of income.

Our power quality solutions reduce electrical disruptions caused by poor power quality, improving the profitability and energy efficiency of customers’ operations, and achieving significant energy and cost savings. In addition, by enabling better power quality in industrial and commercial applications, we contribute to the reduction of CO2 emissions and help customers achieve their sustainability goals.

We provide a wide range of support services together with our local and global partner network. Our Merus Services ensure the return and optimal operation of our customers’ investments throughout their life cycle.

Our growth is supported by global megatrends such as climate and emission targets from public and private players, green transition with various related investment programs, and sustainability goals. Our customer base is diverse and consists of players in the fields of industry, power generation, and renewable energy, among others.

Join us in creating a more sustainable and energy-efficient future!

Name: ZPUE S.A.
Description:
Tworzymy nowoczesne rozwiązania dla energetyki i przemysłu. Realizujemy zamówienia inwestorów z sektora użyteczności publicznej, przemysłu oraz infrastruktury w Polsce i na świecie. 
Korzystamy przy tym z wiedzy i doświadczenia, które ZPUE zdobywa od 35 lat. 
Tworzymy nie tylko niezawodne rozwiązania, ale jesteśmy także jednym z najlepszych pracodawców na rynku świętokrzyskim i właścicielem kilku zakładów w kraju: Włoszczowa, Katowice, Gliwice, Pszczyna. 
Zatrudniamy blisko 3000 osób w naszych oddziałach, fabrykach i biurach sprzedaży. 
Firma od lat realizuje strategię zrównoważonego rozwoju, systematycznie umacniając swoją pozycję i dywersyfikując zakres działań na rynku elektroenergetycznym. 
Elastyczność i umiejętność szybkiego reagowania na zmiany zachodzące w rynkowym otoczeniu pozwalają nam konkurować ze światowymi koncernami i z sukcesem realizować nietypowe zamówienia europejskich i krajowych inwestorów.

Name: Addionics
Description:
Addionics is a growing, progressive startup based in Israel, the UK and the US. 
Addionics provides specialised improved rechargeable batteries by redesigning their architecture. With a novel and patent pending 3D metal fabrication method, we enhance performance, mileage, safety, cost and charging time of batteries. Addionics architecture work with current and emerging LIB technology. In short - we are betting on the race, not the horse. So whatever battery chemistry wins, our technology will enhance it yet further. There are two sides to the company - hardware making smart 3D current collectors, and software where AI will optimise given structures for given performance attributes.

Name: Midal Cables
Description:
Midal Cables was established in 1977 conceived between Intersteel, Bahrain and Olex Cables, Australia to manufacture Aluminium Rod and Overhead Electrical Transmission Cables, Conductors.

Since then, the company has developed into a significant player in the Aluminium and Electrical Transmission Industry in Kingdom of Bahrain. Its growth has contributed to the industrialization of Bahrain and Gulf countries while promoting a national skilled workforce within the company.

Midal supplies the world market with Rod Cast from the molten Aluminium delivered directly from Aluminium Bahrain (ALBA) Smelter adjacent to its manufacturing plant. The liquid Aluminium is exceptionally pure which allows Midal to cast Rod and further production of Wires and exceptionally high conductivity in various grades of Transmission Cables. Midal's EC grade and 6201 Alloy Rod are sold around the world as well as being used in-house to manufacture a full range of Overhead Electrical Conductors and Aluminum Wires. 

Midal has participated in numerous transmission and distribution projects, meeting the most stringent technical standards and supply requirements. Midal has continued a policy of investment in the most up-to-date Technology for its manufacturing plant and has put a great emphasis on work force training to ensure the technical excellence to manufacture its products.

Over 40 Years of Success, Midal Cables is still looking forward...

Name: Stelpro
Description: Stelpro is a family business founded in 1981, recognized in the electric heating, heated floors and electronic controls industry. A North American leader in its sector, Stelpro offers quality heating products, designed and manufactured in Quebec, combining optimal performance, safe use and innovative design.

Name: Diehl Controls
Description:
Diehl Controls is a worldwide leading supplier in the appliance industry. With over 75 years of experience, more than 3,500 employees and annual sales of around 500 million euros, we are today delivering millions of electronic systems. Our products are used worldwide in washing machines, heat pumps, refrigerators, battery systems, IoT products and in the IoT infrastructure. We develop and manufacture products, for our customers, according to their individual wishes. In doing so, we fulfil both in development and in production the highest standards – and our solutions help every customer to move forward quickly. With this in mind, we have been implementing highly successful inverters with key players from the HVAC/R sector since 2009. In addition, we support our customers advance by digitizing their products and services with new Industrial IoT solutions. We are proud that our technical solutions are convincing and that our customers confirm our excellent price-performance ratio.

Imprint: 
https://www.diehl.com/controls/en/imprint-and-legal-notice
https://www.diehl.com/controls/en/data-protection

Name: Teltonika EMS
Description:
At TLT, we are dedicated to meeting the diverse electronics manufacturing needs of product owners. Our vertically integrated manufacturing companies network comprises five state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities, complemented by sourcing offices in Europe and Hong Kong. This strategic presence enables us to maintain a robust database of suppliers, established direct manufacturer contacts, and audited quality assurance for all components. 

Our facilities are equipped with advanced SMT lines and selective soldering machines, ensuring efficient and precise automated assembly. We provide a comprehensive range of services, including printed circuit board assembly, testing, and box-building. 

In 2025, our company group TLT proudly expanded our capabilities by opening one of the largest PCB manufacturing factories in Europe TLT PCB, alongside a cutting-edge plastic injection, moulding, and tooling plant TLT MECHANICS. At TLT, we are committed to delivering high-quality solutions that drive innovation and success for our partners. 

Want to learn more? Contact us

Name: Universal Group
Description: www.universalgroup.org

Name: SINBON Electronics Co., Ltd.
Description:
Established in 1989, SINBON empowers industries through intelligent connectivity and sustainable innovation—enabling cleaner mobility, ethical automation, and renewable energy, while advancing technology with purpose and care for the planet.

Our commitment to ESG drives this mission. We continually strengthen carbon management and pursue sustainable innovation, working hand in hand with our partners to spark positive cycles, generate diverse value, and deliver trusted green solutions with lasting impact.

With a presence across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, our global team shares a common mission: to make innovation inseparable from sustainability, and progress inseparable from care.
Location: New Taipei City, New Taipei City

Name: Beyonder
Description:
Beyonder is a leading battery technology company established in 2016 that develops sustainable and high-power battery solutions for the future. The company has developed, qualified and certified its own product, based on its proprietary recipe, called BePowered. The BePowered products contribute to the green transition through it’s cost-effective, environmentally friendly, and energy-efficient properties. Beyonder has available an annual production capacity up to 5 GWh. 

Beyonder proudly commit to sustainability throughout the entire value chain, as we focus on sustainable materials in their cell design. The goal is to accelerate the use of electricity in the industry by offering high-performance energy storage systems that are both modern and sustainable, created for the energy needs of the future. The company is located in Stavanger, Norway.

Name: Ocean Optics
Description:
Ocean Optics pioneered miniature spectrometers and delivers spectral solutions to researchers, OEMs and industrial customers, also designs and builds industrial-grade photonics systems for material inspection, chemical identification and quality assurance.

Our mission is to lead in creating precise yet practical optical solutions that enable researchers and industry to solve meaningful problems in health, safety and the environment. We have discovered, refined and delivered new approaches to solving problems with spectroscopy and imaging technologies. Backed by deep experience, we are working within applications including academia & research, energy, environmental, food & agriculture, general manufacturing, medical technology, pharmaceutical, semiconductor, and transportation. 

We partner with customers to achieve ambitious goals, leveraging the power of light for advancement in health, safety and the environment.


OUR HISTORY
Ocean Optics started in the late ‘80s, seeded by a federal grant for a marine pH sensor. As part of their work, the Ocean team needed a compact spectrometer to fit into a small, underwater housing, and were surprised to discover none existed. So, they made their own. Founder Mike Morris started the evolution of spectrometers from floor unit-sized to handheld.

By 1992, the “world’s first miniature spectrometer” ushered in a new way of utilizing spectroscopy. 

Today, our technologies have evolved, our offering has expanded, and our customers remain vital partners.

Name: Suyog Electricals Ltd. (SEPL_Cables)
Description:
SUYOG ELECTRICALS LTD. (SEPL_Cables), an ISO 9001:2008 Company engaged in manufacturing of the complete range of Power, Control, Signal, Instrumentation, Rubber &  PVDF Cables. The Company was incorporated in the year 1983  &  has since progressively established itself for the past 35 years. 

The Company has a vast experience in manufacturing cables right from the smallest size of 0.22 Sqmm to 1000 Sqmm & 1 Pair to 100 Pair both in Aluminum and Copper.  We are one of the pioneers in introducing KYNAR Insulated HMWPE Sheathed Cathodic Protection Cables for the first time in India and have executed various jobs in Cathodic Protection Systems.

We have fully integrated manufacturing system right from Wire drawing to PVC compound and Tinning facilities. 

We are one of  the leading cable companies in India with registrations, approvals & supplies to various Central government, State government and Private sectors.
Management is run by Technocrats having Engineering back ground with an experience of 20-25 years.

All our products are approved with various consultants & customers in different sectors due to its long presence in this industry.
The company has a strong proven track record in its supplies & quality.

Name: Narada
Description:
Narada, established in 1994 in Hangzhou/China, has become one of the leading battery manufacturers and global battery suppliers of the world.
The main business is the development, manufacturing, sales and service of communication backup, motive power and renewable energy storage batteries and accessories as also their system integration .
The leading products are highly reliable Lead Acid batteries of the VRLA type, Lithium-Ion cells and batteries and related components and subsystems.
These products are widely used in telecom, electric power, railway and other infrastructure industry and are also sought after to store efficiently renewable energy coming from photovoltaic energy and wind farms.

Narada has a strong focus on research and technological development to foster its growth and supply innovative solutions to its customers.
Its 200+ R&D staff and the large and well-equipped R&D facility in Linan/Hangzhou secure this goal. The in-house, CNAS accredited laboratory for battery testing and qualification activities facilitates obtaining the necessary type test approvals by its customers.

In order to remain close to the customers’ needs, Narada has established a global sales and services network. Next to the international home base staff in Hangzhou/China, Narada has local support activities in Argentina, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, UK and the USA so to provide fast planning support and efficient and high quality deliveries of battery products to over 150 countries of the world.

Any enquiry or further information required, please contact intl@naradapower.com

Name: SGS Tekniks Manufacturing Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
SGS Tekniks Manufacturing Pvt. Ltd. has been a preferred value creator for its customers over the last 30 years through innovative and efficient Electronic System Design & Manufacturing Services (ESDM). 

SGS Tekniks is a AS 9100D (Aviation, Space & Defence), ISO 13485 (Medical), IATF 16949 (Automotive), ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001 certified company for Electronic Manufacturing Services (EMS) and has four manufacturing locations in India along with design & development centres at Stuttgart, Germany and Gurgaon, India. The Plants 1 at Gurgaon (Haryana) & Pant 2 at Manesar (Haryana) are located near the New Delhi International airport, Plant 3 & 4 at Bangalore (Karnataka) and Plant 5 at Baddi (Himachal Pradesh). The company was set up by a group of 4 professionals in 1990, headquartered in Gurgaon, SGS Tekniks has emerged as one of the leading Electronic Manufacturing Services provider to OEMs of Global and Indian brands. Its expertise lies in Electronic Design Services, PCB Assemblies & Box Build Products. Name: PyroPIP (International) : Pre-ignition Electrical Fire Prevention
Description:
PIP Technology (PIPtech) consists of thermal devices and an entirely new to the world rationale which operates by sensing abnormal heat at electrical connection points caused by High Resistance Connections and joints (HRC/J).   In the world of fire safety,   PIP  is truly unique because it provides an unprecedented proactive solution to HRC/J related electrical fires which was innovated by David and Christine (Elaine) Heathcote (UK) the founders in December 2004 and later was further researched and developed for a manufacturing process by their overseas component manufacturers from 2006 with characteristics information being provided by David.

The  innovative technology behind PyroPIP allows it to activate at 85°C ±5° which is sufficiently above normal operating temperature to avoid nuisance activation, but well below the point at which smoke or ignition occurs. All other leading fire safety products currently available are reactive solutions, designed to limit the damage once a fire has started, be they sprinkler systems, fire alarms or fire extinguisher systems. 

PyroPIP was reformed in 2019 in Australia and is the champion of PIPtech solutions which is the trading name of the company.  We are responsible for the creation and development of an effective sales and marketing strategy for Australia, New Zealand, the UK, Spain, the USA,  and many other territories. 

PyroPIP's overall management and Head Office is now located in Australia and New Zealand and is no longer in the UK.  This is because opportunities and lawful conditions are far stricter and fairer, also the mission receives far better incentive and support under this new jurisdiction.  

PyroPIP is strongly committed to:

•	Increasing public awareness of PyroPIP and its life and property saving capabilities
•	Providing our valued customers and partners with exceptional service
•	Creating a productive, positive environment for our employees
•	Providing support to local communities and charities

Web site: https://www.hd-hyundaielectric.com/elect/en/index.jsp

Name: DBG Technology Co. Ltd.
Description:
DBG Holdings Limited, one of the leading players in China, is a global professional and reliable Electronics Manufacturing Service (EMS) provider in design, manufacturing, supply chain management and aftermarket services.

Being a top electronic information technology enterprise, DBG has registered and headquartered in Hong Kong, operated in Huizhou (close to Shenzhen and Hong Kong) since 1995.

DBG’s difference is in its flexible service, customer oriented concept by providing value added end-to-end solutions to enhance clients’ competitiveness and achieve success with well-established system, including ISO9001, ISO/TS16949, ISO 14001 and OHSAS 18001.

The core value in DBG is to service global customers with superior quality, competitive cost, timely delivery, satisfied service and eco-friendly environment.

Name: Service Wire Company
Description:
Service Wire is a multi-generation, family-owned wire and cable manufacturer and has been since 1968. We are committed to producing the finest quality American made products while providing industry-leading service levels.
 
Our nationwide network of distributors and advanced distribution capabilities enable us to meet and exceed the often-complex needs of industrial, commercial, utility, pump, and irrigation customers throughout North America and the world.

Name: Electronic Components Industry Association (ECIA)
Description:
Where the Electronics Supply Chain Comes Together

ECIA provides resources and opportunities for members to improve their business performance while enhancing the industry’s overall capacity for growth and profitability. From driving critical conversations and process optimization to product authentication and industry advocacy, ECIA is your trusted source for support, insight and action.

Bringing together the talent and experience of broad array of industry leaders and professionals representing all facets of the electronics components supply chain, ECIA is uniquely positioned to enable individual connection as well as industry-wide collaboration. As the supply chain becomes increasingly more complex, ECIA serves as a vital nexus for refinement and progress.

Expansion and uncertainty seem to be the only true constants in the electronics industry today. In this dynamically shifting environment, reliable market intelligence is at a premium. Because ECIA’s members are the marketplace, we provide a level of visibility into the supply chain otherwise unavailable. From individual anecdotes gleaned from conversations at an ECIA event, to our exclusive market reports, we help keep you in the know.

As an organization made up of the leading electronic component manufacturers, their manufacturer representatives and authorized distributors, ECIA members share a common goal of promoting and improving the business environment for the authorized sale of electronic components to the end customer. In doing so, we contribute to making the Americas region more competitive in the design and production of electronic goods.

Name: BURNDY
Description: Established in 1924, BURNDY, a Hubbell brand, is a global manufacturer of connectors, fittings, tools, and grounding and bonding solutions for electrical utilities, commercial, industrial and residential contractors, maintenance and repair companies, as well as the telecommunication and renewable energies market. Burndy connectors, fittings, tools, and grounding and bonding solutions are designed to meet power requirements across both electrical and utility applications.

Name: GreatWhite Global Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
It takes a brilliant vision and passion to turn a dream into reality. Welcome to the world of GreatWhite - pushing the boundaries to 'Go for Great'.

The group has been in the business for the last 5 decades, making its niche in the Indian FMEG industry. GreatWhite is constantly evolving and expanding its grounds with state-of-the-art manufacturing units in Haridwar and Valsad, finest technicians, esteemed designers and a determined product innovation team that continues to explore new horizons.

Based on the foundation of innovating for a brighter future, GreatWhite redefines norms and continues to change and transform the world of electricals.

From Electrical Wiring Devices (EWD), Wires & Cables, Circuit protection system (MCB/RCCB’s), Lighting & Luminaries to Switches & Accessories, every creation reflects our commitment to achieve the great.

Name: Dahua Technology Italy
Description:
Dahua Technology Italy Srl is the Italian branch of the Dahua Technology group, whose main offices are located in Hangzhou, China. Founded in 2001 by the independent entrepreneur Fu Liquan, Dahua is a world leader in the video surveillance industry.

On the first of February 2018 Dahua acquired Videotrend S.r.l., its historic Italian partner and point of reference for the Italian market in the distribution of professional video surveillance systems.

known for the patented HDCVI standard, right now we are focusing on emerging technologies such as big data, IA, cloud computing and IoT, to develop complete and innovative solutions, suitable for all markets.

Driven by the constant search of the highest quality standards and with a deep dedication to the unique needs of all customers we aim to build a safer and smarter world together with our partners.

Name: Collingwood Lighting
Description:
Collingwood Lighting is a design led business.  We believe in challenging the boundaries of light and exploring innovative ways to master it. There are more than a thousand people working around the world dedicated to fulfilling our vision to provide Collingwood Lighting customers with the best lighting solutions imaginable. 

Our dedicated team of trained lighting specialists are based at our Head Office, in the heart of the UK.  They are ready to offer advice, answer technical questions and advise on lighting schemes enabling you to make the right choice in lighting.

In this rapidly changing technological world we are determined to provide you with the lighting products you need to keep you at the cutting edge of your market.  Our forward thinking and sharp approach helps you do this.

And it's this approach that has led us to produce several firsts for the wholesale market:


•	First to design and manufacture LED lighting products for the UK Wholesale market.
•	First to produce sealed for life 100% waterproof, in-ground LED lighting products.
•	First to produce sealed for life outdoor lighting products.
•	First to produce a fit for purpose high performance, fire rated, LED downlight.
•	First to produce mains dimmable LED downlight.
•	First to produce an LED downlight that complies to all building regulations.
•	First to produce a fire, acoustic and moisture rated 360 degree eyeball style downlight.
•	First to offer a 7 year extended warranty on our products.

Name: TRONEX
Description:
Energy that transforms, innovation that drives.

At TRONEX, we have been converting energy into solutions that generate real impact on people and companies for more than 50 years. We were born in 1972 as a brand of CODISCOS batteries and, since 2000, we have evolved as an independent company, consolidating our position as a benchmark in innovation, business development and sustainability.

 Our business verticals:
 Mass Consumption: high-quality products in batteries, lighters, lighting, adhesives, stationery and smart home, with an omnichannel approach that boosts growth and return on investment.

 Through RECOPILA, we reaffirm our commitment to the planet, promoting the responsible disposal of batteries.

We innovate to lead the energy future of Colombia and the region.

Name: NHS Energia do Seu Jeito
Description: Com 35 anos de atuação, a fabricante de nobreaks NHS é líder de mercado na região sul do Brasil. A empresa está entre os três principais fabricantes preferidos pelo mercado industrial nas categorias de nobreaks, chegando a atingir o índice de 90% de satisfação dos clientes, segundo pesquisas. Em seu amplo portfólio de produtos, oferece diversas soluções para infraestrutura de servidores de informática, data centers, sistemas de telecom e CFTV, automação residencial, comercial e industrial; impressoras plotters, refrigeradores, semáforos, equipamentos de missão crítica, entre outros. A NHS possui capacidade de produção flexível com departamentos próprios de engenharia formados por especialistas em desenvolver produtos de acordo com a necessidade de cada projeto. Name: Rolec
Description:
Rolec is a multidivisional manufacturer with over 35 years of experience in the outdoor electrical equipment  industry. With divisions in EV charging, marina services and caravan hook-ups, Rolec's products can be seen across some of the most prestigious and well-established destinations in the world.

As the desire and demand for electric vehicles and charging infrastructure increases, Rolec remains one of the largest manufacturers and suppliers of EV charging points, providing both domestic and commercial properties with robust charging solutions. From serving blue chip corporations to independent businesses, Rolec has the solution for businesses and organisations of all shapes, sizes and disciplines. With a combination of OCPP compliant and compatible hardware and software, Rolec's smart solutions have supported numerous fleets, public destinations and workplaces with their electrification plans.

Name: Hexagon's Autonomy & Positioning division
Description:
At Hexagon, we don’t just measure the world – we define its future.  

As the global leader in measurement technologies, we provide the confidence that vital industries rely on to build, navigate, and innovate.   

From microns to Mars, our solutions drive productivity, quality, safety, and sustainability. 

Autonomy & Positioning solutions power intelligent positioning ecosystems in vital industries and safety-of-life applications, enabling the advancement of autonomy (cars, UAVs, industrial vehicles, trains, vessels, and more). The division includes leading brands NovAtel, Veripos, Antcom, and AutonomouStuff.

Measurement is the foundation of progress. When it has to be right, it has to be Hexagon.

With the addition of a new test lab in Hamburg in 2024, alongside the SGS testing facility in Madrid, XCharge Europe reinforces its commitment to the European market, enabling rigorous product testing, tailored solutions, and the advancement of e-mobility across the region.
