Description:
Originally founded in 1974, KLEMSAN ELECTRIC ELECTRONICS INC. is the first and the only manufacturer of DIN Rail Terminal Blocks in Turkey. Klemsan designs and manufactures innovative connection systems in electrical engineering and electronics, having a product portfolio including a wide variety of terminal blocks, automation products, marking systems, ethernet switches and power supplies. In 2017, Klemsan had also developed and launched its IoT platform, KIO (Klemsan Internet Objects), which provides customised energy management solutions. 

KLEMSAN, as an ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 50001, OHSAS 18001, IRIS certified manufacturer, offers a comprehensive product portfolio that complies with IEC directives and carries the VDE, ATEX, CE, UL, cUL, CSA, DNV and GOST-R approvals as a global passport to the international markets. 

KLEMSAN has become a global brand thanks to continuous investments and worldwide distribution network consisting of 7 offices in Turkey and 12 offices all around the globe. With global presence in 107 countries, Klemsan provides integrated and customised solutions, combining its design and manufacturing capabilities in automation, energy and software.

Name: Electro-Voice Official
Description:
For over 90 years, Electro‑Voice has designed and engineered leading‑edge sound reinforcement solutions — products that empower the performer, exceed the expectations of the audio professional and elevate the audience experience.

We have a passion for sound quality without compromise that we share with our users. This is built upon generations of hands‑on professional knowledge — all geared towards producing a portfolio of best‑in‑class speakers and microphones that combine performance, reliability and value. Most importantly, our customers trust us to deliver on our deep understanding of what makes good sound. That's the challenge that drives us forward as leaders in the industry we helped create.

Electro‑Voice stands apart as one of the few companies to design all components in‑house — enclosures, waveguides, drivers — ensuring excellent quality for every audio application, from a standalone loudspeaker to a networked sound system. Our products literally speak for themselves: we strive for complete transparency and linearity in our transducers, so the need for external processing is minimized. Ultimately, it's our track record of patents proves the point: we invent, others imitate.

We're devoted to the art and science of audio, always focused upon innovative ways to create a sensory experience that is second to none. We know our users can hear, feel and appreciate the difference. That is why we Live for Sound.

Description:
NEOTech is a premier provider of electronic manufacturing services (EMS), integrated design engineering, and advanced supply chain solutions for the aerospace and defense, medical device, and high-tech industrial markets. We partner with leading OEMs to bring complex, mission-critical electronics from concept to full-scale production with unmatched quality, reliability, and technical excellence.

Our capabilities span the full product lifecycle, including design for manufacturability (DFX), microelectronics and advanced packaging, PCBA manufacturing, cable and interconnect solutions, system-level box build, test strategy development, direct fulfillment, and aftermarket repair and refurbishment. NEOTech supports highly regulated and performance-critical programs where precision, traceability, and zero-defect execution are essential.

Headquartered in Chatsworth, California, with manufacturing and engineering operations across the United States and Mexico, NEOTech delivers the scale, geographic flexibility, and near-shoring advantages today’s global OEMs require. Our facilities are certified to ISO 9001, AS9100, and ISO 13485, reflecting our commitment to operational excellence, compliance, and continuous improvement.

At NEOTech, innovation is driven by our people — skilled engineers, operators, and program leaders who collaborate every day to build the technologies that power aerospace platforms, life-saving medical devices, and the next generation of high-tech products.

Name: Cohu Malaysia
Description:
The Only Company with the Expertise on the Entire Test Cell and Inspection
 
We deliver leading-edge solutions to enable a smarter, safer, and more connected future.

Cohu is a  leading supplier of semiconductor test and inspection handlers,  micro-electromechanical system  (MEMS)  test modules,  test contactors,  thermal sub-systems and semiconductor automated test equipment used by global semiconductor and electronics manufacturers and semiconductor test subcontractors. Name: Cleveland Cable Company
Description:
Founded in 1978, Cleveland Cable Company is a leading global supplier of cables and cable accessories. With over 47 years of experience, we provide complete cable solutions to some of the world’s most demanding industries, serving a diverse portfolio of customers worldwide.

As the industry has evolved, so have we. We continually introduce new cable ranges and technologies to meet growing customer demands and expand into new markets. Our extensive network of trusted suppliers enables us to secure competitive lead times, efficient deliveries, and cost savings, all of which we pass on to our customers.

With eight locations across the UK and Ireland, including Glasgow, Newcastle, Warrington, Northampton, London, Bristol, Dublin, and our head office in Middlesbrough, we offer convenient collection and delivery options. Additionally, our Dubai branch allows us to serve the UAE market and export cables and accessories worldwide.

We are proud to be the world’s first cable distributor to achieve BASEC Registered Stockist status. Our products meet all relevant standards, with BASEC approval where applicable. We are certified to ISO 9001 (Quality Management) and ISO 14001 (Environmental Management) and remain committed to reducing our carbon footprint and environmental impact.

We welcome global enquiries, offering a reliable and efficient export service with air and sea freight options to destinations worldwide. With £160 million in stock ready for immediate delivery, we ensure fast and seamless supply solutions for our customers.

Name: Astrodyne TDI
Description:
Astrodyne TDI is a custom designer and manufacturer of innovative power solutions for demanding applications worldwide. 

The Company’s products include power supplies and EMI filters which are utilized in a wide variety of markets including industrial, medical products, semiconductors, consumer appliances, and military/aerospace applications. Astrodyne TDI has corporate headquarters in Hackettstown, New Jersey. In addition to the advanced design and manufacturing center in NJ, we also maintain two wholly-owned facilities in China – one in Shenzhen dedicated to design and production of power supplies, and one in Kunshan devoted to EMI filter design and production.

Name: Emiteli Indústria Eletrônica S/A
Description:
NOSSA HISTORIA

Com objetivo de trazer um modelo mais flexível e atraente de fornecimento para o mercado de montagem eletrônica, fundamos em 2011 a Emiteli.

A ideia de deixarmos a segurança de nossos trabalhos e nos aventurar nessa empreitada, foi que identificamos a necessidade de atender da maneira correta uma gama de empresas e projetistas autônomos, que não tinham a devida atenção das industrias do ramo.

A nossa ideologia, é que não existe cliente pequeno ou grande o suficiente que não possamos atender. Estamos sempre dispostos a oferecer nossas soluções e serviços da melhor maneira possível, acreditamos que devemos compreender e ajudar nossos clientes a desenvolver melhor seus produtos, a conquistarem os melhores resultados, com extrema qualidade e custos competitivos de mercado.


Em 2013 mudamos para uma nova sede, onde ampliamos nossa estrutura com mais máquinas e equipamentos. Outra grande conquista foi a aquisição de nossa primeira insersora automática SMT.

Durante nosso período de atividade, procuramos manter parcerias importantes para estreitar ainda mais a relação com nossos clientes, deixando de ser apenas um simples fornecedor para nos tornar uma peça fundamental na estratégia de negócio de cada um deles.

NOSSA EQUIPE

Temos orgulho de reunir uma equipe que realmente faz a diferença e que abraça a nossa ideologia. Sabemos que cada integrante de nosso time, dentro de sua atividade, acredita na Emiteli e faz o melhor para atingir o grau de excelência, que nos diferencia das demais industrias do mercado.

O comprometimento que temos com a manutenção de nossos processos e o respeito de cada integrante de nossa equipe, sempre visando manter um ambiente de trabalho agradável,  faz da Emiteli uma extensão de nossas casas.

A confiança que depositamos em quem move as engrenagens de nossa industria é correspondida sem que se precise lembrar disso a cada momento.

Description:
JCC Lighting has been a leader in the lighting market for over thirty years. The company has gone from strength to strength, starting as a small family-run firm and developing into the multi-million pound organisation that it is today.

Based on the south coast of England, JCC designs, sources and manufactures light fittings suitable for a wide variety of applications. Our extensive product range covers domestic lighting, office lighting, industrial and retail lighting. We have a major warehouse facility that supports our network of major wholesalers across the UK. Increasingly the JCC lighting range focuses on energy efficient LED lighting and includes LED flat panels for offices and schools, fire-rated downlights for homes and hotels and LED spotlights for retail and display.

JCC believes in creating innovative, energy saving, easy to install products focussing on bringing high quality LED lighting solutions to our many customers. This patented product cuts cooking time by up to 70% and reduces energy consumption by up to 40%. It also cooks healthier food by retaining water-soluble nutrients and preserving color, texture, and consistency.

The Device will also facilitate Big Data & Analytics of the Buying, Cooking & Sharing Patterns of Consumers.

Industrial Internet Of Things (IIOT).

Name: Tridonic MEIA & ASEAN
Description:
Tridonic is a world-leading supplier of lighting technology, supporting its customers with intelligent hardware and software and offering the highest level of quality, reliability, and energy savings. As a global driver of innovation in the field of lighting-based network technology, Tridonic develops scalable & future-oriented solutions that enable new business models for lighting manufacturers, building managers, systems integrators, planners, and many other types of customers. 

To promote the vision of the “Internet of Light,” Tridonic relies on partnerships with other specialists. The goal is the joint development of innovative technological solutions that convert lighting systems into intelligent networks and thereby, enable associated services. Its profound technical industry expertise makes Tridonic an ideal partner for established brands and for newcomers to the market. 

Tridonic is the technology company of the Zumtobel Group and is headquartered in Dornbirn, Austria. In the 2017/18 tax year, Tridonic generated sales of €352.7 million. 1,690 highly skilled employees and a worldwide sales presence in over 50 countries reflect the company’s commitment to the development and deployment of new, smart, and connected lighting systems.

Tridonic has been a driving force in the development of professional lighting for more than 60 years. Thanks to the knowledge and expertise of our engineers, we provide functionally and economically superior lighting solutions that are reliable, secure, energy efficient, and sustainable. Our customers benefit from our extensive knowledge, our international presence, and our long-standing reputation for excellence and the highest quality. 

This page is fully dedicated to Tridonic MEIA & ASEAN updates.

Name: ICAPE Group
Description:
Since 1999, ICAPE Group has a long experience in the production of Printed Circuit Boards and Customized Technical Parts manufactured in Southeast Asia and North America. In 60 countries, 3650 customers trust the quality services and offers of the group.

Each month, ICAPE Group delivers 26 million PCBs and 6 million Technical parts. In 2024, ICAPE Group achieved a turnover of EUR 182M.

With its teams of 600 people worldwide and 80 strategic partners in Asia, 30 in Printed Circuit Boards, and 50 in Technical Parts, ICAPE Group brings the best supply solutions. The service Office is located in China (Dongguan) with 250 highly qualified employees.

Our global sales organization allows us to be closer to the production plants and to satisfy your needs in Printed Circuit Boards and Technical Parts, with the best quality/price/service ratios, while respecting the ethical charter established by the group on all its partners.

ICAPE Group focuses on developing its online presence and continues to better serve its customers.

If you want to buy Printed Circuit Boards online on https://eshop.icape-group.com/

Name: Samsung Electronics Colombia

Somos la empresa de tecnología más grande del mundo en ventas anuales pero nos guiamos por una filosofía muy simple: trabajar siempre por un mejor mañana. Esta filosofía nos ha inspirado por más de 70 años. Sean computadoras, Smartphones, lavadoras o televisores, nuestros productos están siempre diseñados con la mirada puesta en un futuro mejor.

Name: AED Vantage
Description:
To prepare for the mobility of tomorrow, we concept, develop and test customer specific electronic solutions. 
With our know-how in the areas of software, electronics design, optimization of the system architecture as well as validation, we support you as a holistic partner - from the first idea to series production, or only for one or more sub-areas depending on your needs.

In this new era of mobility, we aim to offer you unique and sustainable solutions. This will enable us to accelerate the new development of innovative vehicle technology and ensure its reliability.

Name: Full Gauge Controls
Description:
Since 1985 we produce a wide range of digital instruments for industrial, commercial and residential automation systems for refrigeration, heating, acclimation and solar heating with products conforming to international guidelines, standards and certifications, such as UL, CE, NSF and ISO 9001 and 14001.
One of our many innovations is the possibility to manage facilities made with our products from every part of the world through Sitrad, a management software via internet.

Our company have offices in Texas and Florida (USA), along with an industrial park in Canoas (Brazil), housed in an area of 10,250 square meters (approx. 2.5 acres). But we are present all over the world through our products, attending more than 30 fairs a year, where we exhibit them, and by means of professionals, who give lectures and training courses, our image has been consolidated in 62 countries, among them are the United States, Canada, China, the United Arab Emirates, Pakistan, Turkey, Mexico, Colombia, Argentina and South Africa.
And the expansion process is constant due to the increasing demand of the market. In this way, we keep our commitment to the observance of delivery deadlines.

We are also internationally recognized by exclusive actions to disseminate technical knowledge in practice, contributing to the training of the sector we operate.

Name: Aflak Electronics Industries Company
Description:
AFLAK aims to be a renowned name in designing, developing and providing user-friendly solutions with the local customers' needs and requirements always in mind.

One of AFLAK priorities is to remain on the lead and work harder to exceed the expectations of its customers, by always bringing to their finger tips the latest technologies ni its areas of specialization. Proactive mindset is a vital component of Aflak culture.

AFLAK and the rest of the world is reaching out to the entire Middle East with its products and services.

Name: HANNA Instruments Colombia
Description:
Hanna Instruments, somos una renombrada empresa global especializada en diseño, producción y distribución de avanzadas tecnologías para el monitoreo de parámetros fisicoquímicos del agua y su calidad.

Contamos con una trayectoria de más de cuatro décadas y nos hemos expandido en más de 40 países, consolidándonos como una entidad internacional de gran relevancia. Nuestra sede principal se encuentra en los Estados Unidos, respaldada por una moderna planta de fabricación en Rumania. Estas ubicaciones estratégicas son el resultado de liderazgo en el desarrollo y la innovación tecnológica.

Nuestro principal objetivo es garantizar la excelencia en el control de parámetros fisicoquímicos en distintas industrias, respaldando a nuestros clientes con soluciones confiables.

Name: AEC Illuminazione Srl
Description:
AEC Illuminazione is market leader in street, urban, and indoor lighting with over 60 years’ experience. The company philosophy, based on the concept of  “Total Quality System,” predicts the concentration of all the production phases in the Italian headquarters: from the designing, to the entire production and distribution of the product. 
Investment on the technological up-grade of the product coincides with the care dedicated to the research of shapes and aesthetics and the concept of quality is blended, with no exceptions, to those of functionality and exclusiveness and with the care for detail typical of products Made in Italy.

Name: PELSAN LIGHTING
Description:
About Pelsan Aydınlatma A. Ş.

Pelsan Aydınlatma, A.Ş., which was founded in Istanbul 43 years ago, is one of Turkey's biggest lighting industry manufacturers with its production, export, and employment figures.

Five million lighting fixtures are manufactured every year and exported to 79 countries by 500 employees at Pelsan plants with an indoor area of 30.000 m².

Optical, thermal, mechanical, and electrical designs are performed within Pelsan by the R&D department running with strong engineer staff. Again all lighting products are certified with the Lighting Laboratory established internally and registered upon accreditation by the Turkish Accreditation Institution. Pelsan, with all these facilities owned, has also shifted to LED technology that has been developing and spreading recently and started to produce efficient fixtures complying with this technology.

The main product groups of Pelsan Aydınlatma, offering venue-specific project design and lighting design with a total saving approach, are Interior Lighting, Exterior Lighting, Industrial Lighting, Equipment, and Lamps.

Name: SM Electronic Technologies Pvt Ltd
Description:
We at SMET understand that innovation lies at the heart of our customers. By the time you have the idea and move it on paper, we guide you to make it a product with all components, ready at your doorstep.

We are a family of enthusiastic team members with the right mix of highly experienced teams empowering a younger generation who strive to exceed our customer’s expectations by providing excellent technological products and services.
We achieve this by working in an inspired environment that helps us grow and enhance our leadership skills.

Headquartered in Bangalore and present at 7 locations, we cater to customers in India and ASEAN. We understand customer and market needs and bring to them new technologies and solutions from leading electronic manufacturers across the world. We believe in providing value over just products.
SMET represents the best in class manufacturers. 

We are a well-structured organization, leading with sales and marketing teams that are powered by very experienced Field Application Engineers (FAE). Our excellent customer support ensures we are there for our suppliers and customers at all times.

Our customers are truly satisfied with our support that sees you through to the finish line. Our FAE team ensures you are well-guided with every product. 
We offer end to end solutions that are developed in-house as per your custom requirements, our in-house lab also makes it easy for both of us to work hands-on and help with design complexity, and reducing development costs.

Our highly efficient logistics team ensures a hassle free experience to receive your parts in a timely manner, and also ensure compliance at all times. We work around the clock to lower your worries.
SMET caters to a wide range of applications ranging from Industrial, Automotive, Consumer, IoT, Railways, Medical, Aerospace, and Defence segments. 

We make your ideas happen. Let’s innovate together.

Name: Suzlon Energy Limited, Pune
Description: Suzlon Energy Limited, Pune is an electrical/electronic manufacturing company based out of E 484/58 Mitramandal Colony, Parvati, , Pune, Maharashtra, India.

Name: RS South Africa
Description:
RS South Africa, a trading brand of RS Group plc (LSE: RS1), is a proud Level 2 B-BBEE contributor and a leading global omni-channel solutions partner. We are committed to empowering industrial customers and suppliers involved in designing, building, or maintaining industrial equipment and facilities. We offer a broad range of products and solutions designed to simplify operations, enhance productivity and support innovation across industries.

We stock over 800 000 industrial and electronic products from more than 2 500 leading global suppliers, providing our customers with unparalleled choice. Our vast inventory is supplemented by an ever-expanding range of in-stock items that cater to various industry needs. With a strong focus on problem-solving, we offer innovative solutions that go beyond just supplying products. Our services span inventory management, maintenance, integrated supply, safety, purchasing, design, manufacturing and custom ordering, making us a true end-to-end partner.

Our Purpose is “Making Amazing Happen”. This guides our efforts to inspire innovation and drive sustainability. We actively support projects and initiatives that educate and empower the engineers of today and tomorrow. Through our STEM workshops and outreach programs, we help cultivate the next generation of problem-solvers and innovators.

Our commitment to sustainability is embedded in our operations through our Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) framework. We strive to act ethically and responsibly in every aspect of our business, aligning ourselves with the global push for a more sustainable and socially responsible future.

Our Legacy with over 80 years of experience, RS has established itself as a trusted partner that not only delivers exceptional products but also helps customers save time and money through tailored solutions. Whether you are designing, building, maintaining, or protecting industrial equipment, RS stands alongside you as a you as a reliable partner.

Name: Daikin Portugal
Description:
A nossa missão, e a base da nossa existência, é identificar e compreender as necessidades e sonhos futuros dos nossos clientes, até mesmo aqueles que eles ainda não descobriram. Para isso, fabricamos e fornecemos soluções de climatização inovadoras, com qualidade premium e que correspondem às exigentes necessidades dos nossos clientes residenciais, comerciais e industriais.

A Daikin está presente em Portugal há mais de 35 anos! Inicialmente através do seu distribuidor independente e, desde 2004, como afiliada do grupo Daikin Europe. 

O grupo Daikin Europe tem hoje uma robusta rede comercial presente em mais de 50 países na Europa, Médio Oriente e África, com 17 afiliadas, 4 escritórios comerciais e toda uma rede de distribuidores independentes.

Name: REIVAX Automação e Controle
Description:
REIVAX started its activities in April, 1987, and took very little time to establish itself as one of the greatest companies in systems and solutions for power generation control. Nowadays, REIVAX is a leading company in modernization of control systems for power plants all over the world.

With headquarters in Canada, Switzerland and Brazil, REIVAX is a GLOBAL company that has its own technology and develops power generation control systems for the most demanding and challenging applications around the globe.

Ahead of a long journey in its market, REIVAX was the pioneering company in digital controllers, power system stabilizers and integrated voltage and speed micro-processed controllers. REIVAX’ S PSS is World renowned for creating the Ramp Field Tracking technology adopted in the IEEE standard 421.5 PSS 2A/2B.

The main challenge of our company is to seek innovating and trustworthy solutions, proving our commitment to the success of the customers.

We believe that controlling energy generates development

REIVAX equipment currently controls more than 170 GW of power generation worldwide in full satisfaction of the end users.

Name: Liteon Technology
Description:
Visão

Nosso objetivo é ser líder nacional em fabricação de fontes de alimentação e adaptadores e ser referência de um excelente ambiente para se trabalhar.

Name: OK International, a Dover Company
Description:
OK International is a global manufacturer delivering market leading quality and innovation for benchtop soldering and dispensing solutions in electronics and industrial product assembly.  Our signature brands include Metcal, a leader in hand soldering, convection rework and fume extraction bench tool solutions, and Techcon, an innovator of fluid and adhesive dispensing technologies.  We have facilities in Cypress California (US), Chandlers Ford (UK) and Shenzhen (China) supporting our customers worldwide.  The OK International Team is dedicated to putting customers first, having an entrepreneurship mindset, innovative culture, cultivating relationships and never compromising on integrity. 

OK International is part of the Dover Engineered Systems segment of the Dover Corporation. Dover is a diversified global manufacturer with annual revenues of $8 billion.  The company delivers innovative equipment and components, specialty systems, and support services through four major operating segments: Energy, Engineered Systems, Fluids, and Refrigeration & Food Equipment.  Headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, Dover trades on the New York Stock Exchange under “DOV.”

Name: Tiamat Energy
Description:
Spun off from the CEA/CNRS late 2017, TIAMAT Energy is a start-up that designs, develops and produces innovative solutions for energy storage applications. The Na-ion technology used in Tiamat 18650 cells presents outstanding properties for power applications, fast charging and enhanced cycle life. Tiamat aims to further develop its technology in the years to come and to qualify its prototypes in collaboration with many industrial partners and end users. 
Please be in touch if you want more information and look out for jobs advertisement if you are interested in joining the team.

Name: c3controls
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of c3controls! We're a leading provider of durable, well-designed electrical control products built for reliability in the most demanding environments. Our products meet and exceed global standards for quality and safety, ensuring best-in-class control system performance. 

With over 17 million product configurations and a full UL508A panel shop, we help customers optimize their equipment and processes with unmatched customization.

Headquartered in the U.S., with offices in India and El Salvador, we proudly serve a global customer base with technical expertise and dedicated support.

We also offer marketing services through c3digitus, our in-house agency specializing in digital strategy - from branding and website development to SEO and much more.

Connect with us to stay up to date on industry trends, product innovations, and marketing insights.

Name: Apogee Electronics
Description:
Apogee Electronics Corporation is a leading manufacturer of digital audio hardware systems and related accessories for audio professionals and musicians around the world.
 
Apogee was founded in 1985 and initially made its name designing filters that solved many of the early problems associated with digital audio. Later, Apogee’s complete conversion systems pushed the envelope of digital audio quality and established Apogee as a key innovator in the field of professional digital audio.
 
Today, Apogee converters and audio interfaces are regarded as the reference standard in the audio industry. Products such as Symphony I/O MkII, Ensemble and Duet all have set the benchmark by which digital audio recording hardware is judged. Now with its products designed especially for Apple’s iPad and iPhone, Apogee continues to be at the forefront of mobile recording technology. Apogee’s mission is to build products that offer ultimate sound quality, innovative design and unparalleled value to all music creators from the aspiring artist to the discerning audio professional.

Name: Daikin Australia
Description:
Founded in 1969, Daikin Australia have been providing air conditioned comfort for homes, commercial developments and community projects across Australia for over 50 years.  

As air conditioning specialists, the entire focus of our business is to bring climate-controlled comfort to places where people live, work, meet and relax. 

A world leader in air conditioning with operations across the globe, Daikin have invested more than 80 years and billions of dollars in research and development into the fields of mechanics, electronics and chemistry to produce air conditioning products that are energy efficient, quiet, simple to use and reliable. From homes to high rises, from hospitals to hotels, Daikin has an air conditioning solution that provides superior comfort and energy efficiency.

Here in Australia, Daikin have established a world-class production facility at our state-of-the-art manufacturing site in Sydney, where we continue to drive advances in energy efficiency and improve in-home comfort for our customers.

Name: TAIFF
Description:
Mais de 3 décadas de beleza

Contribuir para a autoestima das pessoas, realçando sua beleza com inovação e respeito é o que nos motiva a evoluir sempre. Criamos produtos de alta tecnologia, nos dedicando incansavelmente aos nossos consumidores.
A Taiff é uma marca com mais de 30 anos de um sucesso consolidado pelo pioneirismo e pela produção de tecnologia.
A nossa paixão começa em 1988 com o primeiro secador portátil do Brasil. A partir daí, buscamos, a cada ano, olhar o mercado para trazer novidades que fizessem a diferença na vida das pessoas quando se fala de cabelo. Uma variedade de produtos e tecnologias para todas as belezas, sempre com a qualidade reconhecida por todos.
Hoje temos uma linha completa de produtos para todos os tipos de cabelos, gostos e necessidades.
A nossa história é feita por quem realmente acreditou em nós e nos colocou no seu dia a dia. Quem sempre foi fiel à nossa paixão e à nossa essência.
Cabeleireiras e cabeleireiros, barbeiros e barbeiras, loiras, morenas, ruivas, prateadas, lisas, crespas e cacheadas, do cabelão ao curtinho, das românticas às modernas, influenciadoras, todos temos algo em comum.
A paixão por cabelos.
Uma comunhão cada dia mais forte.
Uma legião de apaixonados por cabelos.
Um feito do tamanho de nossos sonhos.
Somos líderes do mercado, passando de geração em geração e, inspirados pela sua paixão, buscamos inovação com qualidade. Tudo isso para evoluir com você, a nossa razão de existir.

Taiff. Apaixonados por cabelos.

Name: Kehua Tech
Description:
As a leading power solution provider, KEHUA was established in 1988 and went public in 2010 (002335.SZ). KEHUA adheres to the mission of providing safe, green, and smart power for everyone, and carries the vision of becoming a world-leading supplier of integrated solutions for power protection and energy conservation.

KEHUA is committed to establishing an Intelligent and Comprehensive Energy Management System, with the core technology of power electronics and cutting-edge technologies of AI and IoT. The system covers the three business fields of KEHUA, which are Critical Power, Renewable Energy and Cloud Infrastructure. It also supports the upgrade of various sectors including Finance, Data Center, PV, Energy Storage, Industries, Telecom, Transportation, Medical and Government, etc. 

Guided by the development philosophy of “Innovation & Brand”, KEHUA has an R&D team of over 1,000 staff led by 4 experts, who enjoy special allowances from the State Council of China. KEHUA has been authorized 1000+ intellectual property rights covering national patents and software copyrights. With nuclear grade of quality control and 20+ testing labs, KEHUA has been successfully delivering thousands of reliable projects in 100+ countries and regions. 

KEHUA is widely recognized by multiple international authorities: No.5 World Modular UPS Supplier (Source: Omdia), No.8 World PCS Supplier (Source: IHS Markit), No.9 World PV Inverter Supplier (Source: IHS Markit), and has been rated as the Global TOP 500 New Energy Enterprises for 6 consecutive years.

With brand strength, KEHUA will lead the development of the smart power industry and drive the future of Interconnection. Learn more about KEHUA please visit: www.kehua.com.

Name: LACROIX - Electronics
Description:
Convinced that technology must contribute to simple, sustainable, and safer environments, LACROIX supports its customers in developing more sustainable living ecosystems, thanks to useful, robust, and secure electronic equipment and connected technologies.

LACROIX relies on two complementary activities, including the Electronics activity, the Group’s industrial backbone.

Ranked among the world’s TOP 50 and Europe’s TOP 10 EMS (Electronics Manufacturing Services), this activity generated €370 million in revenue in 2024, including intra-group sales.

As a key player in the design and production of electronic equipment and industrial IoT solutions (hardware, software, and cloud), the Electronics activity of LACROIX combines advanced skills in both R&D and production 4.0.

It offers its customers tailor-made services across the entire product lifecycle, serving the automotive, industrial, home and building automation (HBAS), avionics and defense, and healthcare sectors.

With its design center and 4 production plants, the Electronics activity of LACROIX serves its markets in Europe and North Africa.

Its mission: accelerate its customers’ projects by delivering industrial IoT solutions and electronic functions.

Name: Rexel USA
Description:
Together, we’re delivering the power of a global brand

Millions of US electrical customers trust the expertise, resources and relationships of Rexel Holdings USA. As the US presence of one of the world's largest electrical distributors, the Rexel Group, we apply our know-how, productivity tools and hands-on business-building initiatives to help our customers thrive. 

Always seeking better solutions 

Rexel USA is the home to many of the leading energy, communications and supply-chain brands in the US. We are continuously seeking new opportunities to add complementary brands to our company and further strengthen our value to customers and shareholders.

Our Employees Make a Difference

Rexel USA offers a wide range of career opportunities, from entry-level rotational programs to experienced electrical system design.  Whether it's through designing alternative energy solutions, upgrading lighting in commercial or municipal buildings or finding new ways to optimize our customer's supply chain, our employees are making a difference in the world of energy solutions.

To learn what categories of personal information we collect and the purpose of collection, please review our Applicant Privacy Notice at https://bit.ly/36PslzT

Name: SSG (Super Star Group)
Description:
The journey of Super Star Group (SSG) began with a simple vision — to make world-class electrical products available to the people of Bangladesh at an affordable price. This vision aimed not only to make the products accessible to everyone but also to establish the company as a leader in its category of business. After more than two decades, SSG has become the No. 1 choice among people as a trusted provider of electrical solutions.

In 1994, the company started its journey by establishing its first venture — an incandescent lamp plant located in Narayanganj. Later, the company expanded its business into various categories, including electrical accessories, CFLs, LED lighting, fans, cables, solar products, real estate holdings, lifts, and more.

Recently, the group achieved the prestigious Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujib Industrial Award 2020, introduced for the first time in Bangladesh. The award was presented by the Ministry of Industries in recognition of SSG’s outstanding contribution to the industrial development of the country.

Name: SparkFun Electronics
Description: In 2003, CU student Nathan Seidle blew a power supply in his dorm room and found he could only order replacement parts in bulk. Since then, he has been on a mission to make electronics and supporting documentation available to individuals everywhere. Since the beginning, SparkFun has been committed to sustainably helping our world explore the edges of technology and achieve electronics literacy from our headquarters in Boulder, Colorado. No matter your vision, SparkFun's products and resources are designed to make the world of electronics more accessible. In addition to more than 2,000 open-source components and widgets, SparkFun offers online tutorials and training designed to help people use technology to solve problems, create products, and get creative. We're here to help you start something!

Name: ALL Circuits
Description:
EMS EXCELLENCE IN AUTOMOTIVE & INDUSTRIAL MANUFACTURING
As a leading multi-sector EMS, flexibility and responsiveness inspire the ALL Circuits teams every day. 
Our commitment is to design, industrialize and manufacture high-quality electronics, assisting our customers from the design phase through to the analysis of customer field returns.

Our group is at the forefront of innovation and uses highly automated lines to offer a tailor-made EMS service, delivering globally: France for large, medium and small volumes, Tunisia for high value-added products and Mexico for high volume production serving the Americas.
Our four plants, with a strong automotive & industrial mindset, build on their complementary expertise to guarantee the highest quality.

For more information, please visit us: www.allcircuits.com

Name: LITEON Technology
Description:
LITEON Technology, the first listed electronics company in Taiwan, has been a pioneer in the electronics industry since 1975. LITEON is a trailblazer in the field of LED technologies and the first listed electronic company in Taiwan. A world-leading provider of optoelectronic semiconductor components and power managements modules, we offer reliable advanced solutions powered by cloud computing, automotive electronics, 5G, and AIoT. For long-term development, LITEON has set the Internet of Energy (IoE) as its cornerstone to develop integrated portfolios on green data centers, clean mobility, and efficiency infrastructure. 

For decades, we have been advocating socially and environmentally responsible corporate practices that reflect our core values.

Founded in 1918, the Panasonic Group is committed to enhancing the well-being of people and society and conducts its businesses based on founding principles applied to generate new value and offer sustainable solutions for today’s world. The Group reported consolidated net sales of 8,458.2 billion yen for the year ended March 31, 2025. Devoted to improving the well-being of people, the Panasonic Group is united in providing superior products and services to help you Live Your Best. The Panasonic Asia Pacific regional headquarters is based in Singapore and provides the whole range of the brand’s products and solutions across the Southeast Asia and Oceania regions.

We source best in class electrical and automation products from across the globe to deliver more than 20,000 marketed product lines to the local market. By enabling smarter and faster decision making and seamless connectivity spurring new collaboration, NHP is enabling the Connected Enterprise.

Name: LEDMAN Group
Description:
Ledman Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. (Stock Code: 300162), established in 2004, is a leading Chinese provider of cutting-edge LED products and solutions, and the first high-tech LED company to be listed in China. Specializing in the 8K ultra-high definition industry, Ledman offers a comprehensive portfolio of LED display products and solutions, positioning itself as a pioneer in 8K Micro LED UHD displays utilizing advanced COB technology.

Backed by over two decades of comprehensive experience in LED packaging, display manufacturing, and dedicated Micro LED R&D, Ledman has built a robust intellectual property portfolio with more than 900 proprietary patents. 

With a growing global presence, Ledman provides reliable support and services through its subsidiaries and offices in multiple countries, including the United States, the Netherlands, Dubai, and Japan, ensuring responsive and localized assistance for clients worldwide.

Tridonic is a world-leading supplier of lighting technology, supporting its customers with intelligent hardware and software and offering the highest level of quality, reliability and energy savings. Name: DiGiCo
Description:
DiGiCo (UK) Limited brings together the design and development skills and digital engineering expertise that have helped create some of the world's most popular, successful and ground-breaking digital audio solutions.

The company was formed in 2002 with the purchase of Soundtracs, which was formed in the early 1980s by a group of recording engineers in search of a better studio console than those available at the time. The team's success led to two decades of audio innovation and, in 1992, its first development of a digital audio mixing console.

In 1996 this program led to the launch of the acclaimed Virtua console, followed a year later by the DPC, in 1998 the DS3 and in 2000 the D4. Since 2000 the company's product range has been based entirely on digital audio. Along the way a host of new technologies has been introduced, including the first use by an audio manufacturer of the revolutionary Sharc DSP from Analog Devices, a faster, more efficient processor than any then on the market, the first (and still the most comprehensive) use of multiple TFT LCD touchscreens, a pioneer in the use of a 96kHz sample rate, and the first to run multiple sample rates simultaneously.

This is just some of the experience that went into creating DiGiCo's first product, the D5 Live digital mixing system, which brought with it a revolutionary approach to both the live sound console and the way it interfaces with both ends of the audio chain.

DiGiCo has always been ahead of its time, basing the D5 around a powerful DSP engine using proven Soundtracs hardware and software, but with features dedicated to live sound mixing, it created the world's first truly open-ended console system. 

Now, it has taken a quantum leap forward. 

Using a single Super FPGA [Field Programmable Gate Array], the new SD Series and S21 combines this single chip technology with the new Tiger SHARC to produce our trademarked Stealth digital processing.

Name: Solar MD
Description:
Solar MD: Revolutionizing Renewable Energy Solutions

At Solar MD, we are passionate about driving the transition to a sustainable future by providing innovative and reliable renewable energy solutions. As a leading company specializing in lithium-ion battery storage, we empower residential, commercial, and utility-scale applications with cutting-edge technology.

Our energy storage products are built using the safest lithium-ion battery cells based on advanced Lithium Iron Phosphate chemistry. With our in-house designed intelligent battery management system, we ensure efficient cell-level monitoring, protection, and control. Our solutions seamlessly integrate with major inverter brands, catering to both low and high voltage power conversion systems.

Whether you're looking for off-grid solutions combined with wind, solar, or diesel, or seeking extended self-consumption, power outage protection, peak shaving, or energy shifting in grid-connected setups, Solar MD has you covered. Our energy storage solutions are engineered to optimize performance, enhance safety, and maximize your return on investment.

Based in Cape Town, South Africa, we take pride in manufacturing our state-of-the-art energy storage systems in a cutting-edge facility. As a company deeply committed to the African continent, our mission is to bring affordable, clean energy to every home, especially in areas with limited access to the power grid.

Founded in 2015, Solar MD has quickly established itself as an industry leader, driven by a vision of affordable clean energy for all. We continuously strive to develop and manufacture battery systems that efficiently store electricity from renewable energy sources. Our disruptive battery management system ensures that our residential, commercial, and industrial storage systems pay for themselves in a matter of years.

Join us on our journey toward a greener, more sustainable future.

Name: Soler & Palau Ventilation Group
Description:
Soler & Palau Ventilation Group is a global multi-brand group and world leader in the manufacturing of ventilation systems. 

For over 70 years, we aim to innovate in ventilation solutions that are #PlanetFriendly and #InstallFriendly, to ensure air quality in all the indoor spaces to #BreatheAndRelax. 

To achieve this, we develop the best ventilation solutions so that architecture and construction professionals can offer people habitable spaces that prioritize air quality and energy recovery, thus contributing to the real sustainability of our environment. 

Our group is composed of a range of brands that allow us to be present in over 90 countries across Europe, America, Asia and Australia: 

• S&P: Global leader in the design and development of ventilation systems, serving solutions for residential, commercial, industrial applications and OEM since 1951. 
• Ferrari: Producers of centrifugal and axial fans, with innovative and reliable solutions used in many industrial production processes and with many different types of materials. 
• Envirovent: UK's Leading manufacturer and installer of low energy, sustainable domestic ventilation systems for over 35 years. 
• Pluggit: Distributors of fan-assisted heat recovery ventilation systems for residential spaces in Germany since 1995. 
• Brofer: Since 1981, they are an international leader in the production of components and accessories for ventilation and air conditioning systems. 
• VIM: Specialists in air treatment, ventilation and smoke extraction in collective, tertiary, industrial and catering buildings. 
• Kruger: Established in Singapore in 1985, is a leading supplier of energy efficient ventilation solutions with many applications such as air conditioning, car parks, tunnels, kitchens and transports. 

Our group is also formed by other regional brands such as DIEM in Slovenia and Elektrodesign in the Czech Republic.

All together, we envision a world where indoor air quality is accessible to all individuals.

Name: Legrand Brasil
Description:
Há mais de 50 anos no país, a Legrand Brasil integra o grupo global líder em sistemas elétricos e digitais para infraestruturas de edifícios. Desde a aquisição da Pial em 1977, a empresa se consolidou como um polo estratégico de fabricação e exportação para toda a América Latina.

Reunindo marcas como Legrand, BTicino, HDL, Lorenzetti Materiais Elétricos, SMS e Daneva, além das linhas Pial, Cemar e Cablofil, oferecemos soluções completas que unem conforto, eficiência energética, comunicação e segurança; de interruptores e tomadas a sistemas de automação e controle de acesso.

Com presença nacional: 2 escritórios corporativos, 3 plantas industriais, 2 centros logísticos, 2 centros tecnológicos e 10 unidades de negócios; garantimos agilidade, inovação e proximidade com nossos clientes.

Guiados por nossos valores: Inovação, Inclusão, Sincronia, Simplicidade e Confiança; seguimos transformando tecnologia em soluções que melhoram vidas e conectam o futuro.

Name: Semco Infratech Pvt Ltd
Description:

Founded in 2006, as a part of Semco Group, the company is headquartered in New Delhi. Semco Infratech has been equipped with qualified sales and service engineers to assist with clients' requirements. Our focus is to provide an all-in-one solution for all your battery system needs.

Semco Infratech has been equipped with qualified sales and service engineers to assist with clients' requirements. Our focus is to provide an all-in-one solution for all your battery system needs. We offer a range of products in the energy segment that is manufactured using top-quality materials for testing and manufacturing equipment as per industry standards.

Name: Carrier Midea India
Description:
Carrier Midea India Pvt. Ltd. is a joint venture between Carrier and Midea Group Co. Ltd. Carrier, built on Willis Carrier’s invention of modern air conditioning in 1902, is a leading provider of heating, ventilating, air-conditioning and refrigeration solutions. It operates 51 factories and 39 research & design centres worldwide with more than 53,000 employees serving customers in more than 180 countries. Midea Group, a Fortune 500 company with 34 global production centres, over 150,000 employees and an annual revenue of more than USD 40.5 billion in 2019 generated in more than 200 countries & regions, is a high technology holding specializing in HVAC, home appliances, robotics and automation, smart home and IoT, as well as smart logistics and components.
Carrier Midea India has manufacturing facilities in SUPA, Ahmednagar, Maharashtra and has exclusive rights to manufacture and sell Carrier and Midea brand room air conditioners and Midea brand light Commercial Air Conditioners in India. With offices in 21 cities across India, Carrier Midea India has pan India presence.”

Name: Metal Power Analytical Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Metal Power provides a comprehensive range of products and services to meet the analytical needs of metal industries. Our product portfolio spans Laboratory Optical / Atomic Emission Spectrometers (OES / AES), Mobile Spectrometers, Hydrogen analyzers for molten Aluminium, Certified Reference Materials (CRM), Sample Preparation Machines for spectrometers as well as a wide range of accessories. Apart from the product range, Metal Power through its Laboratory Division also offers services in Material Analyses and Proficiency Testing for other laboratories. Today the Company boasts over 25 years of experience serving the needs of ferrous and non-ferrous metals industries and has a presence across more than 30 countries globally.

Metal Power is the only Optical Emission Spectrometer manufacturing company in the world that provides complete end-to-end solutions for metal industries through our range of products - across spectrometers, associated equipment and accessories.

Our in-house Chemical and Analytical Research Laboratory and highly successful line of Certified Reference Materials (CRM) have helped us maintain our leadership and growth. Our Laboratory is NABL-accredited for both Chemical and Proficiency Testing. We are also the first accredited solid metal Certified Reference Material Producers in India and all of Asia.”

For any sales queries, you can write us at  sales@metalpower.net

Operating in more than 27 countries around the world, Romagnole enjoys the recognition received from its customers, suppliers and is proud of its values that make it a reference company in the sector.

Name: Nano Dimension
Description:
Nano Dimension (Nasdaq: NNDM) is a provider of intelligent machines for the fabrication of Additively Manufactured Electronics (AME). High fidelity active electronic and electromechanical subassemblies are integral enablers of autonomous intelligent drones, cars, satellites, smartphones, and in vivo medical devices. They necessitate iterative development, IP safety, fast time-to-market and device performance gains, thereby mandating AME for in-house, rapid prototyping and production. Nano Dimension machines serve cross-industry needs by depositing proprietary consumable conductive and dielectric materials simultaneously, while concurrently integrating in-situ capacitors, antennas, coils, transformers and electromechanical components, to function at unprecedented performance. Nano Dimension bridges the gap between PCB and semiconductor Integrated Circuits. A revolution at the click of a button: From CAD to a functional high-performance AME device in hours, solely at the cost of the consumable materials. 
For more information, please visit www.nano-di.com.

Name: Hind Rectifiers Ltd
Description:
Hirect, founded in 1958, in collaboration with Westinghouse, Brake & Signal, U.K. Hind Rectifiers Ltd., has long standing tradition and experience in developing, designing, manufacturing and marketing Power Semiconductors, Power Electronic Equipments and Railway Transportation Equipments. 

During this period Hirect has established considerable expertise in its area of activity and caters to wide range of application such as Electronics, Railway Transportation, Power, Telecommunication and core sector industries like steel, non-ferrous metals, cement, chemicals, metal finishing and a host of other industries. Customers have recognized the high quality of Hirect products. 

The Registered & Corporate office of Hirect is Located in Mumbai at the Bhandup plant.

With SPEA test systems, semiconductor and electronics manufacturers can ensure, day by day, the quality and reliability of their products.

Description: Through its subsidiaries IL JIN Electronics and Ascent Circuits, Amber Group is a prominent leader in the Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) sector and is recognised for its solutions across industries such as consumer durables, automotive, telecom, industrials, hearable / wearable, & Defence. Name: Inventronics
Description:

Our mission is to provide superior products, exceptional technical support, and outstanding customer service to our clients. We also strive to generate value for our customers by working to enhance and prolong the return on investment for solid-state lighting systems.

Name: Wilson Transformer Company
Description:
THE TRANSFORMER SOLUTION SPECIALIST
Established in 1933 with a proud history, Wilson Transformer Company is a leading specialist in the delivery of transformer solutions. In a changing world, organisations are increasingly turning to our specialist skills to meet their technical, safety and environmental challenges.

From our manufacturing base in Australia, we deliver solutions to a wide variety of industries and customers around the world including electricity generators, transmission and distribution organisations as well as a variety of heavy and light industrial users. We also meet the often complex needs of the mining and oil & gas sectors.

•	Power Transformers (≤550MVA)
•	Distribution Transformers (≤5000kVA)
•	Compact MV Substations
•	Special Transformers

•	Monitoring and Control Solutions

SERVICE AND SUPPORT

WORLD CLASS CAPABILITIES
We offer our customers the confidence of proven designs coupled with state of the art manufacturing facilities, robust processes and compliance to international standards. 

Within our product range, our state of the art facilities are equal to the best the world has to offer. By working with our customers and using the knowledge and expertise of our people, we are able to offer the best solution for the specific application. 

BUILT SMART FOR LIFE

Name: Liebherr Appliances
Description:
For over six decades Liebherr-Hausgeraete GmbH has been specializing in manufacturing innovative refrigerators and freezers. The company employs more than 6,500 staff and produces a wide range of refrigerators and freezers for domestic and professional use at its sites in Ochsenhausen (Germany), Lienz (Austria), Marica (Bulgaria), Kluang (Malaysia) and Aurangabad (India). With an annual production of nearly 2.3 million appliances, Liebherr is one of the leading European manufacturers in the premium class and stands for quality, design, and innovation. 

In 1954, Hans Liebherr made his first fridges in Ochsenhausen and shortly thereafter they went into series production. This laid the foundation for Liebherr-Hausgeraete GmbH, which is still the divisional controlling company of all production sites for refrigerators and freezers and manages one of the thirteen product segments of the Liebherr Group. 

Quality, design, and innovation 

Liebherr-Hausgeraete GmbH has a mission to inspire their customers every day with intelligent refrigerators and freezers and individualized solutions. The company's leading market position is determined by its continuous endeavor for perfection and a love for detail. As a manufacturer of premium appliances, Liebherr is not only a driver of innovation but also places the highest demands on the quality of their appliances. To ensure this, all appliances and components undergo constant quality assurance throughout the entire production process. At the same time, their product development continually orients the appliances to meet customer demands and to social and societal trends.  

Thanks to their innovative freshness technologies and high-quality materials, the consumer appliances also impress with their energy efficiency, elegant design, and long service life. They make use of special functions to optimally store food and retain freshness longer.

Name: Shermco Industries
Description:
Shermco Industries is a provider of safe, reliable testing, repair, professional training, electrical outage planning, maintenance and analysis of rotating apparatus and electrical power distribution systems and related equipment for the light, medium, and heavy industrial base nationwide. Shermco specializes in industrial, utilities and wind generation technologies and the associated motors, generators, drives, switchgear and protective equipment. 

Founded in 1974 in Dallas, the company is comprised of two strategic business units; the Machine Services Division and the Engineering Services Division. Shermco's corporate location is in Irving, Texas, with service centers in Angleton, Austin, Cedar Rapids, Columbus, Des Moines, Houston, Minneapolis, Omaha, Port Arthur, San Antonio, Sweetwater, and Tulsa.  Shermco Industries Canada is based in Regina, Saskatchewan, with service centers in Calgary, Edmonton, Saskatoon and Winnipeg. Shermco Industries has over 1200 full-time employees.

The company is a member in good standing with the Electrical Apparatus Service Association (EASA), American Wind Energy Association (AWEA), Professional Electrical Apparatus Recyclers League (PEARL), and the InterNational Electrical Testing Association (NETA). Shermco is also a six time recipient of the ‘Best Places to Work' award, recognized by the Austin Business Journal as well as the Dallas Business Journal. For more information about Shermco Industries, visit www.shermco.com

Name: DPA Microphones
Description: Designing microphones with amazing sound, exceptional consistency and outstanding durability is no easy feat. DPA Microphones draws on more than six decades of world-class microphone design experience. DPA's long history of precision and perfection continues to define our condenser microphones to this day. Sound superiority and technical innovation is at the heart of everything we do. You can be certain that the mics you buy from us will be the best ones you will ever use. Just grab your favorite DPA microphone, close your eyes and listen to your performance. The sound you hear is TRUE SOUND – delivered honestly and passionately.

Name: TOPBAND
Description:
Shenzhen Topband Co., Ltd., established in 1996, stands as a global leader in intelligent control system solutions. As the first company in our industry to be publicly listed in China (stock code: 002139), we have built a strong reputation for innovation and excellence.

Topband provides R&D, production, and sales services for smart control system solutions. Centered around our "Four Electrics and One Network" technology matrix—comprising control systems, motors, batteries, power supplies, and IoT platforms—we have built a comprehensive technological ecosystem spanning from hardware development to cloud services. Topband serves three major sectors: power tools & home appliances, digital energy & smart vehicles, and robotics, delivering customized solutions to global customers. In 2024, the company's revenue surpassed 10 billion RMB for the first time, maintaining a compound annual growth rate of 25.2% over the past decade.

Topband's global footprint includes more than 14 production and R&D bases across China, Vietnam, India, Romania, Mexico, and other regions. This extensive network allows us to respond swiftly and effectively to the needs of our diverse client base.

We pride ourselves on our core values of "AGILITY·INNOVATION·PARTNERSHIP," which underpin our dedication to technological innovation and customer-centric service. Join us as we lead the charge toward a smarter, low-carbon future, transforming intelligent living for all.

Name: PEI-Genesis

PEI-Genesis has been in business since 1946 and we have grown consistently year after year. This is a wonderful place to work and we need talented people to join us on our journey.

Name: Electrical Components International

At ECI, we power smart, connected, and electrified solutions that enable the most advanced technologies to solve the most complex challenges.

Name: Digicon S/A
Description:
Digicon started its activities in 1977 manufacturing high-precision measuring systems. Today, the company’s field of action has been greatly expanded to include the design and development of electromechanical equipment for different market needs. Digicon’s main products include access controllers (turnstiles), traffic controllers, parking control systems (parking meters), automatic ticketing systems for urban transportation and components for the aerospace market.

Name: Unilumin
Description:
As the leader in the global LED industry, Unilumin Group Co. Ltd. is pioneering in LED application products and integrated solutions, dedicated to LED product development, manufacturing, sales and after-sales service domestically and abroad. Among the Top 500 Most Valuable Brands in Asia for 3 consecutive years, No.1 in industry exports for 10 consecutive years, Unilumin has been cultivated in the LED industry for over 2 decades. With a corporate vision of Together, for a Brighter Future, Unilumin contributes to delivering customizable, high-quality, high-performance LED products and solutions to customers worldwide.

Unilumin focuses on the innovations of LED products and technologies, leading the development of COB & MIP displays, Micro LED 0.4 mass production, NPP displays, All-in-one LED, optical communication, intelligent lighting, etc.  Obtaining 3000+ patents and over 20 products have won 35+ authoritative awards, including the iF Design Award, Red Dot Award, GoodDesign, and so on. 

Owning the world's largest intelligent LED display manufacturing base of 400,000 sqm and a wide global sales & service network (covering 160+ countries with 20+ subsidiaries and offices), Unilumin supplies global partners and customers with first-rate products, solutions, and services. Unilumin's products have been widely applied in various fields globally, including corporate & education, retail, DOOH & digital signage, leisure & hospitality, sports venues, live events and stage performance, transportation, command centers, etc.
