Name: TDS Lithium-Ion Battery Gujarat Private Limited
Description:
TDS Lithium-Ion Battery Gujarat Private Limited (TDSG)

TDSG is India’s First Lithium-ion Battery manufacturer for hybrid vehicles with Cell Level localization. 

TDSG is a joint venture between TOSHIBA Corporation, DENSO Corporation and Suzuki Motor Corporation, set up in the progressive soil of Gujarat aligned with government’s “Make in India” vision.

Our Manufacturing operations are derived by Suzuki’s expertise with contribution of Toshiba’s Cell Technology and Denso’s Module Technology with a vision and commitment from 3 of the biggest names in automotive industry to power the India’s journey to hybrid and electric vehicles.

The foundation stone for our “state of art TDSG plant spread over 74,124 m2”, was laid by the Honorable Prime Minister of India, Shri Narendra Modi along with Honorable Prime Minister of Japan, Shri Shinzo Abe on 14th Sep 2017.

Led by Engineers extensively trained in Japan, At TDSG we manufacture highly safe rechargeable battery with outstanding characteristics like more than 20,000 charge-discharge cycles, fast charging and prevention of thermal runaway which makes them to perform even in extreme conditions.

At TDSG, we work with the below Philosophy:
-	Contribute to the development of Indian economy by manufacturing Lithium-Ion batteries built with the power of India under “Make in India” philosophy.
-	Contribute to the reduction of environmental burdens in India through supplying Lithium-Ion batteries.
-	Supply safe, high-quality, cost-efficient battery as the No. 1 Lithium-Ion batteries manufacturer.

The Core Values of the Organization are:
-	Customer
-	Quality
-	Cost
-	Compliance
-	Environment
-	Safety
-	People

Aligned with our values, we have developed extensive green cover in our premises and have inhouse solar power generation of 1 Mega-watt.

At TDSG, we are Committed to a Greener World!

Name: SEP System House Factory For Electric Panels
Description: SEP - System House Factory for Electrical Panels was established in 2006 centrally situated in the Kingdom's capital, Riyadh, SEP is a leading ISO-certified manufacturer and supplier of relay, control, and distribution panels. Establishing within a very short period of time an enviable reputation as a dynamic, innovative, and specialized company with expert and current resources offering a comprehensive and professional service, our dedicated and knowledgeable team plans projects and delivers industrial solutions through its proven products, innovative technology, and unparalleled services.

Name: Midea APAC
Description:
Midea International Business (MIB) is an international business arm of Midea Group, covering Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, Vietnam, Philippines, Hong Kong, South Korea, Australia and NZ in APAC. 

Midea Group aspires to the vision of “Bringing Great Innovations to Life”, upholding the Founders’ philosophy of creating a better life through technology. Midea Group has evolved into a global leading technology company specializing in five major business areas: Smart Home Business, Industrial and Building Technologies, Robotics & Automation, and Digital Innovation. Over the past five years, we have invested over $8 billion USD in R&D and developed a global network spanning 33 R&D centers and 40 major production sites across the world. At present, Midea Group’s products and services serve more than 500 million customers in over 200 countries and regions encompassing a brand portfolio containing Little Swan, Toshiba, WAHIN, COLMO, Clivet, Eureka, KUKA, GMCC, Welling, LINVOL, and Wandong. 

With nearly 200,000 employees globally and more than 40,000 based internationally, Midea Group ranks 277th on the Global Fortune 500 in 2024, marking the 9th consecutive year on the list. The company holds A/A2/A credit ratings from S&P, Moody's, and Fitch respectively. Midea Group places a strong focus on technology leadership, driving innovation across global markets. 

Through continuous investment in "Technology Leadership, Direct to User, Digital Intelligence Driven, and Global Breakthrough," we advance our leadership in Smart Home and Smart Manufacturing while fostering talent. By providing growth opportunities in a dynamic, global environment, we empower our teams to shape the future of innovation.

As we continue to see record growth, we require more and more international talent to ensure we deliver on our unlimited potential. If you have a global mindset, a drive for continuous improvement, and a desire to make a difference in your work, we wish to hear from you!

Name: Hitachi High-Tech Corporation
Description:
To a world full of hope. A future full of smiles.

Times are changing rapidly. All across this planet, as people go about their lives, we are facing a variety of challenges.
To address these challenges, knowledge of their root cause is essential.

Knowledge is where changing the world and the future begins.
With the power of knowledge, Hitachi High-Tech identifies the root causes of society and our customers broadly, deeply and accurately.

Including semiconductors, healthcare, the environment, materials, and industrial and social infrastructure, we provide products and solutions that address issues globally.
Knowledge of the genuine issues, and continually provide solutions that are truly vital.

A sustainable global environment, healthy, safe and secure living, and achieving sustainable development of science and industry
—these are our aims.

Hitachi High-Tech will continue to contribute through the evolving power of manufacturing.

Let's change the world. Let's change the future.

It all starts with knowledge.
Changing the World and Future with the Power of Knowledge

Hitachi High-Tech

Name: ARSON Engineering
Description:
In the Energy Sector, ARSON Engineering is the emerging firm providing engineering services, Site Services & Consultancy. ARSON Engineering has rich experience in providing services to public and private sector Clients on Energy projects of varied and diverse nature. 
ARSON Engineering set-up has been evolved with due cognizance of the requirements of this Sector which has been undergoing structural and institutional reforms in the recent past in most countries including Pakistan, U.A.E, Saudi Arabia and rest of the GULF Region.

Name: GILA Al Tawakol Electric
Description:
Gila Electric is a leading Egyptian manufacturer, distributor and agent for a vast array of electrical solutions and brands.
 
With 7 locations across the country, the company has established a strong position as a provider of a wide and diverse range of electrical products and services.
 
Gila Electric pursues its industrial goals through its factory in the 10th of Ramadan city, where the company manufactures low voltage electric panels to meet the high demand of both Egypt and the Middle East.
 
The firm provides the best brands through powerful partnerships with the largest international companies in the electric field such as Schneider Electric, APC, Unica, Motorola, Opple, .
 
With Gila Electric’s expertise, market savviness and immaculate management, the company was able to extend its product range to include UPS systems, IT racks, low voltage switchboards, transformers, wiring devices, LED lighting, BMS, rectifiers, stabilizers, light current and home automation systems.

Name: Magna-Power Electronics
Description: Magna-Power designs and manufactures robust programmable power products in the USA that set industry standards for quality, size, and control. The company’s experience in power electronics is reflected in its 1.25 kW to 2000 kW+ product line, quality service, and reputation for excellence. Today, you will find Magna-Power’s standard products at its thousands of customers worldwide, aiding in the manufacture of electric vehicles, simulating solar arrays for development of inverters, steering magnets for particle accelerators, powering radar systems, driving traction controllers for locomotive development, or at a wide range of Universities for cutting-edge energy research.

Name: KEC Asian Cables Ltd.
Description:
+Asian Cables through decades has grown by means of synergies derived from alliances and new developments – which have not only set it apart from others, but also made it one of India’s leading cable manufacturers.

+Trusted solution in cable engineering and manufacturing with expertise of over six decades.

+Pioneers of XLPE cables in India.

+Customers across all industry segments and exports to more than 60 countries.

+Proven capability to manufacture power cable as per IS, IEC, BS, AS, NZS and other international standards.

+Manufacturing range of power cables up to 220 kV (KEMA Certification) along with Turnkey cabling solutions.

+Complete Railway cabling portfolio including Quad, Signalling, OFC and Contact/ Catenary Conductors.

+Lead sheath instrumentation and Power cable for Oil and Gas Industry.

For RFQ or more information, feel free to email to cables@kecrpg.com

Name: 75F APAC
Description:
75F makes your building work for you. 
We at 75F, create smart solutions that harness the power of the Internet of Things (IoT) and Cloud Computing to predict, monitor and manage the needs of a building. Whether you are looking to optimize comfort, increase energy efficiency or gain insights into how your building uses energy, we can eliminate inefficiencies and increase your bottom line.
With an average customer savings of 41.8 percent in energy consumption and carbon footprint, 75F has a system that will work for any size of commercial space. 
Our global headquarters is located in Bloomington, MN in a state-of-the-art workspace of 10,000 square feet. We also have operations in India which serves as our primary office location in the APAC region along with an office in Singapore.
75F is backed by investment groups including billionaire-led Breakthrough Energy Ventures and Oil and Gas Climate Initiative.

Name: Cable Technology News
Description: Cable Technology News is updated daily with the latest news covering all the main areas of the cable and wire industry and also provides opportunities for manufacturers and distributors to feature their products and services via news, video, profiles and advertising.

Name: Ensto
Description:
Ensto enables green transition, reliable and safe supply of electricity by creating sustainable solutions for electricity distribution. We help our customers to build and improve their distribution networks.

We offer innovative line accessories, distribution automation, substations and protection, automation and control solutions for critical electrical infrastructure. 

With a team of 800 experts across Europe, North America and Asia, Ensto is committed to making life better with electricity. Sustainably.

Name: IEE Sensing
Description:
IEE has been developing and manufacturing world-class sensing solutions for over 30 years. From printed electronics to sophisticated radar and 3D camera technologies, we aim to deliver the best quality products and anticipate industry needs. 

As an established automotive system supplier and component manufacturer, we work closely with leading car makers around the Globe. Our sensors equipped more than 400 million vehicles, making the driving experience safer and more comfortable. We excel at passenger and child safety, we pioneered in occupant detection and occupant classification and our hands-off detection sensing solutions for assisted and automated driving has received the highest recognition in the field.  

But our innovative sensing systems go beyond the automotive sector. We also provide high-quality sensors for building management and security, input devices, sports and healthcare applications.

R&D is an integral part of who we are. Together with our customers and employees, we are tireless in finding new ideas and functional technologies. 

Thanks to the addition of our partner ALL CIRCUITS, we now also offer expertise in electronics manufacturing services (EMS).

Discover our products and services by visiting our website and contact us to develop new sensor-based applications.

Name: Maxim SMT Technologies Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
𝐌𝐚𝐱𝐢𝐦 𝐒𝐌𝐓 provides best in class sales and service support on complete 𝐒𝐌𝐓 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚.
Through comprehensive 𝐒𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬, MAXIM SMT helps electronics manufacturers to 𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐞𝐯𝐞 𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐲, 𝐛𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐞𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐥𝐝 𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭 while eliminating any production downtime. 

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐥𝐮𝐝𝐞:
 Pre-Sales Counselling
 Installation and Commissioning
 Production & Process Engineering Services
 Technical and Spare Parts Service Support

𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬, 𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐰𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐮𝐬 𝐚𝐭: 
sales@maximsmt.com

Name: INFiLED
Description:
INFiLED is headquartered in Shenzhen and registered under the full name Shenzhen Infiled Electronics Co., Ltd. It is a high-tech enterprise specialized in developing and manufacturing large LED video equipment.
	
Focused on constant innovation and continuous improvement, INFiLED now owns over 100 patents, which is one of the highest numbers in the industry.

INFiLED’s product range covers a wide range of applications, as there are advertisement, transportation, sports, events, command & control, corporate branding and meetings, creative applications and so much more. Our products have been installed in over 76 countries and our products have been CCC, CE, UL, ETL, FCC, RoHS and TUV certified.

Using the most advanced production equipment and the most reliable components, INFiLED delivers the highest quality and most reliable equipment available. INFiLED strictly carries out the ISO9001 Quality Management System, Total Quality Management System, ISO14001 Environment Management system and OHSAS18001 Occupational Health and Safety Management System.  INFiLED has grown fast over the past couple of years and our service is now extending worldwide.  We have opened a Global Repair Center in Hong Kong and we have sales, service and representative offices in United States, the Netherlands, United Kingdom, Middle East, Australia, South Africa and South America, offering customers the best service and user experience.

Based on the principle of ‘Dedicate work, Enjoy life’, INFiLED is striving to be a top brand of LED screen manufacturer to enlighten the world with a visual feast!

Name: Panasonic Connect Europe
Description:
With the Panasonic Group’s transition to a holding company system, Panasonic Connect Europe GmbH, which leads the B2B solutions business, is newly established.

In order to respond to the ever-changing market environment, we are transforming our organisation to enable rapid decision-making and further enhance our competitiveness, to better help innovate processes in our customers' operating sites.

The company name change reflects the goal to "connect" our customers’ operations to a better future.

By connecting our specialised hardware with the latest technologies such as process management software, IoT, and AI, and using the knowledge and expertise cultivated in our long history of manufacturing to provide advanced services, we will create value for our customers and provide solutions to their challenges.

Panasonic Connect Europe consist of the following business units: 
 
•	The Mobile Solutions Business Division helping mobile workers improve productivity with its range of Toughbook rugged notebooks, business tablets and handhelds

•	The Media Entertainment Business Division incorporating Visual System Solutions offering a range of high brightness and reliable projectors as well as high quality displays; and Broadcast & ProAV offering Smart Live Production solutions from an end-to-end portfolio consisting of PTZ and system cameras, camcorders, the Kairos IT/IP platform, switchers and robotic solutions that are widely used for live event capture, sports production, television, and xR studios

•	Business and Industry Solutions delivering tailored technology solutions focused on Retail, Logistics and Manufacturing. Designed to increase operational efficiency and enhance customer experience, helping businesses to perform at their best, every day

•	Panasonic Factory Solutions Europe selling a wide range of smart factory solutions including electronics manufacturing solutions, robot and welding systems and software solutions engineering.

Name: WAGO India
Description: Surpassing quality standards since 1951, we are a trusted partner to the industry in the field of electrical interconnection, interface electronics, and automation control technology. We enable the right connections and ensure their long-term reliability. With every step we take that leads to reliable electricity and data flow, we come a step closer to our vision – Being the backbone of the sustainable and smart connected world.

Name: OZDISAN ELEKTRONİK SAN. TİC. A.Ş.
Description:
OZDISAN ELEKTRONIK was founded in 1980 to produce UPS, Voltage Regulators and Induction
Hesating Systems in a small workshop at KARAKOY, ISTANBUL.

As a result of component supply problems in domestic market,
OZDISAN started to import components for own production from original sources directly.

In short timecomponents supply department became a distributor. INFORM was founded to take
over manufacturing businessand distribution was kept with OZDISAN.

Eventually OZDISAN became the biggest component distributor and gained a good reputation
as expert powerspecialist distributor. OZDISAN opened its first branch in KARAKOY in 1994. 6 other branches would follow by 2000. 

In 1995 INFORM moved to new factory in DES which is one of the biggest industrial estates
in Asian side of ISTANBUL.OZDISAN started to expand business at Kuledibi, KARAKOY.

In 1999 OZDISAN established factory automation division. Meantime OZDISAN widened the
product spectrum to passivecomponents and got new distributorships.

As a result of this growth and increased product range, old location at KARAKOY became insufficent by size
With the movement of INFORM from DES Industrial Estate to SARIGAZI factory, OZDISAN moved to
DES Industrial Estateat the end of 2005.Now OZDISAN has a very good reputation and exclusive
position in Turkish electronics sector with 7 branches nationwide,sales offices in neighbouring countries more than one hundred employees.

Quality of our service returned back to us as very prestigious customers portfolio like;
ARCELIK, PROFILO, KAREL, SOLECTRON, TUBITAK, ASELSAN.

Name: YAGEO Group
Description:
𝗬𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗢 𝗚𝗿𝗼𝘂𝗽
YAGEO Group, headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan, is a global leader in electronic components, delivering reliable, innovative solutions for diverse industries. Leveraging the strengths of YAGEO, KEMET, PULSE, and Telemecanique Sensors, we provide industry-leading resistors, capacitors, inductors, magnetics, and sensors that drive advancements in automotive, aerospace, telecommunications, and industrial sectors.

𝗠𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗩𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
Our mission is to forge sustainable partnerships by harnessing our global scale, diverse product portfolio, and innovative team. We aim to shape an interconnected future through technological excellence and customer-focused solutions.

𝗚𝗹𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗹 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗰𝗵 & 𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗰 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲
With over 100 locations worldwide, YAGEO Group combines a global reach with localized support across the Americas, EMEA, and Asia. Our strategically located facilities and regional expertise allow us to meet customer demands efficiently and reliably. Each of our brands—KEMET’s R&D centers, PULSE’s connectivity innovations, and YAGEO’s manufacturing scale—enhances our ability to deliver quality components globally, tailored to local market needs.

𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗖𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
YAGEO Group’s strength lies in brand synergy: KEMET’s materials expertise, PULSE’s connectivity solutions, and Telemecanique Sensors' detection innovations complement YAGEO Group’s leadership in electronic components. This cross-brand collaboration enables us to provide high-performance, integrated solutions for even the most demanding industry applications, from automotive to AI.

Name: Rangs Electronics Limited
Description:
In 1984 Rangs Electronics Ltd. (REL) established in Dhaka, Bangladesh. This private limited company was registered under the Companies Act of 1913 and was incorporated in Bangladesh on 29th march 1984. REL is one of the most reputed organizations in Bangladesh. The company has always been known as a pioneer in the field of consumer electronics technology in Bangladesh. It enjoys the number one position in assembling, manufacturing, importing, exporting, repairing, exchanging, dealing and marketing all sorts of electronics & electrical goods. REL is the only authorized licensee of SONY CORPORATION, TOKYO, JAPAN. The company has been assembling, marketing and distributing SONY products in Bangladesh for the last 30 years. REL is also an authorized distributor of world famous brands like,  PANASONIC, FUJI, DAISHIN and YASUKA. In addition, the company has developed its own brand RANGS.

In 1986, Rangs Electronics Ltd. started with only one brand - SONY with only one 12” Black & White TV and one RCR. Since then, the brand lineup has increased to more than 20 and the product lineup to 450. Since then,  The product lineup of Rangs Electronics Ltd. has increasing day by day. REL is now the leadinag marketing, selling and distributing company has the reputation of being a poineer in the field of Consumer Electronics, Home & Kitchen Appliance, Broadcast & Content Creation, Medical Equipments technology in Bangaldesh. Rangs Electronics Ltd. is presently occupying 30% of total Electronics and Home Appliances market share in Bangladesh. 

Now the company has a network of 95 CTP (Showroom & Sales Center) with more than 460 authorized Dealers and 70 Service Centers with nearly 375 Mobile Service (Moving Service Unit) throughout the country.

Name: Transsion Tecno Electronics (Pvt) Ltd
Description: Transsion Tecno Electronics (Pvt) Ltd has been set up in Karachi as a 60:40 Joint Venture to produce 4.8 million smartphones per year.

Name: Epson Singapore
Description:
Epson Singapore Pte Ltd was established in October 1982 as Epson Electronics (Singapore) Pte Ltd, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Seiko Epson Corporation, Japan, with the objective of promoting the sales and marketing of Epson printers in the region. In 1987, our business scope was expanded to include the sale of electronic components and system devices. The company was subsequently renamed Epson Singapore Pte Ltd in 1988.

Our product portfolio saw rapid expansion in the following years to include more IT based products such as colour inkjet printers, scanners, digital cameras, large format printers, laser printers and serial impact dot matrix printers that cater to both business and personal user environments.

In recent years, we have also successfully entered the competitive market of visual instruments with highly-sophisticated LCD projectors and peripherals as well as system devices such as crystal oscillators, camera modules, D-TED colour LCD modules, ultra-compact TFT LCD modules, LCD modules, LCD drivers and ASIC/System LSI microcomputers. Then there are also the highly regarded Epson Point-Of-Sales receipt printers that have been holding a worldwide leadership position.

January 2001 marked an exciting milestone in the new millennium for Epson Singapore when we were accorded the status of regional headquarters. With that move, our regional sales network was substantially enlarged to include countries in Southeast Asia with the highest economic growth potential. Most recently in April 2012, Epson Singapore was made the regional sales and service headquarters for our world-rernowned factory automation robots.

Name: Teledyne DALSA
Description:
Teledyne DALSA is an international technology leader in sensing, imaging, and specialized semiconductor fabrication. Our image sensing solutions span the spectrum from infrared through visible to X-ray; our MEMS foundry has earned a world-leading reputation. In addition, through our subsidiaries Teledyne Optech and Teledyne Caris, we deliver advanced 3D survey and geospatial information systems. Teledyne DALSA employs approximately 1400 employees worldwide and is headquartered in Waterloo, Canada. For more information, visit www.teledynedalsa.com.

Teledyne DALSA has earned its reputation as a global leader in high-performance imaging and semiconductors. Teledyne DALSA, its employees, and partners are committed to enabling industry, art, and exploration through innovative technology.

Our business aligns into three core business units: Digital Imaging (Waterloo, Montreal, Billerica), Semiconductor (Bromont), and Life Sciences Imaging/Medical Devices (Eindhoven, Sunnyvale).

Teledyne DALSA has R&D locations around the world, including  Waterloo, ON (Canada),  Bromont, QC (Canada),  Montreal, QC (Canada),  Eindhoven (The Netherlands), Billerica, MA (USA), plus several Sales & Support sites, including Munich, Tokyo, and Shanghai.

Teledyne DALSA is part of the Digital Imaging business unit of Teledyne Technologies, Inc, headquartered in Thousand Oaks, California.  Teledyne Technologies (www.teledyne.com) is a global leader in several key technology verticals, with annual revenues of $2 billion (USD) and 9,000 employees worldwide.

Name: Dahua Technology India
Description:
Dahua Technology India Private Limited takes pride in introducing itself as an inspiration with a perspective to enable a safer society and smarter living. 

Being an Indian ancillary of Zhejiang Dahua Technology Co. Ltd., the organization acclaims a thoughtful and leading-edge approach in designing and manufacturing virtual and end-to-end security solutions.

With the leading state-of-the-art range of CCTV cameras, mobile and traffic management tools, video recorders, smart motion detection equipment, security screening tools, attendance and access control systems, drones, thermal temperature cameras and access terminals and related accessories, Dahua Technology India aspire to be the epitome of virtual security and surveillance. 

Dahua India’s Indian headquarter is established in Guru gram and regional offices in the economic capital of India, Mumbai and Silicon Valley of India, Bengaluru, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Pune, Indore, and Chennai. Dahua Technology India houses some of the brilliant and ingenious minds to trail-blaze the research and development strategies, operations, pre and post-sales support, technical support.

Our products are available in more than 20 states and 100 cities. The nationwide comprehensive coverage of network sales adds a hint of delight amongst our customers and clients. 

Dahua Technology India believes in nurturing the roots of perceptive and intelligent security across the nation, hence strengthening the roots in constructing a smarter living ideology and sustainable societies.

Name: NTL Electronics India Ltd.
Description:
NTL Electronics India Ltd., head quartered in NOIDA, the modern industrial town in Delhi’s National Capital Region, is today India’s most respected manufacturer of electronic products for the lighting industry and the largest manufacturer of lighting electronics in the world, outside China.


We are known for our lighting electronics expertise and our development and manufacturing capabilities thereof. Our focus on quality, our R & D capabilities, market responsiveness and the ability to scale up manufacturing capacities for meeting clients’ needs distinguishes us, making us a preferred supplier for the who’s who of the lighting industry.


We are pioneers in developing electronic ballasts that perform reliably under the power supply conditions prevailing in India. Today, the product portfolio of NTL comprises of electronic control gears, ballasts, luminaires, retrofit CFLs, LED drivers and LED lighting products. These are manufactured across seven manufacturing plants with a capacity of 18 million units per month.


A proactive, forward thinking organization which has scaled all odds in creating an integrated global level manufacturing setup, NTL is today moving forward with a well defined, time bound executable plan to establish a global footprint for advanced lighting solutions.


In April 2012, NTL and Lemnis Lighting entered into a joint venture for the manufacture and marketing of LED solutions by creating NTL Lemnis.


Currently, NTL family has 5000 members spread across 7 manufacturing plants in India. Company also has operations in South Africa and Europe.

Name: CBi-electric: low voltage
Description:
CBI-electric: low voltage is a supplier of electrical protection and IoT solutions for global applications. These solutions include products such as Miniature Circuit Breakers, Moulded Case Circuit Breakers, wiring accessories, specialised application Circuit Breakers and Smart IoT devices.

CBI-electric: low voltage previously known as Circuit Breaker Industries or CBI, is located in Johannesburg, South Africa. We supply world class  low voltage electrical distribution, protection and control equipment.

With an exciting background of ground breaking achievements, CBI-electric: low voltage has prospered for more than five decades to become a leader in the design, development and manufacture of circuit breakers.

CBI supplies products to sectors such as Residential Utilities, Commercial developers, Industrial and mining and general power distribution applications.

Over the past 10 years, based on our successes the majority of our production output is exported and they hold safety approvals from Europe, Germany Russia, Ukraine, China, Japan and United States of America. Export markets are served by subsidiaries in Germany Australia and the United States of America,

CBI-electric: low voltage has established itself as a supplier of World class products and solutions to niche markets globally.

Fast Facts:

•	CBI-electric: low voltage developed and launched the world’s first high sensitivity earth leakage relay
        (Residual Current Device) in 1957
•	CBI-electric: low voltage has the only private testing facility of its kind in the Southern Hemisphere
•	CBI-electric: low voltage’s products hold safety certification approvals from safety authorities all over the
        world
•	CBI-electric: low voltage owns the intellectual property rights to all products manufactured by the company

Name: Lightware Visual Engineering
Description:
We keep listening, delivering and going the extra mile. 

Lightware Visual Engineering is a European audiovisual (AV) manufacturing company, a high-fidelity signal management specialist in the design, manufacture, and delivery of a comprehensive portfolio of matrix switchers, extenders, and AV-over-IP systems. Lightware’s devices are powering a wide range of AV projects from large-scale live events to collaboration spaces to mission-critical operations across four continents and the company proudly serves the global AV community for 25 years.
We are providing solutions for a wide-range of verticals – including Corporate, Education, Esport & Gaming, Defence & Intelligence, Rental & Staging, Medical, Digital Signage, Government and Industrial – the future focus is on Lightware’s customer needs to deliver viable solutions above expectations, with an uncompromising level of customer service and support.

Name: Fluke Brasil
Description:
A Fluke Corporation, fundada em 1948, na cidade de Everett (EUA), é líder mundial no segmento de equipamentos e softwares para teste e medição.

Há 15 anos no Brasil, a marca Fluke é reconhecida no mundo pela confiança, segurança, robustez, durabilidade e facilidade de uso das ferramentas. E foi escolhida a marca de ferramentas de teste e medição mais confiável pelos clientes,  em sua maioria técnicos, engenheiros, eletricistas, metrologistas e profissionais de diagnósticos prediais que instalam, resolvem problemas e administram indústrias, equipamentos elétricos e processos de calibração para o controle de qualidade e manutenção de edifícios.

Empresa subsidiária do grupo Danaher, a Fluke é uma empresa multinacional com sede em Everett (WA), nos EUA. Com fábricas nos EUA, Inglaterra, Holanda e Asia. E escritórios de vendas e Customer Service na América do Norte, América do Sul, Ásia, Austrália e Europa. Além de mais de 2.400 canais de distribuição autorizados.

Name: GoldenBright
Description:
Welcome to the official GoldenBright LinkedIn page! 

 Golden Bright EST.1998. – Your Expert in High Mast Lighting | Stadium Lighting | Mid Mast Lighting | Mid-hinged Poles | Sports Lighting |  Smart Poles |  Road Lighting | Solar Street Lighting |  Utility poles  | Transmission poles   Solutions
Our products are designed to enhance the lighting in sports stadiums, parking lots, streets, and commercial spaces with reliability and energy efficiency.

At GoldenBright, we are committed to delivering innovative lighting solutions that meet the needs of urban environments and large-scale commercial projects. Our expertise lies in creating durable, high-performance lighting systems that contribute to safer, more sustainable outdoor spaces.

Follow us for the latest updates, product innovations, and insights into the world of outdoor lighting.

Name: L&L Luce&Light
Description:
Crafting light for life.

Designing and producing lighting fixtures using LED technology is our speciality.

We are proud to be an authentic example, established in 2007, of the Made in Italy branding, with a flair for innovation and a profound appreciation of architectural projects. Our lighting fixtures integrate perfectly with both outdoor
and indoor spaces and surfaces to recreate natural architectural illumination. All our products are designed at our headquarters in Vicenza, Veneto, where our meticulous creative process guarantees the highest possible quality and the greatest, long-lasting reliability.

Name: FURUKAWA ELECTRIC GROUP
Description: Furukawa Electric Group’s Corporate Philosophy is “Drawing on more than a century of expertise in the development and fabrication of advanced materials, we will contribute to the realization of a sustainable society through continuous technological innovation.” And, from our founding in 1884 to the present day, we have developed a wide range of products throughout the world in infrastructure areas such as telecommunications and energy, automobile parts area, and electronics area around our four core technological capabilities in metals, polymers, photonics and high frequency, thereby making conveying, connecting, and storing energy, information, and heat the pillars of our business.

Name: TOPTRONIC
Description:
Toptronic is an Intellectual Property Provider to the Electrical Test Equipment Industry. We run state of the art Research and Development Laboratories where we develop some innovative and unique ASIC Technologies to be utilized in the manufacture of Electrical Test Equipment according to regulations and insurance specifications. We have R&D facilities in Hong Kong, Taipei-Taiwan, Brisbane-Australia, Phoenix-USA and Johannesburg-South Africa.
Our facilities includes semiconductor analyzer, current generation and measurement from 1fA up to 2000A, AC and DC, voltage generation and measurement from 100fV to 500kV, AC and DC, Power Generation and Electrical Network Simulator, etc... to mention a few.

Name: LSI Industries Inc.
Description: Headquartered in Greater Cincinnati, LSI is a publicly held company traded over the NASDAQ Stock Exchange under the symbol LYTS.  The Company manufactures non-residential lighting and retail display solutions.  Non-residential lighting consists of high-performance, American-made lighting solutions.  The Company’s strength in outdoor lighting applications creates opportunities for it to introduce additional solutions to its valued customers.  Retail display solutions consist of graphics solutions, digital signage and technically advanced food display equipment for strategic vertical markets.  LSI’s team of internal specialists also provide comprehensive project management services in support of large-scale product rollouts.  The company employs about 1,400 people at 11 manufacturing plants in the U.S. and Canada.  Learn more at www.lsicorp.com.

Name: PCB Power India
Description:
With over 25 years of experience, PCB Power is committed to elevating the standard of the electronics industry in India. Our manufacturing facility in Gujarat is equipped with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 13485:2016, and UL-certified infrastructure, ensuring rigorous quality control and process reliability at every step.

We offer end-to-end PCB solutions—including PCB Fabrication, Component Sourcing, PCB Assembly, PCB Layout, and Stencil Manufacturing—catering to a wide range of industries such as aerospace, automotive, industrial automation, renewable energy, medical devices, and more.

As proud members of the Institute of Printed Circuits (IPC) and holders of LCSO certification, we align with global manufacturing standards and defense-grade compliance. With no minimum order quantity and quick-turn capabilities, we support both high-volume production and low-volume prototyping needs.

Our platform is constantly evolving to deliver a smarter and more seamless customer experience. From our enhanced customer portal with order tracking and instant price calculators to tools like PowerBOM for BOM upload and validation, we’re streamlining every stage of the procurement journey—helping our customers go from idea to implementation faster.

Visit pcbpower.com to learn more.

Name: Basler AG
Description:
Basler is a leading international manufacturer of imaging components for computer vision applications such as cameras, lenses, frame grabbers, software as well as embedded vision solutions, customized products and consulting services. 
The products are used in a variety of computer vision markets, including factory automation, medical, traffic, logistics, retail, and robotics. Founded in 1988, the Basler Group employs approximately 1000 people at its headquarters in Ahrensburg and other locations in Europe, Asia and North America.

Name: OMEGA Engineering
Description:
Omega sells more than 165,000 products used to measure temperature and humidity, flow and level, and pressure. Products include thermocouple probes and assemblies, pressure gauges and switches, and air velocity measurement systems. Omega also makes data loggers and recorders, as well as electric heaters. The company was founded in 1962. Omega is a DwyerOmega brand.

Positions are open, see our careers page:
http://www.omega.com/about/employ99.html

Name: Bruker AXS
Description:
Bruker is driven by a single idea: to provide the best technological solution for each analytical task. Worldwide, more than 6,000 employees are working on this challenge at over 90 locations on all continents. Bruker systems cover a broad spectrum of applications in all fields of research and development and are used in industrial production processes for the purpose of ensuring quality and process reliability. 

Bruker is one of the world's leading analytical instrumentation companies and continues to develop state-of-the-art technologies and innovative solutions for today’s analytical questions. Bruker AXS is one the divisions of  Bruker Inc. 

Bruker AXS is a leading global developer and manufacturer of analytical X-ray systems for elemental analysis and materials research. Our innovative solutions enable a wide range of customers in research and industry – including chemistry, petrochemistry, pharmaceuticals, metals and steel, semiconductor, cement, minerals and mining, automotive, forensics, environmental, art and conservation, nanotechnology and life sciences – to make technological advancements and accelerate their progress.

For chemical analysis using X-rays, we offer instrumentation suited all the way from the research laboratory to the production floor to the exploration field!

Imprint: https: https://info.axs.bruker.com/AXS-Social-Media-Imprint.html

Privacy Policy: https://www.bruker.com/de/legal/privacy-policy.html

Name: KEENFINITY Group
Description:
At KEENFINITY, we are a globally leading provider of innovative security and professional communication solutions. We go beyond technology — we secure, connect, and amplify the moments that matter.

Built on decades of Bosch quality and reliability, we are now charting our own path, delivering cutting-edge solutions in video surveillance, intrusion detection, access control, and voice alarm systems — all designed to protect people, buildings, and assets. We will continue providing these quality products under the Bosch brand. Our professional audio and critical communications products include world-renowned brands such as Electro-Voice, Dynacord, RTS, and Telex.

Operating in over 90 locations across 50+ countries, we combine a heritage of quality with a bold vision of innovation to shape the future of communication, security, and manufacturing excellence. We exceed the expected.

As of 1 July 2025, KEENFINITY operates as independent company within the portfolio of European investment firm Triton, following its successful spin-off from the Bosch Group. 

Follow us to stay connected as we elevate possibilities and pioneer what’s next.

 Keenfinity GmbH 2025, all rights reserved
Corporate information: https://www.keenfinity-group.com/xc/en/terms-of-use/corporate-information/
GERMAN - Information Obligations for Service Providers | EU Directive (2006/123/EG): https://www.keenfinity-group.com/de/de/nutzungsbedingungen/nutzungsbedingungen/anbieter/

Name: GPV
Description:
GPV is a global customer-driven EMS (Electronics Manufacturing Services) partner. Our vision is to be the most trusted, powerful, and top-of-mind EMS partner to our customers. 

GPV is the second-largest EMS company with European Headquarters counting more than 7,500 employees worldwide and a turnover in 2024 of DKK 8.9 billion (EUR 1.2 billion). 

Headquarters in Denmark serve as base for our electronics, mechanics, and cable-assemblies manufacturing operations in eleven countries worldwide:  China (2), Denmark (1), Estonia (1), Finland (1), Germany (1), Mexico (1), Slovakia (3), Sri Lanka (1), Sweden (1), Switzerland (1), & Thailand (2). 

GPV provides complex electronics, cable-harness, mechatronics, and box-build solutions including product and application design as well as test development activities to customers worldwide across the high-mix EMS value chain. Our customers are typically among the very best in their niche.

GPV has more than 60 years of experience within EMS, which is why we deliver timely, faultless, quality product solutions to our customers. However, our customers should expect even more. They should expect that a partnership with GPV allows them to accomplish and gain more – more time, more growth, more cash flow, more profit - more sustainably.

We fully recognise that these words are nothing without action, and we will do our utmost to prove them in our customer relationship every day.

Since 1 April 2016, GPV has been part of the Danish industrial conglomerate Schouw & Co. and since 3 October 2022, GPV is owned jointly by Schouw & Co. (80%) and Ahlström Capital Group (20%).

Name: E Ink Corporation
Description: E Ink is the originator, pioneer and commercial leader in ePaper technology. The company delivers its advanced display products to the world's most influential brands and manufacturers, enabling them to install extremely durable, low power displays in previously impossible or unimaginable applications and environments. E Ink’s corporate philosophy centers around delivering revolutionary products, excellent user experiences, and environmental benefits through advanced technology development.

Name: PREMO Group
Description:
Global Leader in Innovative Magnetics enabling Technology for the 4th Industrial Revolution: RFID, NFC, Virtual Reality, Augmented Reality, IoT, Electric Vehicles and M2M. 

Our product portfolio includes RFID antennas (worldwide leader), VR/AR EM Motion Tracking Sensors, power transformers, inductors & chokes, current sensors, EMC filters, PLC components. In addition to our broad range of standard components, off-the-shelf products, PREMO also designs custom solutions to fit customer requirements, based on the latest technologies to help your systems be more efficient.

1500 employees at over 8 design and production locations and an extensive sales network let PREMO have a global presence to meet country specific needs.

More than 60 years being a preferred supplier because of our strong commitment to business excellence, engineering support, reliable delivery and the quality of our products.   

www.grupopremo.com

Name: Cummins Generator Technologies
Description:
Cummins Generator Technologies is the home of STAMFORD | AvK, the world-renowned alternator solution. To find out more about STAMFORD and AvK alternators, make sure to follow the official page: STAMFORD | AvK

STAMFORD | AvK provide the ultimate power solution for world-class expertise and 24/7 global lifecycle support, as the world’s energy demands evolve. Our STAMFORD and AvK alternators are renowned throughout the power generation industry for dependability and pioneering innovation, from 7.5-11,200kVA. Peace of mind is guaranteed in a range of applications including marine, telecoms, standby and critical protection, CHP, rail and prime power. We are powering tomorrow, together.

Name: Urmet Spa
Description: Since 1937 Urmet designs, develops and manufactures high-value integrated building communication and security systems to make installers’ work easier. The headquarters are in Turin, where R&D, Marketing and Logistics are located. Other technology hubs engaged in research and design are located in 13 plants in 6 countries. Millions of people, every day, are in touch with Urmet's leading technology. Houses, malls or air-ports, are the places where we live, work or spend our free time. Each place interacts with us through the technology delivered by communication, security and automation systems. Thanks to this strategy Urmet can deliver integrated solutions for home automation and domotics, in-building communication and security worldwide: video-doorphone, wired and wireless intrusion alarm systems, fire alarm systems, access control, video-surveillance, temperature control. With Urmet, cus-tomers can benefit from a unique partner to design, develop and deploy the integrated project that fits all needs best, with the most efficient and reliable solution.

Name: Animo Tech
Description:
Navigating the open-ended problem solving environment of R&D, we call on our diverse backgrounds of skills and industries to make critical decisions every day.

Our next project: 

The essential vaporizer -- the excalibur to phase out the cigarette worldwide.

Name: Orbotech
Description:
Orbotech is a KLA company.
KLA develops industry-leading equipment and services that enable innovation throughout the electronics industry. We provide advanced process control and process-enabling solutions for manufacturing wafers and reticles, integrated circuits, packaging, printed circuit boards and flat panel displays. In close collaboration with leading customers across the globe, our expert teams of physicists, engineers, data scientists and problem-solvers design solutions that move the world forward.

Name: FG Wilson
Description:
Founded in 1966, FG Wilson is a leading global supplier of diesel generator sets with a strong heritage of quality, support and value.  From 6.8 to over 2,500 kVA, today FG Wilson offers one of the widest ranges of generator sets, all built in modern facilities in Europe, Asia and Latin America.  

FG Wilson generator sets have been installed in more than 150 countries worldwide, in hospitals, banks, airports, data centres, factories, construction sites, hotels, offices and telecommunications networks. 
Since 1990, over 600,000 FG Wilson generator sets have been installed for our customers, in a multitude of applications and in all environments.  

However, FG Wilson is about more than just the metal.  Developed over 50 years, FG Wilson has a local network of over 300 dealers in every continent, supporting customers from product selection through to installation and a lifetime of service.  Our dealers carry a ready stock of parts for hassle-free fast service and are backed up by a 59,500 square metres parts facility, carrying more than 11,500 product lines and delivering 3 million parts a year.  

Next time you’re thinking of buying a generator set, we invite you to visit www.fgwilson.com where you’ll find your nearest dealer.  We promise you’ll be well looked after.

Name: HOLOPLOT
Description:
We build hardware and software products that push the boundaries of conventional audio and speaker technology.

HOLOPLOT systems enable a radical new approach to Sound Control for Live, Experiential, and Speech applications. 

Based on the unique combination of 3D Audio-Beamforming and Wave Field Synthesis, our products have freed sound from space. We provide outstanding solutions that can navigate even the most challenging acoustic environments - Sound Intelligence that enables better Sound Control, setting a new standard for Sound Quality.

Name: Synedyne Systems
Description:
Synedyne Systems, an Original Design Manufacturer, is a fast-growing and dynamic organization dedicated to achieving its vision. The name "Synedyne" comes from "Synergy in Dynamics," reflecting our emphasis on the interplay of physical systems. We specialize in sensing, control, and connectivity within dynamic environments. Our core strength lies in developing and manufacturing world-class products through a comprehensive economic approach. Our value system is encapsulated by the acronym FACTS, which stands for Focus on Quality, Always work with Integrity, Continual Improvement, Timeliness, and Sensitivity to Cost. 
We operate across four business verticals: Automotive, Off-Road Vehicles, Defense, and Infrastructure, offering five distinct product lines within these segments. Our product portfolio includes Sensors, Smart Water Meters, Motor Controllers, Machine Controllers, Smart Instrument Clusters, and Fault Tolerant Control Systems. 
We are proud to collaborate with leading multinational customers in each of these market segments. We are proud of producing and supplying over 3 million controllers for passenger four-wheelers, and over 50,000 Smart Water Meters. 
With a strong team of over 100 people in different functions, Synedyne is poised to grow exponentially in the coming years.

Name: SMTC Corporation
Description:
SMTC is a global Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) provider, delivering fully integrated and customized contract manufacturing services.

Our focus on key customer markets is what drives SMTC; we strive in creating added value for our global based customers. We understand the dynamics of these markets and can adapt to changes that influence our customers businesses. As a direct result, we support our customers to increase their market position by working as a team by being open and flexible to their required needs on delivering low-cost, high quality products as their markets demand it.

Name: Axis Electrical Components (I) Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
With a history of more than 25 years in the field of manufacturing and supplying a vast range of electrical hardware, the Axis brand has become synonymous with high quality and tested products. From its base in the Mumbai, Axis has supplied to projects all over India and exports to over 80 countries with a diverse set of clientele that cover every continent. 

Axis is India’s leading Manufacturer & Exporter of non-Ferrous components used in electrical installations, equipment building industries and low & medium voltage electrical distribution systems. With an in-house R&D and testing facility, Axis has the capacity to constantly innovate with customer requirements in mind, thus putting it at the forefront of innovation in its sector. 

Axis's Technical Capabilities:

•	LV/HV AB Cable Accessories
•	Distribution Boxes
•	OH Line Hardware
•	Cable Lugs and Connectors
•	Cable Glands
•	Earthing/Grounding & Lightning Protection Systems
•	Surge Protection Devices
•	SS Cable Ties & Markers 
•	Exothermic Welding System

Axis products are manufactured in accordance to international and domestic specifications such as CE, BS, BS EN, DIN, UL, NF C, IS, etc. with an emphasis on IEC directives. Axis is an ISO 9001:2015 certified organisation that was certified as SE 1A by Crisil (an S&P Global Company) that states that Axis has the Highest Performance Capability and High Financial Strength.

Axis supplies to a wide range of customers including OEM’s, National & State Utilities, Contracting Companies and Multinationals in the international and domestic markets. With approvals at major utilities across India and the world, Axis products are sold through distributors, via global or Indian tenders or directly to customers. You can view a list of those utilities on our website: http://axis-india.com/certifications-testing/  

Products can also be manufactured under a customer’s brand name, if required.

Name: Legrand Türkiye
Description: Merkezi Fransa’da bulunan Legrand, bina, elektrik ve dijital altyapıları için ürün ve sistemler konusunda uzmandır. 180 ülkede, 36 binden fazla çalışanı ile 215 binin üzerinde farklı ürün referansına sahip Legrand Grup’un konutlar, ticari ve endüstriyel yapılar için komple sistem çözümleri bulunmaktadır. Legrand Grup, trafo, şalt ürünleri, dağıtım panoları, kablo taşıma sistemleri, anahtar priz serileri, ev otomasyon sistemleri, acil durum aydınlatma ürünleri, yapısal kablolama, interkom ve aydınlatma kontrol sistemleri sunmaktadır.

Name: Sanxing Electric
Description:
Ningbo Sanxing Electric (601567.SH) as an integrated solution supplier of smart power distribution and consumption, covers by smart meters, transformers, box-type substations, switchgears, charging piles, etc.

It has manufacturing bases in Ningbo, Braizil, Indonesia, Poland, Germany,
and Mexico, and also two R&Ds in Ningbo, Shenzhen and Hangzhou. It has mature marketing channel and strategic cooperation projects in more than 70 countries and regions.

In the future, Sanxing Electric will deepen the smart grid industrial chain, focus on smart power consumption and power distribution, speed up industrial upgrading and expansion, and devote to be an excellent partner for global power customers in the integrated value chain.

Name: Laser Power & Infra. Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Laser Power & Infra is one of India’s leading Cable & Conductor manufacturing company having valuable experience of more than two and half decades. It is into the manufacturing of LT Power & Control cables, HT cables upto 66 kv, LT & HT Aerial Bunched Cables, Instrumentation cables and AAC, ACSR  &  AAAC  conductors  for  all  verticals.  The company has widened its portfolio and has attained a reputed name in the cable industry. Our product caters  to  wide  range  of  industries  including  Power  Generation  and  State DISCOMs, Railways, Construction, Defense and many others.

Laser Power & Infra has always laid a great emphasis on manufacturing excellence, technological advancement and customer satisfaction. Our in-house process control and quality assurance experts ensure that every customer receives  high  quality  products.  This  is  reflected  in  its  approval  and appreciations from customers meeting stringent technical requirements.

Laser  Power   &  Infra   is  equipped   with  the  state-of-the-art   machines, hardware,  software  and  infrastructure  to  make  its  position  in  the  industry. Being a manufacturer of high quality cables and conductors, the management has  played  a  key  role  in  influencing   major  decisions   and  embarking   on innovative solutions.

Name: Elmex Controls Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
'elmex' is a pioneer in the field of Electrical Wire Termination Technology in India. elmex started its journey in 1963 with the manufacturing of Rail Mounted Clip-On type Terminal Blocks for the Switchgear Industry.  elmex developed this product as an import substitute item in our country, thus helping nation conserve foreign exchange which was then very scarce. Steered on by the vision of our founder and chairman, Mr. J D Ray, elmex has moved from strength to strength and is regarded as the leader in manufacturing terminal blocks in the country.

The steady and systematic growth coupled with the desire for incremental innovations, unfaltering customer service and steadily increasing manufacturing productivity has brought elmex to it's current level of competence.	elmex’s Techno-economic competitiveness has led many multinationals to choose elmex as a global outsourcing partner. elmex brand equity is reflected by the fact that we serve some of the biggest names in national and multinational companies such as ABB, Alstom, Siemens, BHEL, Honeywell, GE, L&T, Schneider Electric and Yokogawa

Elmex Controls Pvt. Ltd.
12, GIDC Estate, Makarpura Road, Vadodara

Name: Applied Energy Technologies Private Limited
Description:
At Applied Energy Technologies, we are redefining the energy landscape with cost-efficient, distributed, and sustainable energy solutions.

Your Partner in End-to-End Energy Solutions
From design and installation to operation and maintenance, we provide fully integrated energy solutions tailored to meet your unique needs.

- End-to-end support to simplify and streamline your energy transition.

   business and drive sustainable growth.

Name: Dekko
Description:
At Dekko, we power innovation and advance the future. We turn possibilities into reality by delivering transformative power and lighting solutions that enhance spaces and improve everyday experiences where people work, live, and connect. With our expertise in precision assembly and contract manufacturing, we provide customized, high-performance solutions that meet the unique needs of our customers.

 
We are not just powering the present; we are illuminating the path to a smarter, more connected future.

Name: ATLANTA ELECTRICALS LIMITED
Description: ATLANTA ELECTRICALS is an electrical/electronic manufacturing company based out of India.

Name: Midea Carrier Brasil
Description: A Midea Carrier é fruto da união de duas gigantes mundiais do mercado: a Midea, líder em produção de eletrodomésticos, e a Carrier, líder em climatização e fundada pelo inventor do ar-condicionado, Willis Carrier. Em 2011, as duas empresas formaram uma joint venture para produzir e distribuir produtos no Brasil, na Argentina e no Chile, se tornando a maior fabricante de equipamentos de climatização da América Latina. É detentora das marcas Midea, Carrier, Springer e Toshiba (para distribuição de ar-condicionado), oferecendo soluções completas para climatização residencial e comercial, além de eletrodomésticos que facilitam e trazem novas experiências para o dia a dia. São três fábricas – duas no Brasil e uma na Argentina – e mais de 1,8 mil colaboradores que trabalham para desenvolver produtos cada vez mais inovadores, eficientes e econômicos. Para garantir a distribuição dos produtos, a Midea Carrier possui mais de 200 lojas especializadas, além de um grupo com cerca de 700 revendedores credenciados e a presença nas principais lojas de varejo e e-commerce do Brasil. A base destas conquistas é um ambiente de trabalho estimulante, inclusivo e de respeito para todos. Nossos colaboradores fazem parte de equipes que incentivam, impulsionam, despertam competências e desenvolvem talentos. Com isso nosso time busca e alcança grandes conquistas, com ideias criativas e inovadoras que transformam seu dia a dia.

Name: Indurama
Description: Son más de 40 años, desde que Indurama viene ofreciendo refrigeradoras, cocinas y otros electrodomésticos caracterizados por su diseño y estilo propios. Además, su calidad y garantía efectiva, han permitido que nuestros productos estén presentes en 9 países de Latinoamérica.

Name: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Limited
Description:
CG Power and Industrial Solutions Limited is an engineering conglomerate headquartered in Mumbai, India. The Company is a leader in the Electrical Engineering Industry and has two business lines—Industrial Systems and Power Systems. It manufactures Traction Motors, Propulsion systems, Signaling Relays etc., for the Indian Railways, and wide range of Induction Motors, Drives, Transformers, Switchgears, and other allied products for the Industrial and Power sectors. Recently, the Company also made a foray into the business of Consumer Appliances such as Fans, Pumps, and Water Heaters.  

The Company has world-class manufacturing plants across 9 locations in India and one in Sweden, and a Pan India network of 5 Regional and 14 Branch offices, with around 3,113 employees. 

The Company continues to excel and maintain its leadership position across its businesses, backed by its outstanding expertise, customer-centric approach, and enhanced focus on innovation and sustainability. 

Since November 2020, the Company has become a part of the renowned Murugappa Group.

CG is publicly listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange and National Stock Exchange. 

For more information on CG, please visit: www.cgglobal.com

Name: Toshiba
Description:
For 150 years, Toshiba has been engineering solutions that drive progress, empower industries, and create a more resilient future.

The Toshiba Americas Group consists of four companies working together across North America to deliver trusted technologies in energy, industry, infrastructure, and electronics. From grid modernization and power generation to advanced motors, semiconductors, and storage systems—our people and technologies support some of the most critical sectors of society.

Whether we’re enabling decarbonization, powering secure data centers, or nurturing tomorrow’s STEM leaders, our mission remains clear:

Committed to People. 
Committed to the Future.

Companies within Toshiba America Group:
• Toshiba America, Inc. (TAI): Corporate holding company
• Toshiba America Energy Systems Corp. (TAES): Power generation and service solutions
• Toshiba International Corporation (TIC): Motors, drives, UPS, automotive systems, and T&D
• Toshiba America Electronic Components, Inc. (TAEC): Semiconductors and HDD solutions

 Visit us at: www.toshiba.com
 Headquartered in Irvine, California

Name: Elgin Brasil
Description:
Starting with the segment of sewing machines, the SA Elgin was founded in 1952. A family business with 100% national capital, has 3 manufacturing plants, 1 central office (in São Paulo) and another 10 kitchen's stores, with more than 1,200 employees. Present in several different branches of activity, with a range of more than 2,000 products and registered more than 25 areas of support and certification ISO 9001:2000. 

Over more than half a century of existence the company has diversified its operations in Brazil, producing consumer goods and industrial, and distribute products manufactured by large international companies as can be evidenced by the partnership, more than a decade, with the giant Japanese Canon. 

Elgin currently group has separate divisions for each segment in which it operates. The company has: Refrigeration, Info Products (Printers), Cuisine (Mobile), Automotive Sales, and Home & Office (air conditioners, sewing machines, Web Cam, fragments of paper, MP3 Player's, cartridges and media).

Name: Fuji Electric Co., Ltd.
Description:
Fuji Electric is committed to thoroughly exercising synergies between its core power semiconductor and power electronics technologies. By combining high-quality equipment employing key devices with engineering services, optimal control technologies, and IoT technologies developed through frontline operations, we will make contributions to the creation of a responsible and sustainable society in industrial and social infrastructure fields.

Fuji Electric's Social Media Policy: https://www.fujielectric.com/socialmedia/policy.html

Name: Dixon Technologies India Limited
Description:
Dixon Technologies (India) Limited has been leading the electronic manufacturing services (EMS) space in India. Founded in 1993 and commenced manufacturing of colour television in 1994, Dixon has now expanded its operations to various sub-segments of electronics.

As a home grown manufacturing company, Dixon Technologies provides design focused solutions in consumer durables, home appliances, lighting, mobile phones and security devices to customers across the globe, along with repairing and refurbishment services of a wide range of products including set top boxes, mobile phones and LED TV panels.

Name: mabe Global
Description:
mabe, empresa mexicana líder en línea blanca en América, cuenta con de 80 años de historia que respaldan el constante éxito, innovación y calidad. Nuestro rápido crecimiento nos ha permitido convertirnos en el líder exportador de línea blanca alrededor del mundo desde 1960.

Actualmente contamos con 11 plantas de producción, 19 marcas, 11 oficinas comerciales y un Centro de Tecnología y Proyectos que genera investigación y desarrollo a nivel mundial.

Además de ser reconocidos por la alta calidad de nuestros productos y por el continuo crecimiento de la empresa, nos enorgullece vivir bajo una sólida filosofía interna que orienta las acciones y comportamiento de nuestros colaboradores para juntos seguir creciendo.

Name: SharkNinja
Description: SharkNinja is a global product design and technology company that creates 5-star rated lifestyle solutions through innovative products for consumers around the world. Known for its two billion-dollar brands, Shark and Ninja, SharkNinja has a proven track record of establishing leadership positions by disrupting numerous household product categories, including Cleaning, Cooking, Food Preparation and Other, which includes Home Environment and Beauty.

Name: Bosch Security and Safety Systems
Description:
Bosch Security and Safety Systems is the channel dedicated to Bosch-branded products sold by KEENFINITY. 
The KEENFINITY Group delivers cutting-edge products and systems for security and communication encompassing video surveillance and public address, access control and intrusion alarm systems, and professional communications systems. It is the powerhouse of globally renowned brands such as Bosch, Electro-Voice, Dynacord, RTS, and Telex. KEENFINITY designs and manufactures all products at its own facilities across Europe, the Americas, and Asia. 
In fiscal year 2024, the business generated revenues of around 1 billion Euros with more than 4,200 employees. 
More information at www.keenfinity-group.com

(c) Keenfinity GmbH 2025, all rights reserved

Corporate Information: https://www.keenfinity-group.com/xc/en/terms-of-use/corporate-information/
Corporate Information (German): https://www.keenfinity-group.com/de/de/nutzungsbedingungen/nutzungsbedingungen/anbieter/
