Well known for the quality of its products and workforce, we can provide you the opportunity to work with talented people and a management team focused on growth and the ongoing development of leading-edge technologies for many of the world’s major OEM’s.

Compensation and Benefits:
Our benefit package is comprehensive and includes Medical Insurance; Dental Insurance; Vision Insurance; 401(K); Flexible Spending Accounts; Paid Vacation/Holidays; Short Term Disability; Long Term Disability; Tuition Reimbursement; If you desire to make a difference, are committed to bringing the highest quality of service to our customers and are looking for a "once in a lifetime" opportunity, send us your resume and salary requirements for consideration.

Name: Universal Instruments Corporation
Description:
We are a technology leader in the design and manufacture of precision automation solutions for the semiconductor and electronics manufacturing industry. With a lineage of more than 100 years, we are the longest-standing electronics assembly company. Our technology solutions are truly universal and span the range of assembly applications- from lighting to automotive, medical, computing, entertainment, mobility, industrial and more.

We employ a highly technical workforce of ~ 500 employees. This expertise and passion to develop innovative solutions to solve our customer’s problems drive our 500+ strong patent portfolio. With 27,000+ systems delivered to date, we offer the broadest range of world-class equipment and services. We also enjoy strategic partnerships with today’s industry leaders, which enables us to stay on the leading edge of technology trends and to deliver the best solutions for the production of a wide variety of the most complex electronic circuits in the World.

We offer solutions for a wide range of high-precision assembly needs, including Precision Automation for applications requiring versatile, high-accuracy, high-speed handling, inspection, and assembly. Advanced Packaging for applications requiring efficient and versatile multi-die high-accuracy assembly. Traditional to Complex Printed Circuit Board Assembly for applications requiring high-speed, high-accuracy surface mount placement and through-hole component insertion. Our cutting-edge smart manufacturing software provides real-time data to help manufacturers improve their overall operations. And, our world-renowned Advanced Process Lab (APL) offers solutions for all aspects of a product lifecycle- from prototyping, process development, and analytical services to advanced technology assembly.

Name: Carlo Gavazzi Automation
Description:
Carlo Gavazzi is an international group engaged in the design, manufacturing, and marketing of electronic control components for the global building and industrial automation markets.

Its factories in Italy, Mexico, Lithuania, Malta, and China are certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 standards. 

The company’s product portfolio—including sensors, solid-state relays, energy meters and analyzers, IoT energy management systems, monitoring relays, soft starters, timers, power supplies, and safety devices—delivers comprehensive automation solutions for both industrial and building applications. 

Typical customers include original equipment manufacturers in sectors such as access control, agriculture, conveyors, distributed energy resources, energy efficiency, energy storage, EV charging infrastructure, food & beverage, HVAC, mobile equipment, plastics & rubber, and semiconductors. In addition, system integrators and distributors play a key role as effective market channels. 

Carlo Gavazzi markets its products worldwide through 23 wholly owned sales companies and approximately 60 independent national distributors, covering Europe, the Americas, and the Asia-Pacific region.

Name: Foxconn D Group
Description: D group has more than 50,000 employees, with a global footprint that includes the United States, China, Taiwan, and over 10 other countries, with functions including R&D, sales, manufacturing, supply chain management, products and services extending into IT product manufacturing (computers, printers, printer cartridges, monitors, game consoles, and wireless speakers), industrial PCs, after-sales services, recycling, peer-to-peer digital payment platform, and strategic investments, on behalf of customers to provide an end-to-end, one-stop solution for  R&D, manufacturing, sales/marketing, and after-sales services.

Name: Electronic & Electrical Industries Corporation(EEIC)
Description:
Introduction & History

Electronic & Electrical Industries Corporation (EEIC), a subsidiary of Abunayyan Holding Company, was first established in early 1998. A Power and Automations solutions provider catering to the industrial infrastructure demands of the market, we offer a wide range of equipment and solutions covering turnkey E-House and Prefabricated Substations for Onshore and Offshore applications across a wide variety of sectors. From the burgeoning Oil &Gas industry to Petrochemicals, Power, Water, Infrastructure and the Solar Energy sector, EEIC is positioned to competitively service the market in line with customer and project requirements.

We are licensed to manufacture and service complete integrated Medium Voltage and Low Voltage solutions in collaboration with renowned industry leaders and international brands. Our expertise is thus, motivated by an unrelenting pursuit of excellence in quality augmented by the implementation of technology/transfer programs and the development of local resources as key objectives and drivers of national economic growth. 

Scope: 
We provide complete electrical solutions such as, turn key prefabricated substations, electrical houses, off-shore & on-shore pad mounted switchgears, Power SCADA and related services.
Moreover, EEIC manufactures & services 13 different type of equipments covering MV & LV switchgears, MV & LV controlgears, LV panelboards, control cabinets, PLC & automation panels.

Certifications:
EEIC is a pre-qualified vendor at all the major end users such as; Saudi Aramco, SABIC, KJO ...etc.
EEIC is ISO 9001:8000 certified and all our equipment are UL listed.

Capacity: 
Production capacity: up to 2000 panels per year
Plant area: 7500 square meters.
Manpower: 120 people

Description:
Selex, a dynamic multinational organization, emerged in London in 1994 and swiftly made its mark as a leading force in the electrical industry. Specializing in the manufacturing, design, and marketing of exceptional electrical products, Selex has garnered a reputation for delivering unparalleled quality for residential and commercial spaces. With its unwavering dedication to innovation and customer satisfaction, the company quickly established itself as the trusted choice for discerning customers across the vibrant Middle Eastern market.

Our operation transcends borders, representing a truly global enterprise with logistics and manufacturing networks spanning from the Arabian Peninsula to East Asia. At the heart of our success lies our commitment to excellence, demonstrated through the meticulous design of our products to meet and exceed rigorous standards and certifications. Our dedication to quality is evident in our products, which proudly bear the IECEE CB certification, as well as other essential international certifications such as CE, Gs, ROHS, Esma, and IEC. With this comprehensive approach, we ensure that our offerings consistently adhere to the highest industry benchmarks, earning the trust and confidence of our valued customers worldwide.

Name: Samsung India Electronics Limited, Noida
Description: Samsung India Electronics Limited, Noida is an electrical/electronic manufacturing company based out of 1640, Lodhi Road Complex , Delhi, Delhi, India.

Name: Schneider Electric
Description: We are an impact company. We're on a mission to be the chosen digital partner for sustainability and efficiency across industries.

Name: Gridspertise
Description:
The partner of choice for DSOs worldwide. 

We deliver a new era of sustainable and reliable smart grids through cutting-edge sustainable solutions for the digitalization of energy transition actors, ultimately impacting change in the broader industry and society to accelerate the transition to a sustainable energy future 

Reliable smart grids are key enablers of the transition to a decarbonized world. They allow for the large-scale uptake of renewable and distributed generation, such as industrial and residential photovoltaic power systems, and for the electrification of end uses.  

We partner with utilities all over the world to help them advance their power distribution networks, delivering integrated, cutting edge, and sustainable smart grid solutions to make energy infrastructure fit to meet the evolving needs of grid users and electricity end customers. Our solutions provide benefits for the entire electric ecosystem:  

For utilities: They increase service quality, reduce operating costs, optimize investments in new infrastructure, and enhance the safety, productivity and sustainability of field operations.   

For grid users: They provide a platform to integrate distributed energy resources and facilitate the development of the energy service market, including flexibility and electrification of end uses.   

For end customers: They increase the reliability of the electricity supply, facilitate electrification, foster energy efficiency, and make it easier for end customers to become prosumers by taking part in energy markets. 

We are more than a traditional supplier: we are a trusted partner, providing experience and advice to guide your investment decisions thanks to our unique understanding of your needs and our in-depth knowledge of local regulations, technical norms and requirements in different parts of the world.

Name: IndoAsian
Description:
IndoAsian is an Indian origin brand with a legacy of trust that has been continuing for over five decades now. As industry pioneers, we were the first to produce 10kA-breaking capacity MCBs and RCCBs in India and consistently delivering high-quality products suited to Indian markets. This contribution was recognized with the title of the Most Distinctive Goodwill Brand in Electricals 2017 by ERTC Media.

Designing more with less, and offering great value for money is at the heart of everything we do. We innovate so that our products make sense, without compromising on quality. We call this Frugal Engineering, and it takes us from “how to make this product better” to “how to make this better product accessible.” This is how we measure success: when every consumer who experiences it says, “this makes sense”. IndoAsian is a part of the Legrand Group in India.

Name: Stelmec Limited
Description:
Stelmec is leading name in the Indian power industry, dedicated to delivering innovating and sustainable energy solutions to businesses and communities across the country. 
Our range of services includes energy solutions, power distribution, and transmission. We combine cutting-edge technology, industry expertise, and a deep understanding of the local market to provide our clients with best-in-class solutions that are both reliable and cost-effective.
With a team of highly skilled professionals and a commitment to excellence, Stelmec is at the forefront of the energy revolution in India. Join us on our mission to create a brighter, more sustainable future for all.

Name: OREL Group
Description:
Orel Group is a Technology and Manufacturing Multinational Conglomerate Corporation. Our Global Ecosystem Empowers Humanity by creating a cleaner, smarter and sustainable future through reimagining the possibilities of Power, Data and Water. 

With a presence across six continents and more than fifty countries, we are committed to shaping the future by unleashing the full potential of all stakeholders with unmatched value, opportunities, and experiences. Join us in this exciting journey of innovation towards a brighter future.

Name: Regent Lighting
Description: From the beginning, over a hundred years ago, people have powered what we do. The people who plan, the people who install, the people who ultimately benefit from the optimised atmosphere our lights and luminaires create.  Every innovation, every design, every product has been born out of a restless quest to improve and enhance the work and living spaces of people. Their environment is our priority. That is why we are constantly searching for new technologies and new ideas to improve those environments. Our lighting is there to make people feel, work and live better. And that is why people light our way.

Name: B3 International
Description:
B3 International is a leading Italian manufacturer of cables, powering global communications and connectivity. Since 2012, we have established ourselves as a trusted global partner through our expertise and innovation. 

We offer a wide range of high-performance cables, including multi-conductor, paired, fire alarm and fire-resistant, data, instrumentation, coaxial, and optical fiber solutions. Our products and operations meet international standards, reflecting our commitment to quality, safety, and sustainability. 

With world-class European manufacturing, an extensive product portfolio, and a strong market presence, B3 International delivers solutions that advance connectivity, safety, and innovation worldwide.

Name: Fronius España
Description:
En Fronius Solar & Energy creamos soluciones energéticas para un futuro sin emisiones, ya sea para viviendas, explotaciones agrícolas, pymes o proyectos comerciales e industriales a gran escala. Nuestros productos innovadores son la respuesta para aprovechar la energía solar como suministro eléctrico, para calefacción y climatización, y para la recarga de vehículos eléctricos También ofrecemos soluciones de carga para baterías de tracción en intralogística y para baterías de arranque en talleres de vehículos.

En Fronius Welding somos líderes en innovación en soldadura por arco voltaico y en soldadura asistida por robot. Demostramos nuestra experiencia con sistemas completos individuales y automatizados, así como con soluciones de soldadura digital para la Industria 5.0. Nuestra oferta se completa con equipos de soldadura intuitivos para aplicaciones de soldadura manual, accesorios de soldadura de alta calidad y productos de protección eficaces para la seguridad de los usuarios. Como empresa global, ofrecemos un servicio regional a través de equipos locales que están a disposición de nuestros clientes en todo el mundo. Con nuestras tecnologías, marcamos tendencias y creamos conexiones entre metales, industrias y personas.

Alrededor de 6700 empleados en todo el mundo a finales de 2024, un porcentaje de exportación actual del 90 % y 1752 patentes activas: así somos nosotros, así es Fronius. Fundada en 1945, esta empresa regional unipersonal se ha convertido en una empresa industrial activa en todo el mundo con 37 filiales internacionales y una red de distribuidores en más de 60 países, pero en el fondo sigue siendo un negocio familiar austriaco que opera en el ámbito de la industria eléctrica y electrónica.

Name: Glen Dimplex
Description:
As a privately owned business with a 50-year heritage in manufacturing, Glen Dimplex Group is alive with entrepreneurial spirit, and innovation and driven by a steadfast belief in people and partnerships.

Almost five decades ago, Martin Naughton and four colleagues established Glen Electric in Newry, Northern Ireland. Just four years later with the acquisition of Dimplex, a company eight times Glen’s size and a brand leader in electric heating; Glen Dimplex was born. 

Since the Group’s foundation it has continued to grow organically and through 
 acquisitions of much-loved brands across the world.

Today, Glen Dimplex Group works across an international footprint, connecting more than 8,000 people working together in 20 countries across four key sectors of Heating and Ventilation, Flame, Precision Cooling and Consumer Appliances.

Our portfolio of innovative products and solutions span living and working environments, all created with a simple, shared mindset of empowering the everyday lives of our customers; through products and solutions designed to make life easier, better and more energy efficient.

Name: Chint Power Systems Americas
Description: CPS America is your U.S.-based supplier for 3-phase string inverters for Commercial, Industrial and Utility-Scale projects. More than 10 gigawatts of CPS 3-phase string inverters are installed on 30,000+ projects around the nation, and that is increasing daily. We have been in business in the U.S. for more than a decade and are proud that we have held the #1 market share for 3-phase string inverters for 8 consecutive years. Our U.S. headquarters and Innovation Center is located in Richardson, Texas. In addition, our Business Operations is based in Somerville, NJ, Supply Chain Operations in Wylie, Texas and Products & Applications Engineering in Pleasanton, California. With offices on both coasts, Innovation Center in Texas and our field technical service team strategically positioned around the country, we are nimble and can respond to customer requests for assistance promptly.

Name: V-TAC - Meaningful Innovation
Description:
Who are we?

V-TAC is a global company that oﬀers high-quality
lighting, electrical, digital, and energy products to
consumers and spaces worldwide.

Founded in 2009, V-TAC has expanded its market to 70+ countries throughout Europe, Asia Pacific, Africa, the Middle East, and the USA. As a result of our relentless pursuit of excellence, we have been listed in the London Stock Exchange Group’s 1000 Companies to Inspire Europe.

Boasting a portfolio of over 3800+ lighting products, V-TAC has utilized its brand value and R&D eﬀorts into innovating beyond lighting solutions into categories like smart home solutions and wireless speakers.

Utilizing our brand value and manufacturing technologies, we have been expanding our product categories beyond lighting, with one mission to improve the lives of humanity worldwide.

Now, we are moving towards promoting sustainable practices that will help citizens and businesses lower their carbon footprint, and become a global leader in providing energy efficient systems – including solar panels, inverters,
battery packs, and power stations.

Description:
Ador Powertron is part of the 110 year old ADOR group whose companies include Ador Welding, Ador Fontech, 3D Future Technologies and Sublime Factory. 

Ador Powertron focuses on pollution control equipment for power stations and steel, cement & paper manufacturing plants (High Voltage and High Frequency Rectifiers and controls for ESPs) as well as road safety solutions and defence border and base protection solutions.    The company’s road safety solutions  include the ADOR Harmony speed enforcement system, Ador Serenity & Tranquility Vehicle Activated Speed Signs used for traffic calming as well as Variable Message Signs, safety roller barriers and crash attenuators.

The Ador Team is dedicated to our core purpose, which is Changing the Face of India. If this vision meets your own personal objectives, lets discuss how we can work together.

Name: NEPEAN Power
Description:
NEPEAN Power is a manufacturer and supplier of electrical and electronic products with facilities throughout Australia.

NEPEAN Power was established in 1994 and has since been supplying electrical power solutions to the industrial and renewable markets. From humble beginnings in a small workshop in Maitland, New South Wales, NEPEAN Power has grown to be a supplier of choice for medium and high voltage products throughout Australia. As experts in compliance and certification, NEPEAN Power offers an innovative and alternate range of switchgear, transformers and solutions.

With a state of the art workshop, built specifically to service and manufacture electrical equipment, NEPEAN Power is able to offer complete turn-key solutions adapted to comply with our customer’s individual specifications.

NEPEAN Power’s extensive experience in engineering and design as well as the ability to manufacture quality equipment, allows us to provide solutions from minor projects through to large turn-key infrastructure.

NEPEAN Power is 100% Australian owned and operated and is a subsidiary of NEPEAN.

Description: Septentrio designs and manufactures high-precision OEM GNSS receivers and surveying/GIS equipment. Description:
Emirates Transformer & Switchgear Ltd. (ETS), established in 1987, is the pioneer manufacturer of transformers & switchgear in the United Arab Emirates. In addition to having extended its product line, it has also developed a technological, administrative and marketing infrastructure that is comparable with some of the finest manufacturers of similar products worldwide. IEO Transformatoren B.V., Breda, The Netherlands, ETS, enjoys the additional benefit of obtaining more information related to technological improvements and market trends from all over the world. Name: Tridonic MEINA
Description:
Tridonic is a world-leading supplier of lighting technology, supporting its customers with intelligent hardware and software and offering the highest level of quality, reliability, and energy savings. As a global driver of innovation in the field of lighting-based network technology, Tridonic develops scalable & future-oriented solutions that enable new business models for lighting manufacturers, building managers, systems integrators, planners, and many other types of customers. 

To promote the vision of the “Internet of Light,” Tridonic relies on partnerships with other specialists. The goal is the joint development of innovative technological solutions that convert lighting systems into intelligent networks and thereby, enable associated services. Its profound technical industry expertise makes Tridonic an ideal partner for established brands and for newcomers to the market. 

Tridonic is the technology company of the Zumtobel Group and is headquartered in Dornbirn, Austria. In the 2017/18 tax year, Tridonic generated sales of €352.7 million. 1,690 highly skilled employees and a worldwide sales presence in over 50 countries reflect the company’s commitment to the development and deployment of new, smart, and connected lighting systems.

Tridonic has been a driving force in the development of professional lighting for more than 60 years. Thanks to the knowledge and expertise of our engineers, we provide functionally and economically superior lighting solutions that are reliable, secure, energy efficient, and sustainable. Our customers benefit from our extensive knowledge, our international presence, and our long-standing reputation for excellence and the highest quality. 

This page is fully dedicated to Tridonic MEIA & ASEAN updates.

Name: Tirex Chargers
Description:
Welcome to Tirex Chargers!

Tirex Chargers, a subsidiary of Gulf Oil Lubricants India Ltd., is a pioneering force in the electric vehicle (EV) charging industry, with a proven track record of excellence since our establishment in 2016. Based in Ahmedabad, we specialize in delivering high-quality EV charging solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of businesses and organizations across various sectors.

With a steadfast commitment to innovation and engineering precision, Tirex Chargers has emerged as a trusted partner for leading OEMs and businesses nationwide. Our extensive portfolio includes a diverse range of EV AC and DC chargers, spanning from 3 kW to 240 kW, designed to accommodate the charging requirements of two-wheelers, three-wheelers, four-wheelers, and heavy vehicles.

We take pride in our resolute dedication to quality assurance and compliance with Bharat and international standards. All our products undergo rigorous testing and certification by reputable authorities such as ARAI and CE, ensuring reliability and performance excellence.

Tirex Chargers is proud to serve a diverse clientele across Gujarat, Rajasthan, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Goa, Maharashtra, Madhya Pradesh, Kerala, Karnataka, and Delhi. Moreover, our partnerships with prominent Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs) and Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs) underscore our reputation as a preferred provider of EV charging infrastructure solutions.

At Tirex Chargers, customer satisfaction is at the forefront of everything we do. We offer comprehensive after-sales support and maintenance services to ensure seamless integration and operational efficiency for our clients. With an expanding network of dealerships nationwide, we are committed to providing accessible and reliable EV charging solutions across India.

We are ready to collaborate with your esteemed enterprise, providing innovative and sustainable EV charging solutions that drive your business forward with confidence into the future.

Name: Oxford Instruments Life Science
Description:
𝙒𝙚𝙡𝙘𝙤𝙢𝙚 𝙩𝙤 𝙊𝙭𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙙 𝙄𝙣𝙨𝙩𝙧𝙪𝙢𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙨 𝙇𝙞𝙛𝙚 𝙎𝙘𝙞𝙚𝙣𝙘𝙚

This page is dedicated to showcasing how we empower researchers across immunology, microbiology, neuroscience, cell biology, cancer research, pharmaceuticals, and beyond to see more, discover faster, and push the boundaries of biological science. Here, you will find insights into our advanced imaging and analysis technologies that enable breakthroughs across disciplines, from challenging single-molecule studies to routine microscopy workflows.

With exceptional performance and intuitive design, our solutions support a broad spectrum of samples and applications, whether fixed or live, large or small, static or dynamic. Our continually expanding product portfolio ensures you have the tools needed to accelerate discovery and generate meaningful scientific impact.

𝙒𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙀𝙭𝙥𝙚𝙘𝙩 𝙤𝙣 𝙏𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝘾𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙣𝙚𝙡:
 Product Focus - Explore our high-performance tools for imaging, analysis, and sample characterisation.
 Application Notes - Practical guidance for applying our technologies to real-world biological research.
 Solution Notes - Learn how we address complex life science challenges with tailored, integrated solutions.
 Technical Articles - Deep dives into innovative techniques and the latest developments in biological imaging.
 eBooks - Comprehensive resources designed to expand your expertise.
 Webinars - Expert-led sessions on emerging trends and best practices in life science research.
 Case Studies - Real examples of how we support scientists in achieving reproducibility, precision, and groundbreaking results.
 Application Images - Visual insights into our systems in action across diverse biological samples.

Explore this page to see how Oxford Instruments supports your research ambitions and helps turn scientific challenges into transformative discoveries.

Name: ProLogium Technology 輝能科技
Description: ProLogium Technology is a global leader in high-performing, safe and affordable battery technologies in vehicle, consumer and industry applications. Founded 18 years ago in Taiwan, ProLogium is the world's first company to successfully develop, mass produce, and commercialize the lithium ceramic battery – an essential component in the global energy transition to Net Zero.

Mimaki develops the complete product range for each group; hardware, software and the associated consumable items, such as inks and cutting blades.

Description:
At Infinite Electronics, we work to move the world forward by delivering reliable, engineered connectivity solutions worldwide through our portfolio of companies.
We are guided by a vision to be the first choice for our people, customers, investors, partners and the communities we serve.
With deep engineering expertise, rapid-prototyping capabilities, and scalable global production, Infinite Electronics is a trusted partner in advancing the world’s connectivity needs.
Infinite Electronics, where every connection matters.

Name: Brompton Technology Limited
Description:
Brompton Technology is the market leader in LED video processing for the most demanding applications across key sectors including Virtual Production & ICVFX, Live Events & Touring, Corporate & Education,Broadcast & Studio and Esports. 

Founded in 2011, Brompton Technology has become a globally respected brand, known worldwide for exceptional quality, reliability and technical support. Its headquarters are in West London, with offices in Burbank (USA), Shenzhen and Taipei, as well as sales teams in Orlando, New Jersey, France, Germany and Dubai – serving customers in their regions and in their language. 
 
Brompton innovations include the revolutionary Dynamic Calibration approach to LED panel calibration and TrueLight, a breakthrough technology in colour and lighting quality for panels that have extra emitters. Product and feature designs come from years of industry and engineering experience, coupled with a dedicated focus on image quality, breadth of functionality, ease of use and reliability.  

The company has won multiple awards including a Queen’s Award for Enterprise: International Trade, the AV Award for Manufacturer of the Year, and a Lumiere Entertainment Technology Award,  and Emmy Award and King’s Award for Enterprise (Innovation) for the Tessera SX40 LED processor, and multiple awards for the Tessera G1 receiver card – a platform that’s redefining the future of LED processing.

Name: Rice Lake Weighing Systems
Description:
Rice Lake Weighing Systems is a family-owned company in the United States. Its headquarters, metrology laboratory and main manufacturing plant are located in Rice Lake, Wisconsin with support facilities throughout the world including North America, South America, India and the Netherlands.

Rice Lake Weighing Systems is an international leader in the manufacture and distribution of weight-related products and process-control equipment. Within this company, progressive new technologies merge with the wisdom of industry experience and create the future of weighing through cutting-edge research and design. 

Our roots are planted firmly in the principles of quality and customer service. Through three generations of family ownership these ideals remain unchanged. Today, Rice Lake Weighing Systems is world renowned for delivering the highest standard of product and the best service in the weighing industry. 

We continue our dedication to being the best by every measure, from community involvement to global commitment, and the promotion of ethical business practices that represent the values of our customers, our employees and our company.

Contact Rice Lake Weighing Systems at 800-472-6703 between 6:30am and 6:30pm (CST) Monday through Friday, and 8am to 12pm on Saturday.

Name: Nidec Mobility America Corporation
Description:
Committed to evolving its automotive electric control technology to help address issues in the mobility society, Nidec Mobility offers controllers, switches, sensors, and other products that are used for cars' body control, all of which are essential for car electronics.

Recent years have seen an increasing number of people in the world use cars as a convenient means of transportation, while car-caused issues have become more and more serious; for example, emerging economies are facing a rise in the death toll due to traffic accidents and respiratory diseases caused by, among other factors, exhaust from vehicles. Name: Royal Imtech N.V
Description:
Royal Imtech N.V. 1860 – 2015

The company started in 1860 and in 2001 became stock listed. In the following 10 years, the company rapidly expands with an increased turnover from 2 billion euros in 2001 to 5.5 billion euros in 2012. In that period, 86 companies have been acquired and the total amount of employees all over the globe rose to approx. 29,000.

However, the company could not keep up with the fast growth. Early 2013, Imtech announced major financial irregularities in Germany and Poland that resulted in a total loss in 2013 of 696 million euros. In the following 2,5 years, a new Board of Management with a largely new management team faced the challenge to rebuild the company. A firm recovery program generated several times the necessary additional financial resources, but it could not ultimately prevent the worldwide declining operating results and in August 2015 the bankruptcy of the holding. The vast majority of Imtech's Divisions such as Imtech Marine, Imtech Traffic & Infra and the Country Divisions continued under new ownership.

Company profile

Royal Imtech N.V. was a European technical solutions provider in the fields of electrical and mechanical solutions and automation. With around 22,000 employees working in seven divisions, Imtech achieved annual revenue of approx. 4 billion euro (2014). Imtech held attractive positions in the buildings and industrial markets in the Benelux, Germany, Austria, Eastern Europe, Sweden, Norway, Finland, UK, Ireland and Spain, as well as in the European market for traffic & infra and in the global marine market.

Imtech offered integrated and multidisciplinary total solutions for complex technical challenges, from design, consultancy and engineering to maintenance management, implementation and services. Over more than 150 years Imtech had built a solid track record on improving energy efficiency, mobility, safety and productivity – its way of driving progress and contributing to a sustainable society.

Name: Westinghouse Lighting
Description:
Westinghouse Lighting is a family-owned lighting company based in Philadelphia. Founded in 1946 by Romolo and Stanley Angelo as Angelo Brothers, we rebranded as Westinghouse Lighting in 2003 through a licensing agreement with Westinghouse Electric Corporation. This partnership has allowed us to carry the Westinghouse brand of lighting into the future and expand our company globally, while maintaining our core values and integrity as a family business. 

Our company's success can be attributed to a mix of hard work, good fortune, the ability to recognize and seize opportunities, and a dedicated team to keep us moving forward. This winning combination is why we are one of the few privately held, multi-generational family businesses in the lighting manufacturing industry that has been in business for 75 years; and the only global lighting company that carries a full line of lighting fixtures, ceiling fans, lamps (light bulbs), and lighting accessories for both residential and commercial markets.

Our company values the professional and personal growth of our team members. We work collaboratively to develop, produce, and market high-quality and innovative lighting products to meet the ever-changing needs of our diverse customer base.

We have a global presence extending from our headquarters in Philadalphia, which includes teams in Canada, Europe, and Latin America, as well as international distribution centers in Canada, Germany, Mexico, and Panama.

Name: Delvitech SA
Description:
Delvitech designs, manufactures and supplies a sustainable AI based technological solution for the 3D automated optical inspection of assembled printed circuit boards.

In Delvitech R&D and Innovation are at the heart of every activity. Artificial intelligence is combined with an industry-leading engineering technology, resulting in a unique inspection machine for all SMT and THT production phases.

Characterized by self-programming features, Delvitech’s software, in conjunction with its proprietary patented multi-camera optical head, precision-engineered in Switzerland, delivers unparalleled inspection capabilities. The web-based software is unique, modern, singular and its ultimate goal is to automatically generate inspection programs, that can even be shared through the cloud.

The result is the continuous improvement of the entire manufacturing process, making it faster, steadier, more scalable.

Delvitech solution means less errors, less waste, less CO2, more future.

Name: Easy-Laser
Description:
Easy-Laser is one of the world’s leading manufacturers and suppliers of laser measurement systems for all types of industry. We provide extreme accuracy and precision. But that’s not what sets us apart. Today, when virtually anyone with a decent laser can do “straight”, to get ahead, you need to be a bit more forward-thinking.

Because, in the long run, what really counts is neither the absolute straightness of an individual component nor the precise alignment of shafts. It's what these measures add up to: Increased productivity and the saving of resources. Those are the things we ultimately deliver. And from that perspective our most important task is to help you make the road leading there as free from bumps and bends as possible.

That means developing user-friendly measurement and alignment systems that are as easy to get your head around, as they are versatile and scalable. It also means shortening delivery times, extending warranties and optimizing training and support.

Moreover, you can always expect us, or any of our partners, to give you an honest opinion on which of our products are crucial to your operations and which you can do without. What really needs to be aligned and what not. So that what we offer you is a solution perfectly aligned with your needs – and your budget.

Regardless of whether you're a service technician, a purchaser or the CFO of a multinational industrial group, you'll find Easy-Laser truly easy to deal with. Or as we like to put it – straightforward by all measures.

As a world leader in sustainable heating technology, Kanthal collaborates with energy-intensive industries such as steel, cement, petrochemical and battery to develop electric heating solutions that help minimizing their carbon footprint.

Kanthal has provided industry-leading electric heating technology to the world since 1931, when metallurgist Hans von Kantzow founded the company in Hallstahammar, Sweden, based on his discovery of the FeCrAl (iron-chrome-aluminum) alloy.

Over the years we’ve built the largest product range of resistance heating solutions for industrial applications on the market. Our ability to develop and melt specific alloys and convert them into wire, strip, tubes and plates allows us to offer heating materials as well as heating elements and complete heating solutions to our customers.

Today we’re a truly global company with production units and sales offices all around the world.

GSSI’s leadership in subsurface imaging equipment began with the introduction of the first commercial ground penetrating radar system in 1974. For over 50 years, GSSI has consistently led the industry with a series of “firsts” including the first digital GPR system, the first commercially available software package designed to process radar data and the first high-frequency GPR system specifically designed to scan concrete.

Today, GSSI offers the market’s broadest range of ground penetrating radar and electromagnetic induction equipment - covering a host of applications from archaeology and forensics, geology and environmental, utility detection and concrete inspection, to transportation infrastructure condition assessment.

Thank you for your interest in GSSI.

Name: Micromeritics Instrument Corporation
Description:
The integration of Malvern Panalytical, Micromeritics and SciAps creates a powerful combination of market-leading analytical technologies.

We are the toolmakers for the world's most innovative companies, academic institutions, and government laboratories. More than 92,000 of our instruments are used daily in customers' laboratories worldwide. Customers value us for our analytical technologies and deep expertise—we are their partners in discovery.

Malvern Panalytical instruments analyze the chemical, physical and structural nature of materials, from proteins to polymers and semiconductors to minerals. Our technologies measure particle size, shape, concentration and zeta potential, biomolecular interactions and stability, elemental concentrations and crystallographic structure.

Micromeritics manufactures characterization systems for particles, powders, and porous materials across catalysts, chemicals, building materials, clean-tech and battery markets. Our technologies measure surface area, porosity, density, adsorption and particle activity.

SciAps specializes in portable X-ray fluorescence (XRF), laser-based (LIBS) and near-infrared (NIR) analyzers to measure any element in any environment—our Center of Excellence for handheld instruments.

We have a global footprint with R&D and manufacturing sites in North America, Europe, and Asia. Our 2,500+ employees operate in a customer-focused organization with sales and service offices in 20 countries, delivering expert and responsive support.

We are committed to achieving Net Zero in operations by 2030, and across our total value chain by 2040.

We are part of Spectris. Spectris combines precision with purpose, delivering progress for a more sustainable world. Our leading instruments and software equip customers to solve critical challenges, making the world cleaner, healthier and more productive.
